title: भावफलानि
content:
जातकपारिजाते एकादशोऽध्यायः
॥ अथ भावफलानि ॥
Adhyaya XI.
THE EFFECTS OF THE 1ST AND THE 2ND BHAVAS,
होरालंकारमुख्यप्रभवशुभफलादीनि सर्वाणि पुंसां
तत्तद्भावोद्भवानि द्यचरबलवशाद्यानि तानि प्रवच्मि ।
ये ये भावाः सितज्ञामरगुरुपतिभिः संयुता वीक्षिता वा
नान्यैर्दृष्टा न युक्ता यदि शुभफलदा मूर्तिभावादिकेषु ॥१॥
Sloka 1. I am to treat of the good and other
effects which are the chief source of adornment to the
science of astrology just as they arise in the several
bhavas appertaining to men owing to the prepondera.
ting influence of planets. Among the Lagna and other
bhavas, such as are occupied or aspected by Venus,
Mercury, Jupiter or the भावपति (Bhavapathi-the lord of
the bhava concerned), but unaspected by or unassociated
with the rest, produce happy results.
cf. उत्तरपाराशर
यो यो भावः स्वामिदृष्टो युतो वा सौम्यैर्वा स्यात्तस्य तस्याभिवृद्धिः ।
पॉवेरेवं तस्य भावस्य हानिर्निर्देष्टव्या प्रश्नतो जन्मतो वा ॥
तन्वादिभावेषु शुभोदयेषु तद्भावनाथोपगतेक्षितेषु ।
तदुक्तभावस्थसमृद्धिरुक्ता न पापखेटेक्षितसंयुतेषु ॥ २ ॥
709
verses:
होरालंकारमुख्यप्रभवशुभफलादीनि सर्वाणि पुंसां
तत्तद्भावोद्भवानि द्यचरबलवशाद्यानि तानि प्रवच्मि ।
ये ये भावाः सितज्ञामरगुरुपतिभिः संयुता वीक्षिता वा
नान्यैर्दृष्टा न युक्ता यदि शुभफलदा मूर्तिभावादिकेषु

I am to treat of the good and other
effects which are the chief source of adornment to the
science of astrology just as they arise in the several
bhavas appertaining to men owing to the prepondera.
ting influence of planets. Among the Lagna and other
bhavas, such as are occupied or aspected by Venus,
Mercury, Jupiter or the भावपति (Bhavapathi-the lord of
the bhava concerned), but unaspected by or unassociated
with the rest, produce happy results.
यो यो भावः स्वामिदृष्टो युतो वा सौम्यैर्वा स्यात्तस्य तस्याभिवृद्धिः ।
पॉवेरेवं तस्य भावस्य हानिर्निर्देष्टव्या प्रश्नतो जन्मतो वा ॥

तन्वादिभावेषु शुभोदयेषु तद्भावनाथोपगतेक्षितेषु ।
तदुक्तभावस्थसमृद्धिरुक्ता न पापखेटेक्षितसंयुतेषु

content:
710
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. XI.
Sloka 2. When the Lagna and some of the other
bhavas have benefic planets appearing in them or are
occupied or aspected by their lords, a wealth of the said
bhavas may be declared to exist provided they are un-
aspected or unoccupied by malefic planets.
नीचस्थो रिपुराशिस्थः खेटो भावविनाशकः ।
मूलस्वतुङ्गमित्रस्थो भाववृद्धिकरो भवेत् ॥ ३ ॥
Sloka 3. A planet in its depression or inimical
sign destroys the bhava that it owns. But in its मूलत्रिकोण
(Moolatrikona), exaltation or friendly sign it advances
the same.
cf. उत्तरपाराशर
यद्भावेशोऽरिनीचस्थो मूढो वा तन्न पश्यति ।
तद्भावसत्त्रमालस्यं वैरित्वं वा विनिर्दिशेत् ॥
भावेशः कारकोऽपि स्वगृहमुपगतौ तुङ्गमङ्गौ यदा ता-
वन्योन्यस्थौ शुभाभ्यामभित इतियुतौ वीक्षिनौ सौम्यदृष्टौ ।
यद्येवं भावपुष्टिर्भवति यदि हिनौ दुःस्थत्रस्थौ युतौ वा
दृष्टौ पापापचारैर्न भवति रिपुनीचाम्तयुक्तौ च हानिः ॥
भावं पश्यति वा स्थितोत्र यदि वा यः कोऽपि भावाधिपः
तुङ्गान्योन्यसुहृन्निकेतनगतो दृष्टः शुभैर्मध्यगः ।
भावस्यास्ति बलं न चारित यदि चेद्भावाधिपो दुःस्थितो
नीचास्तारिगृहं गतो यदि भवेत्पापैर्युतो वीक्षितः ॥
यद्भावनाथो रिपुरिःफरन्धे दुःस्थानपो यद्भवनस्थितो वा ।
तद्भावनाशं कथयन्ति तइज्ञाः शुभेक्षितश्चेत्फलमन्यथा स्यात् ॥ ४ ॥
Sloka 4. When a bhava has its lord in the 6th,
the 8th or the 12th, or is occupied by the lord of one of
these three, it suffers annihilation, say those that know
verses:
When the Lagna and some of the other
bhavas have benefic planets appearing in them or are
occupied or aspected by their lords, a wealth of the said

aspected or unoccupied by malefic planets.

नीचस्थो रिपुराशिस्थः खेटो भावविनाशकः ।
मूलस्वतुङ्गमित्रस्थो भाववृद्धिकरो भवेत् ॥

A planet in its depression or inimical
sign destroys the bhava that it owns. But in its मूलत्रिकोण
(Moolatrikona), exaltation or friendly sign it advances
the same.

यद्भावेशोऽरिनीचस्थो मूढो वा तन्न पश्यति ।
तद्भावसत्त्रमालस्यं वैरित्वं वा विनिर्दिशेत् ॥
भावेशः कारकोऽपि स्वगृहमुपगतौ तुङ्गमङ्गौ यदा ता-
वन्योन्यस्थौ शुभाभ्यामभित इतियुतौ वीक्षिनौ सौम्यदृष्टौ ।

दृष्टौ पापापचारैर्न भवति रिपुनीचाम्तयुक्तौ च हानिः ॥
भावं पश्यति वा स्थितोत्र यदि वा यः कोऽपि भावाधिपः

भावस्यास्ति बलं न चारित यदि चेद्भावाधिपो दुःस्थितो

When a bhava has its lord in the 6th,
the 8th or the 12th, or is occupied by the lord of one of
these three, it suffers annihilation, say those that know

title: एकादशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 5-6
एकादशोऽध्यायः
711
the properties of a bhava If such a bhava be aspected
by a benefic planet, the effect will be different.
यद्भावपः केन्द्रगतो विलग्नात् त्रिकोणगो वा यदि सौम्यदृष्टः ।
तुङ्गादिवर्गोपगतो बलाढ्यस्तद्भावपुष्टि फलमाहुरार्याः ॥ ५ ॥
Sloka 5. If the lord of a bhava occupying a Ken-
dra or Trikona position from the Lagna possess abundant
strength being either aspected by benefic planets or in
its exaltation and other Vargas, that bhava, say the wise
astrologers, is in a flourishing condition.
उत्तरपाराशर
मावेशः कारकोऽपि स्वगृहमुपगतौ तुङ्गगौ वा मिथस्थौ
मित्रे मध्यं शुभानां यदि भवति मिथस्थानगौ भावपुष्टिः ।
अन्योन्यं शत्रुभूतौ यदपि च भवतो नीचमात्रं गतौ वा
मूढौ वा पापयुक्तौ तु शुभनिधनगौ भावनाशं गणन्ति ॥
तत्तद्भावत्रिकोणे सुखमदनगृहे वाऽऽस्पदे सौम्ययुक्ते
पापानां दृष्टिहीने भवनपसहिते पापखेटैरयुक्ते ।
भावानां पुष्टिमाहुः सकलशुभकरीमन्यथा चेत्प्रणाशं
मिश्र मिश्रग्रहेन्द्रेरखिलमपि तथा मूर्तिभावादिकानाम् ॥ ६ ॥
Sloka 6. Astrologers pronounce the strength of
a bhava such as the Lagna to be ample and thoroughly
beneficent when a Trikona, the 4th, the 7th or the 10th
place therefrom is occupied by an auspicious planet or
भावप (bhavapa-the lord of the bhava) and is unoccupied
or unaspected by malefic planets. A bhava suffers
decay when the positions referred to above are different-
ly occupied and aspected The effect of a bhava will be
mixed when the positions noted above are occupied or
aspected by benefic and malefic planets promiscuously.
verses:
यद्भावपः केन्द्रगतो विलग्नात् त्रिकोणगो वा यदि सौम्यदृष्टः ।
तुङ्गादिवर्गोपगतो बलाढ्यस्तद्भावपुष्टि फलमाहुरार्याः ॥ ५ ॥

If the lord of a bhava occupying a Ken-
dra or Trikona position from the Lagna possess abundant
strength being either aspected by benefic planets or in
its exaltation and other Vargas, that bhava, say the wise

मावेशः कारकोऽपि स्वगृहमुपगतौ तुङ्गगौ वा मिथस्थौ

मूढौ वा पापयुक्तौ तु शुभनिधनगौ भावनाशं गणन्ति ॥

तत्तद्भावत्रिकोणे सुखमदनगृहे वाऽऽस्पदे सौम्ययुक्ते
पापानां दृष्टिहीने भवनपसहिते पापखेटैरयुक्ते ।

Astrologers pronounce the strength of
a bhava such as the Lagna to be ample and thoroughly
beneficent when a Trikona, the 4th, the 7th or the 10th
place therefrom is occupied by an auspicious planet or
भावप (bhavapa-the lord of the bhava) and is unoccupied
or unaspected by malefic planets. A bhava suffers
decay when the positions referred to above are different-
ly occupied and aspected The effect of a bhava will be
mixed when the positions noted above are occupied or
aspected by benefic and malefic planets promiscuously.

content:
719
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. XI.
नाशस्थानगतो दिवाकरकरच्छन्नस्तु यद्भावपो
नीचारातिगतोऽथवा यदि शुभैः खेटैरयुक्तेक्षितः ।
तद्भावस्य विनाशनं सुनिगणाः शंसन्ति खेटैर्युतो
यद्यत्रापि फलप्रदो नहि तथा मूर्त्यादिभानां क्रमात् ॥ ७ ॥
Sloka 7. Of the Lagna and other bhavas examined
in succession, whichever bhava has its lord occupying
the 8th place (from it) or obscured by the solar rays or
in depression or in an inimical house, while no benefic
planets aspect or are associated with it, the astrologers
declare the total destruction of such a bhava. The lord
of the bhava concerned even in the event of being asso-
ciated with other planets is incapable of producing any
good effect.
दुःस्थाने वाऽरिगे मूढे दुर्बले भावनायके ।
भावस्य संपदं कर्तुं न शक्ता भावमाश्रिताः ॥ ८ ॥
Sloka 8. Planets occupying a bhava cannot ad-
vance it when its lord is in a दुःस्थान (Duhsthana-6th,
8th or 12th place from it) or an inimical house or in a
state of eclipse or impotence
दुष्टस्थितो वाऽपि यदा नभोगः पापारिनीचांशकसंयुतो यः ।
खतुङ्गमित्रांशकराशियुक्तः शुभेक्षितो वा यदि शोभनः स्यात् ॥ ९॥
Sloka 9. A planet may even be badly placed or
occupy a नवांश (Navamsa) owned by a malefic, inimical
or its own depression sign; it will nevertheless prove
beneficial when the Navatisa or Rasi occupied by it is
its own, or that of its exaltation sign or of a friendly
planet no less than when benefic planets aspect it.
भावेशाक्रान्तराशशि दुःस्थे भावस्य दुर्बलम् ।
स्वोच्चमित्रस्वराशिस्थे भावपुष्टि वदेङ्खधः ॥ १० ॥
verses:
नाशस्थानगतो दिवाकरकरच्छन्नस्तु यद्भावपो
नीचारातिगतोऽथवा यदि शुभैः खेटैरयुक्तेक्षितः ।
तद्भावस्य विनाशनं सुनिगणाः शंसन्ति खेटैर्युतो
यद्यत्रापि फलप्रदो नहि तथा मूर्त्यादिभानां क्रमात् ॥ ७ ॥

Of the Lagna and other bhavas examined
in succession, whichever bhava has its lord occupying
the 8th place (from it) or obscured by the solar rays or
in depression or in an inimical house, while no benefic
planets aspect or are associated with it, the astrologers
declare the total destruction of such a bhava. The lord
of the bhava concerned even in the event of being asso-
ciated with other planets is incapable of producing any
good effect.

दुःस्थाने वाऽरिगे मूढे दुर्बले भावनायके ।
भावस्य संपदं कर्तुं न शक्ता भावमाश्रिताः ॥ ८ ॥

Planets occupying a bhava cannot ad-
vance it when its lord is in a दुःस्थान (Duhsthana-6th,
8th or 12th place from it) or an inimical house or in a
state of eclipse or impotence

दुष्टस्थितो वाऽपि यदा नभोगः पापारिनीचांशकसंयुतो यः ।
खतुङ्गमित्रांशकराशियुक्तः शुभेक्षितो वा यदि शोभनः स्यात् ॥ ९॥

A planet may even be badly placed or
occupy a नवांश (Navamsa) owned by a malefic, inimical
or its own depression sign; it will nevertheless prove
beneficial when the Navatisa or Rasi occupied by it is
its own, or that of its exaltation sign or of a friendly
planet no less than when benefic planets aspect it.

भावेशाक्रान्तराशशि दुःस्थे भावस्य दुर्बलम् ।
स्वोच्चमित्रस्वराशिस्थे भावपुष्टि वदेङ्खधः ॥ १० ॥
When the lord of a bhava is in an afflicted Rasi, the bhava is weak. When in its own, exaltation, or friendly Rasi, the bhava gains strength, say the wise.

title: एकादशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 10-18
एकादशोऽध्यायः
713
Sloka 10. When the planet owning the sign
occupied by the lord of a bhava is badly placed, the
bhava becomes weak. But when the planet referred to
above is in its exaltation, in a friendly sign or in its
own house, the astrologer may pronounce the bhava to
be flourishing.
यद्भावलाभधनविक्रमराशियाता यद्भावनाथसुहृदश्च तदुखनाथः ।
तद्भावपुष्टिचलमम्बरचारिणस्ते कुर्वन्ति मूढरिपुनीचविवर्जिताश्चेत् ॥
Sloka 11. When the lord of a bhava, the friends
of the भावप (bhavapa) and the lord of the exaltation
sign of the, भावप (bhavapa) occupy the 11th, the 2nd
and the 3rd places in respect to the bhava, those planets
advance the strength of the bhava, provided they be
not eclipsed or in an unfriendly sign or in depression.
उत्तरपाराशर
केन्द्रे कोणत्रिलामे धनपतिभवने कारका भावनाथा
भावप्राप्तैर्यदा ते व्ययनिधन रिपुस्थास्तदीशा न दुःस्याः ।
भावप्राप्तिस्ततोऽपि व्ययरिपुनिधनेषूच्चमित्रस्वभावा-
दन्योन्यस्थास्तदीशाः खलु भवति महच्छ्रेय एवान्यथा स्यात् ॥
भावांशतुल्यः खलु वर्तमानभावोद्भवं पूर्णफलं विधत्ते ।
भावोनके चाभ्यधिके च खेटे त्रैराशिकेनात्र फलं विचार्यम् ॥ १२॥
Siska 12. A planet produces the full effect of the
bhava in which it is when its distance from the bhava-
sandhi is equal to that of the bhavamsa (भावांश = semi-
bhava). When the planet has a less or greater distance
from a bhava-sandhi than a bhavamsa, its effect must be
ascertained by a rule-of-three process.
NOTES.
This sloka is taken from श्रीपतिपद्धति (Sripatipaddhati).
90
verses:
Sloka 10. When the planet owning the sign
occupied by the lord of a bhava is badly placed, the
bhava becomes weak. But when the planet referred to
above is in its exaltation, in a friendly sign or in its
own house, the astrologer may pronounce the bhava to
be flourishing.

यद्भावलाभधनविक्रमराशियाता यद्भावनाथसुहृदश्च तदुखनाथः ।
तद्भावपुष्टिचलमम्बरचारिणस्ते कुर्वन्ति मूढरिपुनीचविवर्जिताश्चेत् ॥

Sloka 11. When the lord of a bhava, the friends
of the भावप (bhavapa) and the lord of the exaltation
sign of the, भावप (bhavapa) occupy the 11th, the 2nd
and the 3rd places in respect to the bhava, those planets
advance the strength of the bhava, provided they be
not eclipsed or in an unfriendly sign or in depression.

केन्द्रे कोणत्रिलामे धनपतिभवने कारका भावनाथा
भावप्राप्तैर्यदा ते व्ययनिधन रिपुस्थास्तदीशा न दुःस्याः ।
भावप्राप्तिस्ततोऽपि व्ययरिपुनिधनेषूच्चमित्रस्वभावा-
दन्योन्यस्थास्तदीशाः खलु भवति महच्छ्रेय एवान्यथा स्यात् ॥

भावांशतुल्यः खलु वर्तमानभावोद्भवं पूर्णफलं विधत्ते ।
भावोनके चाभ्यधिके च खेटे त्रैराशिकेनात्र फलं विचार्यम् ॥ १२॥

Siska 12. A planet produces the full effect of the
bhava in which it is when its distance from the bhava-
sandhi is equal to that of the bhavamsa (भावांश = semi-
bhava). When the planet has a less or greater distance
from a bhava-sandhi than a bhavamsa, its effect must be
ascertained by a rule-of-three process.

title: लग्नभावफलम्
content:
714
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. XI.
॥ अथ लग्नभावफलम् ॥
शरीरवर्णाकृतिलक्षणानि यशोगुणस्थानसुखासुखानि ।
प्रवासतेजोबलदुर्बलानि फलानि लग्नस्य वदन्ति सन्तः ॥ १३ ॥
Sloka 13. The body, its hue, its form, its charac
teristics, fame, qualities, happiness or unhappiness,
residence abroad, splendour, strength and weakness are
the products, say the wise astrologers, of the 1st bhava.
NOTES.
This sloka appears in जातकरल The third पाद (Pada) reads thus:
प्रवास चिन्ताबलदुर्बलानि.
नरश्चिरायुर्नृपपूजितः सुखी लग्नं भवेत् सौम्यगृहं यथा तथा ।
लभं यदि स्वामिनिरीक्षितं धनी कुशाग्रबुद्धिः कुलकीर्तिवर्द्धनः १४
Sloka 14. The more auspicious the rising sign is
at a person's birth, the longer will he live; the more
will he command the respect of the rulers and the
happier in consequence will he be. And if the rising
sign be also aspected by its lord, he will be a master of
riches, quite a genius and a great credit to his family.
NOTES.
The following additional information regarding length of life
is extracted from उत्तरपाराशर
लग्ने लग्नेशचन्द्रे शशिभवनपतौ स्वोच्चगे वापि मित्रे
चायुः पूर्ण च तस्मिन्नदितमतिशुभैर्वीक्षिते वापि युक्ते ।
किश्चिन्यूनं यदेकं त्वशुभगृहयुतं मध्यमायुः समत्वे
ह्यत्यल्पायुस्तथोक्तं दृढमतिविबुधैः पापचाहुल्ययोगात् ॥
लग्नाष्टाधीशकृत्तौ स्वभवनसुहृदन्योन्यतुङ्गाधिरूढौ
दृष्टौ वा शोभनेनाप्यथ यदि मिलितौ पूर्णमायुः शुभेन ।
तत्तद्भावेश जातिद्युतिसुखतनुवर्णादिमाः संपदः स्युः
verses:
शरीरवर्णाकृतिलक्षणानि यशोगुणस्थानसुखासुखानि ।
प्रवासतेजोबलदुर्बलानि फलानि लग्नस्य वदन्ति सन्तः ॥ १३ ॥

The body, its hue, its form, its characteristics, fame, qualities, happiness or unhappiness, residence abroad, splendour, strength and weakness are the products, say the wise astrologers, of the 1st bhava.
नरश्चिरायुर्नृपपूजितः सुखी लग्नं भवेत् सौम्यगृहं यथा तथा ।
लभं यदि स्वामिनिरीक्षितं धनी कुशाग्रबुद्धिः कुलकीर्तिवर्द्धनः १४

The more auspicious the rising sign is at a person's birth, the longer will he live; the more will he command the respect of the rulers and the happier in consequence will he be. And if the rising sign be also aspected by its lord, he will be a master of riches, quite a genius and a great credit to his family.
लग्ने लग्नेशचन्द्रे शशिभवनपतौ स्वोच्चगे वापि मित्रे
चायुः पूर्ण च तस्मिन्नदितमतिशुभैर्वीक्षिते वापि युक्ते ।
किश्चिन्यूनं यदेकं त्वशुभगृहयुतं मध्यमायुः समत्वे
ह्यत्यल्पायुस्तथोक्तं दृढमतिविबुधैः पापचाहुल्ययोगात् ॥

लग्नाष्टाधीशकृत्तौ स्वभवनसुहृदन्योन्यतुङ्गाधिरूढौ
दृष्टौ वा शोभनेनाप्यथ यदि मिलितौ पूर्णमायुः शुभेन ।
तत्तद्भावेश जातिद्युतिसुखतनुवर्णादिमाः संपदः स्युः

title: एकादशोऽध्यायः
content:
715 एकादशोऽध्यायः

Sloka 15. An astrologer may declare the nature
and peculiar features of a person from the lord of the
rising Navamsa at his birth or from a powerful planet
occupying the Lagna. His hue should be guessed from
the lord of the Navamsa occupied by the Moon. All
verses: साम्येऽल्पं पापिनः स्यात्फलमशुभबहुत्वे फलं वैपरीत्यम् ॥

लग्नेशे परमोच्चगे शुभयुते लग्ने च तद्वैक्षिते
चान्द्रेयादिशुमेन वीक्षितयुते पूर्णायुर्वदेत् ।

परमोच्चगते विलग्नाथे तनुभावे शुभखेचरेण दृष्टे ।
उडुपे शुभसंयुते च दृष्टे शतायुः प्रवदन्ति बुद्धिमन्तः ॥

लग्नाधीशस्य तु शनिः शत्रुश्चाल्पायुरादिशेत् ।
समत्वे मध्यमं प्रोक्तं मित्रे दीर्घायुरादिशेत् ॥

मन्देन्दुदृष्टमकर्मालग्नभवनाधीशा मिथस्खोच्चगाः
मित्रस्थानगता विलोकितगृहा दृष्टाः शुभैर्वा युताः ।
आयुः पुष्कलमीषदूनमशुभैरेको युतः पापिनां
साम्ये मध्यममायुरल्पमधिकैः पापैर्वदन्ति क्रमात् ॥

लग्नेशो बलवान्दिवाकरसुतः स्वान्योन्यमित्रोच्चगौ
तौ पापैखवलोकितमवियुतौ चान्द्रं च लग्नं तथा ।
एतेषां च बलाबलं समवलोकयायुः परीक्षार्थिनः
त्वायुर्मध्यमित्युदारतनयो विन्दन्ति जातस्य हि ॥

उत्तमं मित्रवर्गं स्यात्समशत्रु च मध्यमम् ।
अधमं शत्रुमित्रत्वं शत्रुवर्गन्तु मारणम् ॥

लग्नांशपादीर्यतग्रहाद्वा तनौ स्वरूपाकृतिलक्षणानि ।
वर्णं वदेच्चान्द्रनवांशनाथाद्विलग्नभात्सर्वशुभाशुभानि ॥ १५ ॥

confidence.reasoning: Dense Sanskrit text with complex rules for longevity accurately extracted.

content:
716
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. XI.
good and evil in the life of the person is to be ascertain-
ed through the Lagna.
cf. III-76 supra.
NOTES.
त्रिकोणकेन्द्रे यदि लग्ननाथे शुभान्विते शोभनवीक्षिते वा ।
शुभग्रहागारमते बलाढ्ये चतुःसमुद्रान्तयशः समेति ॥ १६ ॥
Sloka 16. If at a person's birth the lord of the
rising sign being in great strength in the house of a
benefic planet occupy a Kendra or Trikona position
from the Lagna and be aspected by or associated with
auspicious planets, the fame of the person born will
extend up to the four oceans.
NOTES.
This sloka appears in जातकरल. The reading there is शुभग्रहैर्मानगते
for शुभग्रहागारगते.
cf. also the following sloka from the same work.
लग्नाधिपे शुभयुते यदि तुङ्गम। गे केन्द्रत्रिकोणसहिते शुभदृष्टियुक्ते ।
कर्माधिपेन सहिते यदि वा स्वगेहे सद्भावकीर्तिधनधान्यचिरायुरेति ॥
होराधिनाथे रिपुरन्ध्ररिः के पापान्विते पापनिरीक्षिते वा ।
पापग्रहाणां भवनोपयाते जातोऽप्रकाशो भवतीह मर्त्यः ॥ १७॥
Sloka 17. A person becomes obscure if, at his
birth, the lord of the rising sign being in the house of a
malefic planet, occupies the 6th, 8th or 12th place from
the Lagna and is aspected by or associated with a
malignant planet.
NOTES.
For the first पाद, जातकरल reads लग्नेश्वरे रन्ध्रगते च दृष्टे.
कीर्तिस्थानपतौ विलग्नभवने जातः स्वयं कीर्तिमान्
वित्तस्थे तु विशेषकीर्तिसहितः खोच्चादिवर्गान्विते ।
verses:
त्रिकोणकेन्द्रे यदि लग्ननाथे शुभान्विते शोभनवीक्षिते वा ।
शुभग्रहागारमते बलाढ्ये चतुःसमुद्रान्तयशः समेति ॥

If at a person's birth the lord of the
rising sign being in great strength in the house of a
benefic planet occupy a Kendra or Trikona position
from the Lagna and be aspected by or associated with
auspicious planets, the fame of the person born will
extend up to the four oceans.
लग्नाधिपे शुभयुते यदि तुङ्गम। गे केन्द्रत्रिकोणसहिते शुभदृष्टियुक्ते ।
कर्माधिपेन सहिते यदि वा स्वगेहे सद्भावकीर्तिधनधान्यचिरायुरेति ॥

होराधिनाथे रिपुरन्ध्ररिः के पापान्विते पापनिरीक्षिते वा ।
पापग्रहाणां भवनोपयाते जातोऽप्रकाशो भवतीह मर्त्यः ॥

A person becomes obscure if, at his
birth, the lord of the rising sign being in the house of a
malefic planet, occupies the 6th, 8th or 12th place from
the Lagna and is aspected by or associated with a
malignant planet.
कीर्तिस्थानपतौ विलग्नभवने जातः स्वयं कीर्तिमान्
वित्तस्थे तु विशेषकीर्तिसहितः खोच्चादिवर्गान्विते ।

title: एकादशोऽध्यायः
content:
SI. 18-19
एकादशोऽध्यायः
717
दुःस्ये चञ्चलयात्रया हततनुर्जातोऽथवा दुर्जनः
केन्द्रे कोणगते शुभग्रहयुते यात्रासुखं जायते ॥ १८ ॥
Sloka 18. If the lord of the कीर्तिभाव (Keerthibha-
va), i.c. the 10th be in the Lagna, the person born will
become famous. If the planet be in the 2nd bhava and
have attained its exaltation and other benefic vargas he
will have remarkable celebrity. If the planet be in a
bad place, he will be knocked up by ceaseless travelling
or will be a knave. But if the planet occupy a Kendra
or Trikona in conjunction with a benefic planet, the
person will have ease in travelling.
NOTES.
This sloka finds a place in जातकरल.
होरास्वामिनि पश्चमे यदि सुतस्थानेशयुक्तेऽथवा
भाग्ये वा यदि भाग्यपेन सहिते लने यशस्वी पिता ।
भ्रातृस्थानपतौ विलग्नगृहगे तत्कारकभ्रातृपा-
वेकस्यौ बलशालिनौ च यदि वा तत्सोदरः कीर्तिमान् १९
Sloka 19. If the lord of the 1st bhava occupy the
5th or the 9th or being in conjunction with the lord of
the 5th or the 9th occupy the Lagna, the father of the
person born will be a famous man. If the lord of the
3rd bhava be in the Lagna or the कारक (Karaka-Mars) as
well as the lord of the भ्रातृभाव (Bhratrubhava) be together
in one house and possess strength, a brother of the
person born will become renowned.
NOTES.
For the latter half of this sloka, जातकरल has the following:
लग्नेशे स्थिरमे शुभग्रहयुते सौम्यग्रहैर्मूर्धगे
जातः सर्वसुखं धनं च बहुलं संप्राप्नुयात्तैर्युतः ॥
verses:
दुःस्ये चञ्चलयात्रया हततनुर्जातोऽथवा दुर्जनः
केन्द्रे कोणगते शुभग्रहयुते यात्रासुखं जायते ॥

If the lord of the कीर्तिभाव (Keerthibha-
va), i.e. the 10th be in the Lagna, the person born will
become famous. If the planet be in the 2nd bhava and
have attained its exaltation and other benefic vargas he
will have remarkable celebrity. If the planet be in a
bad place, he will be knocked up by ceaseless travelling
or will be a knave. But if the planet occupy a Kendra
or Trikona in conjunction with a benefic planet, the
person will have ease in travelling.
होरास्वामिनि पश्चमे यदि सुतस्थानेशयुक्तेऽथवा
भाग्ये वा यदि भाग्यपेन सहिते लने यशस्वी पिता ।
भ्रातृस्थानपतौ विलग्नगृहगे तत्कारकभ्रातृपा-
वेकस्यौ बलशालिनौ च यदि वा तत्सोदरः कीर्तिमान्

If the lord of the 1st bhava occupy the
5th or the 9th or being in conjunction with the lord of
the 5th or the 9th occupy the Lagna, the father of the
person born will be a famous man. If the lord of the
3rd bhava be in the Lagna or the कारक (Karaka-Mars) as
well as the lord of the भ्रातृभाव (Bhratrubhava) be together
in one house and possess strength, a brother of the
person born will become renowned.
लग्नेशे स्थिरमे शुभग्रहयुते सौम्यग्रहैर्मूर्धगे
जातः सर्वसुखं धनं च बहुलं संप्राप्नुयात्तैर्युतः ॥

content:
718
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. XI.
विद्याधिपे वा यदि चन्द्रसूनौ लग्ने सुखे लग्नपसंयुते वा ।
बलान्विते पापदृशा विहीने विद्यायशस्वी भवति प्रजातः ॥२०॥
Sloka 2) When the lord of the 2nd bhava or
Mercury is in the Lagna or when the 2nd bhava is occu-
pied by the lord of the Lagna and when the bhava in
either case is strong and free from malefic aspect, the
person born will become famous for his learning.
NOTES.
विद्याधिप (Vidyadhipa) here means the lord of the 2nd bhava;
(vide sloka 49 infra) and not that of the 4th bhava referred to in
XII-59 infra.
The same remark applies to the term मुख.
धर्मोदयेशौ नवमोदयस्थौ धर्मोदयस्थौ तनुधर्मपौ वा ।
सुरेन्द्रवन्द्येक्षितसंयुतौ चेत् समेति जातश्चिरकालभाग्यम् ॥२१॥
Sloka 21. If the lords of the 9th and the ist bha-
vas from the Lagna be in their respective bhavas or if
the lords of the 1st and the 9th occupy the 9th and the
1st respectively, and if the planets in their several
positions be aspected by or associated with Jupiter, the
person born will enjoy good luck for a long time.
लग्नाधिपस्य व्ययगे तदुचमित्रे सुहृत्तुङ्गखगोक्षते वा ।
तद्राशिगे वा यदि मित्रखेटे तस्य स्थितिर्जन्मवसुन्धरायाम् २२
Sloka 22. A person will abide in the place of his
birth when a planet occupying the 12th place from that
of the lord of the Lagna happens to be in exaltation or
in a friendly house or is aspected by a planet that is
friendly or is in exaltation or when that Rasi is occu-
pied by a friendly planet.
लग्नेशाज्ययपे विलग्नपरिपौ नीचेऽथवा दुर्बले
जातो याति विदेशमिष्टदनुजाचार्येण दृष्टे यदि ।
verses:
विद्याधिपे वा यदि चन्द्रसूनौ लग्ने सुखे लग्नपसंयुते वा ।
बलान्विते पापदृशा विहीने विद्यायशस्वी भवति प्रजातः ॥२०॥

When the lord of the 2nd bhava or
Mercury is in the Lagna or when the 2nd bhava is occu-
pied by the lord of the Lagna and when the bhava in
either case is strong and free from malefic aspect, the
person born will become famous for his learning.
धर्मोदयेशौ नवमोदयस्थौ धर्मोदयस्थौ तनुधर्मपौ वा ।
सुरेन्द्रवन्द्येक्षितसंयुतौ चेत् समेति जातश्चिरकालभाग्यम् ॥२१॥

If the lords of the 9th and the 1st bha-
vas from the Lagna be in their respective bhavas or if
the lords of the 1st and the 9th occupy the 9th and the
1st respectively, and if the planets in their several
positions be aspected by or associated with Jupiter, the
person born will enjoy good luck for a long time.
लग्नाधिपस्य व्ययगे तदुचमित्रे सुहृत्तुङ्गखगोक्षते वा ।
तद्राशिगे वा यदि मित्रखेटे तस्य स्थितिर्जन्मवसुन्धरायाम् २२

A person will abide in the place of his
birth when a planet occupying the 12th place from that
of the lord of the Lagna happens to be in exaltation or
in a friendly house or is aspected by a planet that is
friendly or is in exaltation or when that Rasi is occu-
pied by a friendly planet.
लग्नेशाज्ययपे विलग्नपरिपौ नीचेऽथवा दुर्बले
जातो याति विदेशमिष्टदनुजाचार्येण दृष्टे यदि ।

title: एकादशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 23-25
एकादशोऽध्यायः
719
तत्रैव स्थितिरन्त्यपे रविकरच्छन्ने विलग्नाधिपा-
दल्पग्रामचरो बलिन्यपि घनग्रामाधिवासो भवेत् ॥ २३ ॥
Sloka 23. When the lord of the 12th house from
that occupied by the lord of the Lagna is the latter's
enemy or is in depression or weak, the person born
goes to a foreign country. He will abide permanently
there if the व्ययप (Vyayapa) referred to above be aspected
by Venus in the capacity of a friend. His haunt will
be a small township if the same व्ययप (Vyayapa) be
eclipsed by the Sun; if the व्ययप (Vyayapa) be possessed
of strength, the haunt will be a wealthy municipality.
होरेश। ययपे विलनभवनात् केन्द्रत्रिकोणस्थिते
मित्रस्वोच्चगृहोपगे शुभयुते पार्श्वद्वये मानवः ।
चेतोरम्यमहीचरो दिविचराचार्येन्दुशुक्रेक्षिते
दिव्यक्षेत्रमुपैति जन्मघरणीवासस्तदर्थे रिपो ॥ २४ ॥
Sloka 24. When the lord of the 12th place from
that occupied by the lord of the lagna is in a Kendra or
Trikona from the 1st bhava, and in a Rasi which is a
friend's house, its own or its exaltation sign and has
auspicious planets on each side, the person born will be
a sojurner in regions pleasing to the heart. If the व्ययप
(Vyayapa) referred to above be aspected by Jupiter, the
Moon or Venus, he goes to a charmingly beautiful land;
but if this व्ययप (Vyayapa) occupy the 2nd place from
the lord of the Lagna and be unfriendly to the latter,
the person will abide in his native land.
विदेशभाग्यं चरमे विलने चरे तदीशे चरखेट दृष्टे ।
स्थिरे स्वदेशे बहुभाग्ययुक्तः स्थिरग्रहैर्भूरिधनान्वितः स्यात् ॥ २५ ॥
Sloka 25. When a moveable sign is the Lagna
verses:
तत्रैव स्थितिरन्त्यपे रविकरच्छन्ने विलग्नाधिपा-
दल्पग्रामचरो बलिन्यपि घनग्रामाधिवासो भवेत् ॥ २३ ॥

When the lord of the 12th house from
that occupied by the lord of the Lagna is the latter's
enemy or is in depression or weak, the person born
goes to a foreign country. He will abide permanently
there if the व्ययप (Vyayapa) referred to above be aspected
by Venus in the capacity of a friend. His haunt will
be a small township if the same व्ययप (Vyayapa) be
eclipsed by the Sun; if the व्ययप (Vyayapa) be possessed
of strength, the haunt will be a wealthy municipality.

होरेश। ययपे विलनभवनात् केन्द्रत्रिकोणस्थिते
मित्रस्वोच्चगृहोपगे शुभयुते पार्श्वद्वये मानवः ।
चेतोरम्यमहीचरो दिविचराचार्येन्दुशुक्रेक्षिते
दिव्यक्षेत्रमुपैति जन्मघरणीवासस्तदर्थे रिपो ॥ २४ ॥

When the lord of the 12th place from
that occupied by the lord of the lagna is in a Kendra or
Trikona from the 1st bhava, and in a Rasi which is a
friend's house, its own or its exaltation sign and has
auspicious planets on each side, the person born will be
a sojurner in regions pleasing to the heart. If the व्ययप
(Vyayapa) referred to above be aspected by Jupiter, the
Moon or Venus, he goes to a charmingly beautiful land;
but if this व्ययप (Vyayapa) occupy the 2nd place from
the lord of the Lagna and be unfriendly to the latter,
the person will abide in his native land.

विदेशभाग्यं चरमे विलने चरे तदीशे चरखेट दृष्टे ।
स्थिरे स्वदेशे बहुभाग्ययुक्तः स्थिरग्रहैर्भूरिधनान्वितः स्यात् ॥ २५ ॥
When a moveable sign is the Lagna

content:
720
आतकपारिजाते
Adh. XI.
and its lord is in a moveable Rasi and aspected by pla-
nets occupying moveable Rasis, the person born will
have his fortune in a foreign country. When an
immoveable sign is the Lagna and its lord is also in an
immoveable sign and aspected by planets occupying im-
moveable signs, the person will be in his own country,
exceedingly prosperous and possessed of abundant
wealth.
NOTES.
This sloka appears also in जातकरल.
होराधीशे पापखेटे रिपुस्थे पापक्षेत्रे भानुपुत्रेण युक्ते ।
शूद्रप्रायो राहुणा केतुना वा जातश्चाण्डालोऽथवा नीचतुल्यः ॥२६॥
Sloka 6. When the lord of the Lagna is a malefic
planet and occupies the 6th place from the Lagna being
associated with Saturn in a malefic sign, the person
born will be like a Sudra. And if Rahu or Ketu take
the place of Saturn in the above, the person will be a
Chandala or some equally low person in his habits.
लग्नाधिपे शोभनराशियुक्ते बलोपयाते तनुपुष्टिमेति ।
लग्नस्यखेटे रिपुनीचभागे दुःस्थानपे देहसुखं न याति ॥ २७ ॥
Sloka 27. When the lord of the Lagna is in an
auspicious sign and is possessed of strengh, the person
born will be in good ease having a command of all
bodily comforts. When the planet in the Lagna is in a
depression or inimical Navamsa and happens to be the
lord of a दुःस्थान (Dusthhana), the person born will lack
bodily comforts.
cf. जातकरल
लग्नेश्वरः क्रूरसमन्वितश्चेज्जातस्य सौख्यादि विनाशमेति ।
तादृकूफलं नाशगतेऽपि तस्य शुभेक्षितश्चेत्फलमन्यथा स्यात् ॥
verses:
होराधीशे पापखेटे रिपुस्थे पापक्षेत्रे भानुपुत्रेण युक्ते ।
शूद्रप्रायो राहुणा केतुना वा जातश्चाण्डालोऽथवा नीचतुल्यः ॥२६॥

Sloka 6. When the lord of the Lagna is a malefic
planet and occupies the 6th place from the Lagna being
associated with Saturn in a malefic sign, the person
born will be like a Sudra. And if Rahu or Ketu take
the place of Saturn in the above, the person will be a
Chandala or some equally low person in his habits.
लग्नाधिपे शोभनराशियुक्ते बलोपयाते तनुपुष्टिमेति ।
लग्नस्यखेटे रिपुनीचभागे दुःस्थानपे देहसुखं न याति ॥ २७ ॥

Sloka 27. When the lord of the Lagna is in an
auspicious sign and is possessed of strengh, the person
born will be in good ease having a command of all
bodily comforts. When the planet in the Lagna is in a
depression or inimical Navamsa and happens to be the
lord of a दुःस्थान (Dusthhana), the person born will lack
bodily comforts.
लग्नेश्वरः क्रूरसमन्वितश्चेज्जातस्य सौख्यादि विनाशमेति ।
तादृकूफलं नाशगतेऽपि तस्य शुभेक्षितश्चेत्फलमन्यथा स्यात् ॥

title: एकादशोऽध्यायः
content:
31. 29-30
एकादशोऽध्यायः
721
विलग्नदर्शी तनुषो बिलग्नगस्त्रयोऽपि षष्ठाष्टमरिःफराक्षिपाः ।
सपत्लनीचोपगताश्च दुर्बला यदि स्वपाके न फलं प्रक्कुर्युः ॥२८॥
Sloka 28. If the three planets owning the 6th,
the 8th and the 12th bhavas from the Lagna be connect-
ed with the Lagna, one of them aspecting it, another
owning it and the third occupying it, and if they at the
same time be in their inimical or depression signs devoid
of all strength, they can do no good at the time of the
ripening of their several dasa periods.
लग्ने जलर्भे शुभखेचेरन्द्रैर्युक्ते तनोः स्थौल्यमुदाहरन्ति ।
लमधिषे तोयखगे बलाढ्ये सौम्यान्विते तत्तनुपुष्टिमाहुः ॥ २९ ॥
Sloka 29. When the Lagna is a watery sign and
is occupied by benefic planets, astrologers declare stout.
ness of person as the effect thereof. When the lord of
the Lagna occupies a watery sign and is in conjunction
with benefic planets, the person born, say the astrologers,
will have a sound constitution.
NOTES.
तोयगते is the reading adopted in जातकरल for तोयखगे in the 3rd
पार of this sloka.
लमाधिपे नाशगते तु शुष्कराशौ तनोः कष्टमतीत्र कृच्छ्रम् ।
लग्नाधिपस्थांशपराशिनाथः शुष्कग्रहः स्यात्तनुशुष्कमाहुः ।। ३० ।।
Sloka 30. When the lord of the Lagna is in the
8th bhava and in a dry sign, astrologers say that the
person born will have great bodily suffering. If the
lord of the Rasi in which is the planet owning the
Navamsa occupied by the lord of the Lagna be a
planet owning a dry sign, the effect will be emaciation
NOTES.
Some books read लग्नांशपस्थांशपराशिनाथः
91
verses:
विलग्नदर्शी तनुषो बिलग्नगस्त्रयोऽपि षष्ठाष्टमरिःफराक्षिपाः ।
सपत्लनीचोपगताश्च दुर्बला यदि स्वपाके न फलं प्रक्कुर्युः ॥२८॥

If the three planets owning the 6th,
the 8th and the 12th bhavas from the Lagna be connect-
ed with the Lagna, one of them aspecting it, another
owning it and the third occupying it, and if they at the
same time be in their inimical or depression signs devoid
of all strength, they can do no good at the time of the
ripening of their several dasa periods.

लग्ने जलर्भे शुभखेचेरन्द्रैर्युक्ते तनोः स्थौल्यमुदाहरन्ति ।
लमधिषे तोयखगे बलाढ्ये सौम्यान्विते तत्तनुपुष्टिमाहुः ॥ २९ ॥

When the Lagna is a watery sign and
is occupied by benefic planets, astrologers declare stout-
ness of person as the effect thereof. When the lord of
the Lagna occupies a watery sign and is in conjunction
with benefic planets, the person born, say the astrologers,
will have a sound constitution.

लमाधिपे नाशगते तु शुष्कराशौ तनोः कष्टमतीत्र कृच्छ्रम् ।
लग्नाधिपस्थांशपराशिनाथः शुष्कग्रहः स्यात्तनुशुष्कमाहुः ।। ३० ।।

When the lord of the Lagna is in the
8th bhava and in a dry sign, astrologers say that the
person born will have great bodily suffering. If the
lord of the Rasi in which is the planet owning the
Navamsa occupied by the lord of the Lagna be a
planet owning a dry sign, the effect will be emaciation

content:
722
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. XI.
मध्यस्थे रिपुखेटयोस्तनुपतौ जातोऽरिभीतो भवेत्
केतौ लग्नगतेऽथवा फणिपतौ दुःस्थे विलनाधिपे ।
तत्पाके तदरीशचुक्तिसमये वैकल्यमङ्गे वदेत्
लग्ने शत्रुपतौ फणिध्वजयुते देहव्रणं देहिनाम् ॥ ३१ ॥
Sloka 31. When the lord of the Lagna is between
two inimical planets, the person born will be in dread
of enemies. If Ketu or Rahu be in the Lagna and the
lord thereof be in a दुःस्थान (Dusthhana 6th, 8th or 12th),
the person will suffer privation of some limb in the
ripening of the dasa of the lord of the Lagna and in the
antardasa of the lord of the 6th house (from the lord of
the Lagna). If the lord of the 6th house from the Lagna
occupy it in conjunction with Rahu or Ketu, an ulcer
will break out in the body.
NOTES.
This appears in जानकरल, In the 3rd पाद, तदीश is the reading
adopted there for तदरीथ in the text.
बलैर्विहीने यदि लग्ननाथे केन्द्रत्रिकोणे सति रोगभाक् स्यात् ।
लग्नेश्वराधिष्ठितराशिनाथे दुःस्थानगे दुर्बलदेहवान् स्यात् ॥ ३२ ॥
Sloka 32. If the lord of the Lagna occupying a
Trikona or a Kendra be devoid of strength, the person
born will be ailing. If the lord of the house occupied
by the lord of the Lagna be in a दुःस्थान (Dusthhana), he
will have a weak constitution.
NOTES.
(First half). The following yoga leading to the same effect
is given in जातकरल.
दुःस्थानपेनापि युतो विलग्ननाथो विलग्ने स तु रोगभाक् स्यात् ।|
सक्ररो देहपो देहसौख्यहान्त्यारिरन्ध्रगः ।
सारीशे देहपे दुःस्थे लग्नस्थे वाऽथ रोगवान् ॥ ३३ ॥
verses:
मध्यस्थे रिपुखेटयोस्तनुपतौ जातोऽरिभीतो भवेत्
केतौ लग्नगतेऽथवा फणिपतौ दुःस्थे विलनाधिपे ।
तत्पाके तदरीशचुक्तिसमये वैकल्यमङ्गे वदेत्
लग्ने शत्रुपतौ फणिध्वजयुते देहव्रणं देहिनाम् ॥ ३१ ॥

When the lord of the Lagna is between two inimical planets, the person born will be in dread of enemies. If Ketu or Rahu be in the Lagna and the lord thereof be in a दुःस्थान (Dusthhana 6th, 8th or 12th), the person will suffer privation of some limb in the ripening of the dasa of the lord of the Lagna and in the antardasa of the lord of the 6th house (from the lord of the Lagna). If the lord of the 6th house from the Lagna occupy it in conjunction with Rahu or Ketu, an ulcer will break out in the body.

बलैर्विहीने यदि लग्ननाथे केन्द्रत्रिकोणे सति रोगभाक् स्यात् ।
लग्नेश्वराधिष्ठितराशिनाथे दुःस्थानगे दुर्बलदेहवान् स्यात् ॥ ३२ ॥

If the lord of the Lagna occupying a Trikona or a Kendra be devoid of strength, the person born will be ailing. If the lord of the house occupied by the lord of the Lagna be in a दुःस्थान (Dusthhana), he will have a weak constitution.

दुःस्थानपेनापि युतो विलग्ननाथो विलग्ने स तु रोगभाक् स्यात् ।।
सक्ररो देहपो देहसौख्यहान्त्यारिरन्ध्रगः ।
सारीशे देहपे दुःस्थे लग्नस्थे वाऽथ रोगवान् ॥ ३३ ॥

If the lord of the Lagna is with a lord of a Dusthana, he will be prone to disease. If the lord of the body (Lagna lord) is in a Dusthana, or if the lord of the body is in the Lagna and is associated with a Dusthana lord, the person will be diseased.

title: एकादशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 33-35
एकादशोऽध्यायः
723
Sloka 33. 'The lord of the Lagna occupying the
12th, 6th or 8th bhava (from the Lagna) in conjunction
with a malefic planet destroys the bodily health of the
person born. He will be ailing if the lord of the 1st
bhava in conjunction with the lord of the 6th occupies
a दुःस्थान (Dusthhana) or the Lagna.
लग्ने सपापे लग्नेशे बलहीनेऽपि रोगवान् ।
लग्नेशे दुर्बलो कोपी निर्व्याधिः केन्द्रकोणगे ॥ ३४ ॥
Sloka 34. When a malefic planet is in the Lagna
and the lord thereof is without strength, the person
born will be sickly. He will be of a fretful temper if
the lord of the Lagna be weak; exempt from ailment if
the lord of the Lagna be in a Kendra or Trikona.
देहेशस्थितराशीशे नाशगे दुर्बलो भवेत् ।
भावेशाक्रान्तराशीशैर्दुः स्थैर्भावाश्च दुर्बलाः ॥ ३५ ॥
Sloka 35. If the lord of the sign occupied by the
lord of the Lagna be in the 8th place from the Lagna,
the person will be weak. Bhavas generally become
weak when their lords are in Rasis of which the owners
are badly placed (1.e. are in दुःस्थान Duhsthana).
सर्पारयोबृहद्धीजो योगे वा सर्पमन्दयोः ।
लग्ने कुजे नाभिगुल्फवृपणस्थौल्यमादिशेत् ।। ३६ ।।
Sloka 36. A person has an enlarged scrotum as
the consequence of the conjunction of Rahu and Mars
or of Rahu and Saturn. When Mars occupies the
Lagna, an astrologer may predict swelling in the navel,
ankle and in the testicles.
लग्नेशे यदि रिःफगे दिनकरस्थारातिनाथान्विते
जायावान् बहुरोमवान् कुशतनुः संरक्तगौरद्युतिः ।
verses:
The lord of the Lagna occupying the
12th, 6th or 8th bhava (from the Lagna) in conjunction
with a malefic planet destroys the bodily health of the
person born. He will be ailing if the lord of the 1st
bhava in conjunction with the lord of the 6th occupies
a दुःस्थान (Dusthhana) or the Lagna.

लग्ने सपापे लग्नेशे बलहीनेऽपि रोगवान् ।
लग्नेशे दुर्बलो कोपी निर्व्याधिः केन्द्रकोणगे ॥ ३४ ॥

When a malefic planet is in the Lagna
and the lord thereof is without strength, the person
born will be sickly. He will be of a fretful temper if
the lord of the Lagna be weak; exempt from ailment if
the lord of the Lagna be in a Kendra or Trikona.

देहेशस्थितराशीशे नाशगे दुर्बलो भवेत् ।
भावेशाक्रान्तराशीशैर्दुः स्थैर्भावाश्च दुर्बलाः ॥ ३५ ॥

If the lord of the sign occupied by the
lord of the Lagna be in the 8th place from the Lagna,
the person will be weak. Bhavas generally become
weak when their lords are in Rasis of which the owners
are badly placed (1.e. are in दुःस्थान Duhsthana).

सर्पारयोबृहद्धीजो योगे वा सर्पमन्दयोः ।
लग्ने कुजे नाभिगुल्फवृपणस्थौल्यमादिशेत् ।। ३६ ।।

A person has an enlarged scrotum as
the consequence of the conjunction of Rahu and Mars
or of Rahu and Saturn. When Mars occupies the
Lagna, an astrologer may predict swelling in the navel,
ankle and in the testicles.

लग्नेशे यदि रिःफगे दिनकरस्थारातिनाथान्विते
जायावान् बहुरोमवान् कुशतनुः संरक्तगौरद्युतिः ।

title: Adh. XI.
content:
724
जातकपारिनाते
Adh. XI.
लग्नर्भादरिनाथपेन च युते जातोऽसिताङ्गो यदा
साहौ लग्नपतौ तु वश्ञ्चनविषाद्भीतिं समेति ध्रुवम् ॥ ३७ ॥
Sloka 37. If the lord of the Lagna occupying the
12th bhava be in conjunction with the lord of the 6th
bhava from that occupied by the Sun, the person born
will get readily married, be characterized by much hair
about his person, have a slim figure and a hue composed
of red and white. If the lord of the 6th bhava from the
Lagna be also in conjunction with the lord of the Lagna
in the above position, the person born will be dark in
personal appearance; but if Rahu be with the lord of
the Lagna, the person concerned will surely run the risk
of treachery or poison.
लग्ने शुभे शोभनदृष्टियुक्त बाल्यात्सुखं तन्नहि पापयोगात् ।
दुःखी भवेत्पापबहुत्वयोगे लग्ने तु बाल्यान्मरणान्तमाहुः ॥ ३८ ॥
Sloka 33. A person will be happy from his child-
hood when the Lagna is auspicious and is aspected by
benefic planets provided there are no malefic ones in
the Lagna. But if several malefic planets should be in
the Lagna, the person born will be unhappy from first
to last.
देवलोकांशगे शुक्रे लग्नेशे गोपुरांश के ।
लग्ने शुभग्रहै दृष्टे मध्यान्ते सौख्यमाप्नुयात् ॥ ३९ ॥
Sloka 39. A person will be happy in the middle
and concluding portions of his life if, at the time of his
birth, Venus has attained Devalokamsa (vide Adhyaya 1.
Sl. 46), the lord of the Lagna a Gopuramsa (vide Adhya-
ya I. Sl. 45) and benefic planets aspect the rising sign.
verses:
लग्नर्भादरिनाथपेन च युते जातोऽसिताङ्गो यदा
साहौ लग्नपतौ तु वश्ञ्चनविषाद्भीतिं समेति ध्रुवम् ॥ ३७ ॥

If the lord of the Lagna occupying the
12th bhava be in conjunction with the lord of the 6th
bhava from that occupied by the Sun, the person born
will get readily married, be characterized by much hair
about his person, have a slim figure and a hue composed
of red and white. If the lord of the 6th bhava from the
Lagna be also in conjunction with the lord of the Lagna
in the above position, the person born will be dark in
personal appearance; but if Rahu be with the lord of
the Lagna, the person concerned will surely run the risk
of treachery or poison.

लग्ने शुभे शोभनदृष्टियुक्त बाल्यात्सुखं तन्नहि पापयोगात् ।
दुःखी भवेत्पापबहुत्वयोगे लग्ने तु बाल्यान्मरणान्तमाहुः ॥ ३८ ॥

A person will be happy from his child-
hood when the Lagna is auspicious and is aspected by
benefic planets provided there are no malefic ones in
the Lagna. But if several malefic planets should be in
the Lagna, the person born will be unhappy from first
to last.

देवलोकांशगे शुक्रे लग्नेशे गोपुरांश के ।
लग्ने शुभग्रहै दृष्टे मध्यान्ते सौख्यमाप्नुयात् ॥ ३९ ॥

A person will be happy in the middle
and concluding portions of his life if, at the time of his
birth, Venus has attained Devalokamsa (vide Adhyaya 1.
Sl. 46), the lord of the Lagna a Gopuramsa (vide Adhya-
ya I. Sl. 45) and benefic planets aspect the rising sign.

title: एकादशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 40-44
एकादशोऽध्यायः
725
लग्ने शुभे धने पापे केन्द्रे पापसमन्विते ।
लग्नेश्वरे तूत्तमांशे चादौ दुःखं ततः सुखम् ॥ ४० ॥
Sloka 40. When there is a benefic planet in the
1st bhava, but a malefic one in the 2nd as well as in a
Kendra, and when the lord of the Lagna has attained the
Uttamamsa, the person born suffers misery in early life
and is happy thereafter.
लग्नेशे शुभराशिस्थे शुभग्रहनिरीक्षिते ।
गोपुरांशगते वाऽपि षोडशाब्दात्परं सुखम् ॥ ४१ ॥
Sloka 41. When the lord of the Lagna occupies a
benefic sign and is aspected by a benefic planet or has
attained a Gopuramsa, the person born will be happy
after his 16th year.
लग्नेशस्यांशनाथे तु केन्द्रकोणोच्चसंयुते ।
लाभे वा बलसंयुक्ते त्रिंशद्वर्षात्परं सुखम् ॥ ४२ ॥
Sloka 42. When the planet owning the Navamsa
occupied by the lord of the Lagna is in a Kendra, a
Trikona or exaltation, or is in the 11th bhava possessed
of strength, the person born will be happy after the
first 30 years of his life.
लग्ने रव्यादिसंदृष्टे पादशः फलमुच्यते ।
राजसेवी पितृधनो जलपण्यो महाधनः ॥ ४३ ॥
धार्मिकः स्थूलशिश्नः स्याद्विद्याशिल्पयशोन्वितः ।
राजपूज्यो व्रतयुतो वेश्यासक्तो धनी सुखी ॥ ४४ ॥
Slokas 43-44. When the Lagna is aspected by the
Sun and other planets, the effect in the several cases on
the person born is given in order in the sloka-quarters
that follow: If the Sun be the aspecting planet, the
verses:
लग्ने शुभे धने पापे केन्द्रे पापसमन्विते ।
लग्नेश्वरे तूत्तमांशे चादौ दुःखं ततः सुखम् ॥

When there is a benefic planet in the
1st bhava, but a malefic one in the 2nd as well as in a
Kendra, and when the lord of the Lagna has attained the
Uttamamsa, the person born suffers misery in early life
and is happy thereafter.
लग्नेशे शुभराशिस्थे शुभग्रहनिरीक्षिते ।
गोपुरांशगते वाऽपि षोडशाब्दात्परं सुखम् ॥

When the lord of the Lagna occupies a
benefic sign and is aspected by a benefic planet or has
attained a Gopuramsa, the person born will be happy
after his 16th year.
लग्नेशस्यांशनाथे तु केन्द्रकोणोच्चसंयुते ।
लाभे वा बलसंयुक्ते त्रिंशद्वर्षात्परं सुखम् ॥

When the planet owning the Navamsa
occupied by the lord of the Lagna is in a Kendra, a
Trikona or exaltation, or is in the 11th bhava possessed
of strength, the person born will be happy after the
first 30 years of his life.
लग्ने रव्यादिसंदृष्टे पादशः फलमुच्यते ।
राजसेवी पितृधनो जलपण्यो महाधनः ॥

धार्मिकः स्थूलशिश्नः स्याद्विद्याशिल्पयशोन्वितः ।
राजपूज्यो व्रतयुतो वेश्यासक्तो धनी सुखी ॥

When the Lagna is aspected by the
Sun and other planets, the effect in the several cases on
the person born is given in order in the sloka-quarters
that follow: If the Sun be the aspecting planet, the

content:
726
जातकपारिजातेः
Adh. XI.
person born will serve a king and inherit wealth from
his father; if the Moon, he will engage in sea-borne
trade and be opulent; if Mars, he will be virtuous and
have a big membrum virile; if Mercury, he will have
learning, artistic skill and fame; if Jupiter, he will be
honored by his sovereign and devoutly observant of
religious vows; if Venus, he will be addicted to women
of ill-fame, opulent and voluptuous.
मन्ददृष्टे विलग्ने तु वृद्धस्त्रीको मली खलः ।
केनाप्यदृष्टं लग्नं चेद्राशिग्रहवशाद्वदेत् ॥ ४५ ॥
Sloka 45. If Saturn aspects the Lagna, he will
have aged wives, will be unclean and be mischief-making.
If no planet aspect the Lagna, the astrologer should
make his prediction in accordance with the planet
connected with the लप्नराशि (Lagna Rasi).
लग्ने खामीक्षिते राजा तत्प्रियो वा धनी सुखी ।
सौम्येक्षितेऽखिलं सौम्यं पापदृष्टे त्वशोभनम् ॥ ४६ ॥
Sloka 46. When the Lagna is aspected by its lord,
the person born will be either a king or his favorite,
wealthy and well-off. If the Lagna be aspected by an
auspicious planet, all will be auspicious. If by an evil
planet, everything will turn out ill.
सुखी लग्ने ड्यादिदृष्टे सर्वदृष्टे नृपो भवेत् ।
लग्ने त्रयः शुभा राजा दुःखी पापग्रहास्त्रयः ॥ ४७ ॥
Sloka 47. When the Lagna is aspected by two or
more benefic planets, the person born is happy. When
it is aspected by all the benefic planets, he will be a king.
When there are three benefic planets in the Lagna, the
effect on the person born is, he will make a good king.
verses:
मन्ददृष्टे विलग्ने तु वृद्धस्त्रीको मली खलः ।
केनाप्यदृष्टं लग्नं चेद्राशिग्रहवशाद्वदेत् ॥

If Saturn aspects the Lagna, he will
have aged wives, will be unclean and be mischief-making.
If no planet aspect the Lagna, the astrologer should
make his prediction in accordance with the planet
connected with the लप्नराशि (Lagna Rasi).

लग्ने खामीक्षिते राजा तत्प्रियो वा धनी सुखी ।
सौम्येक्षितेऽखिलं सौम्यं पापदृष्टे त्वशोभनम् ॥

When the Lagna is aspected by its lord,
the person born will be either a king or his favorite,
wealthy and well-off. If the Lagna be aspected by an
auspicious planet, all will be auspicious. If by an evil
planet, everything will turn out ill.

सुखी लग्ने ड्यादिदृष्टे सर्वदृष्टे नृपो भवेत् ।
लग्ने त्रयः शुभा राजा दुःखी पापग्रहास्त्रयः ॥

When the Lagna is aspected by two or
more benefic planets, the person born is happy. When
it is aspected by all the benefic planets, he will be a king.
When there are three benefic planets in the Lagna, the
effect on the person born is, he will make a good king.

title: अथ द्वितीयभावफलम्
content:
SL 48-50
एकादसीऽध्यायः
727
If there be three malefic planets in the Lagna, he wi'l be
unhappy.
लग्नाधिपोऽतिबलवानशु भैर दृष्टः
केन्द्रस्थितः शुभखगैरवलोक्यमानः ।
मृत्युं विधूय विदधाति स दीर्घमायुः
सार्धं गुणैर्बहुभिरूर्जितराजलक्ष्म्या ॥ ४८ ॥
Sloka 48. The lord of the rising sign when pos-
sessed of great strength and unaspected by malefic
planets, but aspected by benefic ones and occupying a
Kendra position wards off death and secures to the
child long life graced with the strong virtues of a vigo-
rous sovereignty.
NOTES.
See Adhyaya IV. Sloka 83, supra.
॥ अथ द्वितीयभावफलम् ॥
वित्तं नेत्रं सुखं विद्या वाकुटुम्बाशनानि च ।
द्वितीयस्थानजन्यानि क्रमाज्ज्योतिर्विदो विदुः ॥ ४९ ॥
Sloka 49. Wealth, visual power, ease, learning,
speech, household and food-these, the astrologers re-
cognise as regularly derivable from the 2nd bhava.
वित्तायोदयराशयः पतियुता वित्ताधिको जायते
लाभस्थौ धनलाभपौ निजसुहृत्तुङ्गादिगौ चेत्तथा ।
तद्वल्लाभधनाधिपौ तनुगतावन्योन्यमिष्टग्रहौ
लग्नेशे धनलाभराशिपयुते लग्ने बहुद्रव्यवान् ॥ ५० ॥
Sloka 50. A person will have exceeding wealth
(1) when the 2nd, the 11th and the 1st bhavas in his
horoscope are occupied by their lords; (2) when the
verses:
लग्नाधिपोऽतिबलवानशु भैर दृष्टः
केन्द्रस्थितः शुभखगैरवलोक्यमानः ।
मृत्युं विधूय विदधाति स दीर्घमायुः
सार्धं गुणैर्बहुभिरूर्जितराजलक्ष्म्या ॥

The lord of the rising sign when pos-
sessed of great strength and unaspected by malefic
planets, but aspected by benefic ones and occupying a
Kendra position wards off death and secures to the
child long life graced with the strong virtues of a vigo-
rous sovereignty.

वित्तं नेत्रं सुखं विद्या वाकुटुम्बाशनानि च ।
द्वितीयस्थानजन्यानि क्रमाज्ज्योतिर्विदो विदुः ॥

Wealth, visual power, ease, learning,
speech, household and food-these, the astrologers re-
cognise as regularly derivable from the 2nd bhava.

वित्तायोदयराशयः पतियुता वित्ताधिको जायते
लाभस्थौ धनलाभपौ निजसुहृत्तुङ्गादिगौ चेत्तथा ।
तद्वल्लाभधनाधिपौ तनुगतावन्योन्यमिष्टग्रहौ
लग्नेशे धनलाभराशिपयुते लग्ने बहुद्रव्यवान् ॥

A person will have exceeding wealth
(1) when the 2nd, the 11th and the 1st bhavas in his
horoscope are occupied by their lords; (2) when the

content:
728
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. XI.
lords of the 2nd and the 11th bhavas are in the 11th
bhava and happen to be in स्वक्षेत्र (Swakshetra), मित्रश्लेष
(Mithrakshetra) or in exaltation; (3) when the lords of
the 11th and the 2nd bhavas, being friendly planets,
occupy the Lagna and lastly (4) when the lord of the
Lagna is in it in conjunction with the lords of the 2nd
and the 11th bhavas.
NOTES.
This sloka is also in जातकरले.
The following wealth-producing yogas are extracted from
(1) उत्तरपाराशर
मावैश्चतुर्भिर्बलिभिर्धनभाग्यायकर्मभिः ।
संपूर्णवित्तः सततं कुबेरभुव जायते ॥
कर्मायस्वशुमेश्वरा रिपुमृतिप्रान्त्यान्विहाय स्थिता
लग्नाद्वा यदि वा मिथोपि धनिको जायेत मर्त्यः शतैः ।
साहस्त्रैरपि चेद्विधायमयुतैः सम्वन्धिताधेग्मिथः
स्वक्षेत्रोच्चपरस्पराश्रयतया लक्षैश्च कोट्यापि वा ॥
धनेशञ्चिषणौ परस्परसुहृत्स्वतुङ्गस्थितौ
शुमेन यदि वीक्षितौ शुभयुतौ धनं पुष्कलम् ।
ऋतं मधुरया गिरा वरकुटुम्बमेतद्भवे-
दशद्भिरपि मिश्रिते तदधिके फलं पूर्ववत् ॥.
कर्यायस्वशुभेश्वरा रिपुमृतिप्रान्तेषु लमस्य वा
यद्वान्योन्यमकिञ्चनो भवतु ते स्वायत्रिमा द्रव्यवान् ।
संख्यायां यदि ते पणैश्च नवभिः केन्द्रत्रिकोणस्थिता
श्वक्रैस्तावदुदीर्यते नवतिभिस्ते तु प्रसक्ता मिथः ॥
मित्वस्वस्थितयो यदा बहुशतैरुच्चस्वभावस्थिता
साहखैरयुतानिपोषि मिलितास्तत्रैव लक्षाधिपाः ।
अन्योन्यो बसुहृत्रिमप्रवटिनः कोट्यादिभिः संख्यया
verses:
मावैश्चतुर्भिर्बलिभिर्धनभाग्यायकर्मभिः ।
संपूर्णवित्तः सततं कुबेरभुव जायते ॥
When the lords of the 4th, 9th, 10th and 11th houses are strong, the native becomes possessed of abundant wealth, like Kubera.

कर्मायस्वशुमेश्वरा रिपुमृतिप्रान्त्यान्विहाय स्थिता
लग्नाद्वा यदि वा मिथोपि धनिको जायेत मर्त्यः शतैः ।
साहस्त्रैरपि चेद्विधायमयुतैः सम्वन्धिताधेग्मिथः
स्वक्षेत्रोच्चपरस्पराश्रयतया लक्षैश्च कोट्यापि वा ॥

If the lords of the Karma, wealth and auspicious houses, excluding the lords of the 6th, 8th and 12th houses, are well-placed, the native becomes wealthy by hundreds of thousands. If they are related to each other, or occupy their own or exaltation signs, or mutually support each other, the native becomes wealthy by lakhs and crores.

धनेशञ्चिषणौ परस्परसुहृत्स्वतुङ्गस्थितौ
शुमेन यदि वीक्षितौ शुभयुतौ धनं पुष्कलम् ।
ऋतं मधुरया गिरा वरकुटुम्बमेतद्भवे-
दशद्भिरपि मिश्रिते तदधिके फलं पूर्ववत् ॥

If the lords of the 10th and 9th houses are friendly to each other, occupy their own or exaltation signs, and are aspected or conjunct with benefics, the native gets abundant wealth. If they are mixed with malefics, the results will be as before, but with more wealth.

कर्यायस्वशुभेश्वरा रिपुमृतिप्रान्तेषु लमस्य वा
यद्वान्योन्यमकिञ्चनो भवतु ते स्वायत्रिमा द्रव्यवान् ।
संख्यायां यदि ते पणैश्च नवभिः केन्द्रत्रिकोणस्थिता
श्वक्रैस्तावदुदीर्यते नवतिभिस्ते तु प्रसक्ता मिथः ॥

If the lords of the 10th, wealth and auspicious houses, excluding the lords of the 6th, 8th and 12th houses, are in conjunction with the Lagna lord, or with each other, the native becomes wealthy. If they are in the 9th house, or in Kendra or Trikona, and are associated with the 9th lord, the native becomes wealthy by ninety lakhs.

मित्वस्वस्थितयो यदा बहुशतैरुच्चस्वभावस्थिता
साहखैरयुतानिपोषि मिलितास्तत्रैव लक्षाधिपाः ।
अन्योन्यो बसुहृत्रिमप्रवटिनः कोट्यादिभिः संख्यया

If the lords of the 10th and 11th houses are in their own signs or exaltation, and are associated with benefics, the native becomes a millionaire. If they are related to each other, they become wealthy by crores.

title: एकादशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 51
एकादशोऽध्यायः
729
जायेतैव स मूतले खलु पुमान् योगैश्च सर्वोन्नतैः ॥
धनेशः पापी चेद्भवति हि यदा तस्य तु दशा
तदा राडर्कीर्किक्षितितनय मुक्तौ धनपतिः ।
निरोधः पापेनाप्युत धनपतिस्थोपि सहितो
धने वा पापी स्यादनुक्लनिरोधोर्थविहितिः ॥
(2) जातकरल
लग्नेश्वरस्थांशपतिस्थरा शिनाथस्थितांशाधिपतौ बलाढ्ये ।
वैशेषिकांशे यदि तुङ्गभागे धनाधिपे त्वर्थत्रतां वरोऽसौ ॥
लग्नेश्वरेण सहिते धनराशिनाथे केन्द्रस्थिते परमतुङ्गनवांशके च ।
वैशेषिकांशकयुते शुभदृष्टियुक्ते योगे बहुत्वधनलाभमिहाद्दुरार्याः ॥
वित्तेश्वरेण सहिते भवराशिनाथे कर्माधिपस्थनवभागपदृष्टियुक्ते ।
वैशेषिकांशकयुते परमोच्चभागे योगे बहुत्वधनलाभमिहाडुरार्याः ॥
कर्माधिपेन सहिते धनराशिनाथे लग्नेश्वरस्थितनवांशपतीश्वरेण ।
दृष्टे चतुष्टयगते शुभदृष्टियोगे जातो बहुत्वधनलाभमुपैति बाल्ये ॥
लग्नार्थलाभभवने शुभखेचरेन्द्रे स्वोच्चे सुहृत्स्वगृहगैत्र विशेषिकांशे ।
तुङ्गांशगे धनपतिस्थनवांशनाथे दृष्टे बहुत्वधनलाभमुपैति बाल्ये ॥
लग्नेश्वर धनगते धनपस्तु लाभे लामेश्वर धनगते बलपूर्ण युक्ते ।
स्वोच्चस्वमित्रभवने शुभसंयुते वा जातः स्ववीर्यधनमेति बहुप्रकारैः ॥
सर्वग्रहेष्वतिबली यदि लग्ननायः केन्द्रस्थितस्त्रिदशपूजितसंयुतब्ध ।
वैशेषिकांशकयुते धनराशिनाथे वित्तं स्ववीर्यबलतोर्जितमाहुरार्याः ।।
लग्नेशसंयुतनवांशपतिस्थराशिनाथो बलेन सहितो धनपस्तु मित्रः ।
केन्द्रत्रिकोणसहिते स्वगृहेथवापि जातः स्वत्रीर्यवनमेति बहुप्रकारैः ॥
धनोपयातः प्रथमोर्थदर्शी ग्रहो द्वितीयो धनपस्तृतीयः ।
तत्पाकभुक्तौ धनलाभमेति क्रमेण तत्कारकवर्गमूलात् ॥ ५१ ॥
Sloka 51. Note first the planet occupying the 2nd
hava; next, the planet aspecting that bhava; thirdly,
92
