When Jupiter in his orbit passes through the sign represented by
this result or through one of its triangular ones, the acquisition
of a son is possible.

content:
830
आतकपारिजाते
Adh. XIII.
पुत्रेशकारकयुतेक्षक खेचराणां
तत्काल जस्फुटयुतां शकरा चियातौ ।
वागीशभानुतनयौ यदि गोचरेण
जातस्य पुत्रजनिमृत्युकरौ मवेताम् ॥ ५१ ॥
Sloka 51. If at any time Jupiter or Saturn moving
in their several orbits arrive at the Rasi and Navamsa
indicated by the total of the figures then for (1) the lord
of the 5th bhava, (2) its Karaka, (3) the planet occupy-
ing that bhava and (4) the one aspecting the same, they
will cause the birth or death respectively of a son to
the person concerned.
पितृस्थानेश्वरे सौम्ये कारके शुभसंयुते ।
भावे वा शुभसंयुक्ते पितृसौख्यं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ५२ ॥
Sloka 52. When the lord of the 5th bhava is
benefic and its Karaka or the bhava itself is associated
with an auspicious planet, the astrologer may announce
the happiness of the father.
NOTES,
It is not clear whether by the word पितृस्थान, the 5th or the 9th
bhava is meant. 'Parasara says " पितापि चिन्त्यो नवमे सुतर्क्ष" The open-
ing sloka of the present Adhyaya gives पितृ as चिन्त्य or ascertainable
from the 5th bhava. I accordingly interpret पितृस्थान as the 5th
bhava here being germane to the Adhyaya bearing on the 5th
bhava. The slokas 52-57 occur in सर्वार्थचिन्तामणि under the 9th
bhava. So पितृस्थान must mean the 5th as well as the 9th bhava.
पारावतादौ तद्माथे कारके च तथा स्थिते ।
स्वोच्चमित्रांशके वाऽपि पिठ्दीर्घायुरादिशेत् ॥ ५३ ॥
Sloka 53. When the lord of the 5th bhava has
attained a Paravathamsa or other higher Vaiseshikamsa
and the Karaka of the bhava occupies a similar position
verses:
If at any time Jupiter or Saturn moving
in their several orbits arrive at the Rasi and Navamsa
indicated by the total of the figures then for (1) the lord
of the 5th bhava, (2) its Karaka, (3) the planet occupy-
ing that bhava and (4) the one aspecting the same, they
will cause the birth or death respectively of a son to
the person concerned.

पितृस्थानेश्वरे सौम्ये कारके शुभसंयुते ।
भावे वा शुभसंयुक्ते पितृसौख्यं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ५२ ॥

When the lord of the 5th bhava is
benefic and its Karaka or the bhava itself is associated
with an auspicious planet, the astrologer may announce
the happiness of the father.

पारावतादौ तद्माथे कारके च तथा स्थिते ।
स्वोच्चमित्रांशके वाऽपि पिठ्दीर्घायुरादिशेत् ॥ ५३ ॥

When the lord of the 5th bhava has
attained a Paravathamsa or other higher Vaiseshikamsa
and the Karaka of the bhava occupies a similar position

title: त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः
content:
St. 45-57
त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः
or be in its own, exaltation or friendly amsas, the
astrologer may announce long life to the father.
क्ररनीचांशकस्थे वा भावनाथे च कारके ।
मन्दमान्द्यगुसंयुक्ते पितृदुःखं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ५४ ॥
Sloka 54. When the lord of the 5th bhava and
its Karaka is in a malefic or depression amsa and is in
conjunction with Saturn, Mandi or Rahu, the astrologer
may announce the father's unhappiness.
सौम्ये तदीश्वरे वाऽपि नीचमूढारिराशिगे ।
क्ररषष्ठयंशके वाऽपि पितृदुःखं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ५५ ॥
Sloku 55. If the lord of 5th bhava, even when
benefic, be in depression, eclipsed or in an inimical sign,
or in a malefic Shashtyamsa, the astrologer may pro-
nounce the father's unhappiness.
पितृकर्मगृहे जातः पितृतुल्यगुणान्वितः ।
पितृजन्मतृतीयर्थे जातः पितृवशानुगः ॥ ५६ ॥
Sloka 56. A person will have the characteristics
of the father when born in a Lagna corresponding to
the 10th bhava of his father. He will be dutiful to his
father when his rising sign corresponds to the 3rd bhava
in the father's horoscope.
पितृषष्ठाष्टमे जातः पितृशत्रर्भविष्यति ।
तद्भावपे विलग्नस्थे पितृश्रेष्ठो भवेत् सुतः ॥ ५७ ॥
Sloka 57. When the rising sign corresponds to
the 6th or the 8th bhava in the father's horoscope, the
person concerned will be at variance with the father.
But if the lord of the 6th or the 8th bhava in the father's
horoscope occupy the Lagna in that of the son, the
latter will be superior to his father.
verses:
क्ररनीचांशकस्थे वा भावनाथे च कारके ।
मन्दमान्द्यगुसंयुक्ते पितृदुःखं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥

When the lord of the 5th bhava and
its Karaka is in a malefic or depression amsa and is in
conjunction with Saturn, Mandi or Rahu, the astrologer
may announce the father's unhappiness.

सौम्ये तदीश्वरे वाऽपि नीचमूढारिराशिगे ।
क्ररषष्ठयंशके वाऽपि पितृदुःखं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥

If the lord of 5th bhava, even when
benefic, be in depression, eclipsed or in an inimical sign,
or in a malefic Shashtyamsa, the astrologer may pro-
nounce the father's unhappiness.

पितृकर्मगृहे जातः पितृतुल्यगुणान्वितः ।
पितृजन्मतृतीयर्थे जातः पितृवशानुगः ॥

A person will have the characteristics
of the father when born in a Lagna corresponding to
the 10th bhava of his father. He will be dutiful to his
father when his rising sign corresponds to the 3rd bhava
in the father's horoscope.

पितृषष्ठाष्टमे जातः पितृशत्रर्भविष्यति ।
तद्भावपे विलग्नस्थे पितृश्रेष्ठो भवेत् सुतः ॥

When the rising sign corresponds to
the 6th or the 8th bhava in the father's horoscope, the
person concerned will be at variance with the father.
But if the lord of the 6th or the 8th bhava in the father's
horoscope occupy the Lagna in that of the son, the
latter will be superior to his father.

content:
882
आतकपारिजाते
Adh. XIII.
लग्नादायतपस्थिताः शनिमहीपुत्रागबो मृत्युदा-
स्तातस्यार्कजभूसुतौ निधनदौ बालस्य रन्ध्रास्तगौ ।
माने वा यदि पञ्चमे कुजरविच्छायाकुमारेन्दवः
सद्यो मातुलतातबालजननीनाशं प्रकुर्वन्ति ते ॥ ४८ ॥
Sloka 58. Saturn, Mars and Rahu in the 11th or
the 9th bhava from the Lagna occasion the father's
death; Saturn and Mars in the 8th or the 7th bhava
bring about the death of the child. Mars, the Sun,
Saturn and the Moon in the 10th or the 5th bhava bring
about forthwith the death of the maternal uncle, the
father, the child and the mother respectively.
cf. सर्वार्थचिन्तामणि
NOTES.
लामे शुभे वा यदि मन्दभौमौ फणीन्द्रयुक्तौ पितरस्त्यपायः ।
लग्नाच्छुभे कर्मणि भूमिपुत्रे पापेक्षिते मातुलमृत्युमाहुः ।|
मन्देन युक्ते यदि पुत्रमृत्युं चन्द्रे हि तन्मातृमृर्ति सपापे ।
पितुर्मूतिर्वासरनायकेऽत्र न संशयः पापदृशा समेते ॥
This sloka appears in जातकरल.
I should think that the three planets viz., Saturn, Mars and
Rahu should all be posited in one or other of the two bhavas or
in both to bring about the effect. Two alone will not be able to
produce the fateful effect. Similar remark applies to the yoga
given in the 2nd पाद of the sloka.
सबले पितृ‌भावेशे लग्नेशेन्दुजचतुर्थपाः ।
दुर्बला यदि तन्मातुर्गर्भतो मरणं विदुः ॥ ५९ ॥
Sloka 59. If the lord of the 5th bhava be strong,
and the lords of the 1st and the 4th bhavas and the
Moon be weak, the mother of the person born will die
at the next conception.
verses:
लग्नादायतपस्थिताः शनिमहीपुत्रागबो मृत्युदा-
स्तातस्यार्कजभूसुतौ निधनदौ बालस्य रन्ध्रास्तगौ ।
माने वा यदि पञ्चमे कुजरविच्छायाकुमारेन्दवः
सद्यो मातुलतातबालजननीनाशं प्रकुर्वन्ति ते ॥

Saturn, Mars and Rahu in the 11th or
the 9th bhava from the Lagna occasion the father's
death; Saturn and Mars in the 8th or the 7th bhava
bring about the death of the child. Mars, the Sun,
Saturn and the Moon in the 10th or the 5th bhava bring
about forthwith the death of the maternal uncle, the
father, the child and the mother respectively.

सबले पितृ‌भावेशे लग्नेशेन्दुजचतुर्थपाः ।
दुर्बला यदि तन्मातुर्गर्भतो मरणं विदुः ॥

If the lord of the 5th bhava be strong,
and the lords of the 1st and the 4th bhavas and the
Moon be weak, the mother of the person born will die
at the next conception.

title: त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl..60
त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः
888
नवमाद‌ष्टमाधीशो नवमात् खरपोऽथवा ।
शनिर्वेधेषु यः क्ररः संभवेत् पितृमृत्युदः ॥ ६० ॥
Sloka 60. When Saturn being the lord of the 8th
blava or खर (Khara), both reckoned from the 9th bhava,
happens to be malefic in वेत्र (Vedha) positions, the
planet will cause the death of the father.
NOTES.
A knowledge of गोचरफल (Gocharaphala-effect of transits) is
a condition precedent to the understanding of the term वेध (Vedha)
used in the sloka.
It is a well known theory that the movements of planets in
the zodiac from moment to moment signify good or evil. This
is the basis on which the Transit System rests. As the physical
and mental qualities and the chief events in the life and career of
the native could be foretold by a reference to the position of the
planets and the Lagna at the time of birth, similarly, any changes
in the prospects and conditions of life of the individual at any
required time may be ascertained by a reference to the person's
Janma Rasi (जन्मराशि) and the configuration of planets at that time.
Thus it is said that when the Sun during his transit comes through
the 3rd, the 6th, the 10th and the 11th houses reckoned from the
house occupied by the Moon at birth, success, ruin of enemies,
gains of labour and pecuniary gains respectively are the results
to be predicted. But there is one thing to be noted in this con-
nection. These results will happen only if the corresponding वेध
(Vedha) sign in each case is left unoccupied by any planet at the
time of consideration. If there should be a planet in the Vedha
position, he tries to nullify the original effect that would other-
wise result, may, even bring about a quite contrary effect should
be happen to be strong at that time.
What these वेध (Vedha) positions are, will be clear from the
following slokas from कालप्रकाशिका
12 リ
36178101311
रविः पुरो धा गीताख्यसदानवशयुग्गतैः ।
3193 6 12 2 7 10 1 8 11
शशी मायान्धगोचयारसना मुजयुग्गतैः ॥
105
verses:
नवमाद‌ष्टमाधीशो नवमात् खरपोऽथवा ।
शनिर्वेधेषु यः क्ररः संभवेत् पितृमृत्युदः ॥ ६० ॥

When Saturn being the lord of the 8th
blava or खर (Khara), both reckoned from the 9th bhava,
happens to be malefic in वेत्र (Vedha) positions, the
planet will cause the death of the father.
12 リ
36178101311
रविः पुरो धा गीताख्यसदानवशयुग्गतैः ।
3193 6 12 2 7 10 1 8 11
शशी मायान्धगोचयारसना मुजयुग्गतैः ॥

title: Adh.
content:
834
आतकपारिजाते
Adh. XIII.
1 2 12 3 4 9 6 7 8 10 5 11
कुजः पुराख्यगोवेधतीर्थदानेशयुग्गतैः ।
2 5 4 3 7 9 6 1 8 10 12 11
बुधः ख मिव गोसिन्धुस्तोयदानाख्ययुग्गनैः ॥
1 12 2 5 4 6 3 7 10 9 8 11
जीवः कार्यरमाभूतो गोस्थोनळद्‌युग्गतैः ।
8 7 1 10 9 12 2 5 11 4 3 6
शुक्रो हंसपुनर्वैर्यो रामाप्यभोगते ग्रहैः ॥
कुजक्त्पादरविजौ न वेधः पितृपुत्रयोः ॥
For the benefit of the readers, the वेध (Vedha) positions have been indicated in the table subjoined:
Vedah वेध signs reckoned from the house of the Moon.
Planets I II III IV V VI VII VIII IX X XI XII
Sun 1 2 9 3 6 12 7 8 10 4 5 11
Moon 5 1 9 3 6 12 2 7 10 4 8 11
Mars 1 2 12 3 4 9 6 7 8 10 5 11
Mercury 2 5 4 3 7 9 6 1 8 10 12 11
Jupiter 1 12 2 5 4 6 3 7 10 9 8 11
Venus 8 7 1 10 9 12 2 5 11 4 3 6
There is no वेध (Vedha) between the father and the son. Consequently, (1) the Moon and Mercury, (2) the Sun and Saturn do not affect each other through Vedha.
Take for example the nativity referred to in p. 657. The Moon at birth is in Meena. Suppose it is required to find out if the Sun's transit through Makara in January—February 1933 will prove propitious. Makara happening to be the 11th from Meena (the Janma Rasi), the Vedha sign for the Sun is the 5th from Meena, that is, Kataka. This is not occupied by any planet. So the good effects, viz., pecuniary gain, due to the Sun's transit thro' Makara

tables.title: Vedah वेध signs reckoned from the house of the Moon.

title: त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 61-63
त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः
835
the 11th house from the Moon will happen in their entirety. Simi-
lar is the case with the other planets.
दिनेशस्थितराश्यंशप्राणितः कोणगे रखौ ।
पितृमृत्युर्मातृ मृत्युरिन्दुस्थांशक्षयोर्बलात् ॥ ६१ ॥
Sloka. 61. Examine the strength of the Rasi as
well as the amsa occupied by the Sun. Find the stronger
of these two. When the Sun occupies a Kona position
from thence, the father's death may be expected. By a
similar process ascertain whether the Rasi or the amsa
occupied by the Moon is stronger. The mother's death
may be predicted with reference thereto, i. c. when the
Sun passes through the Kona of the amsa or Rasi that
is stronger.
भानुस्थितांश पारूढनवांशद्वादशांशभम् ।
गते चन्द्रे मवेन्मृत्युर्मातापित्रोर्यथाक्रमम् ।। ६२ ।।
Sloka. 62. Find the lord of the Navamsa occupied
by the Sun. Find next the Navansa and Dwadasamsa
occupied by the planet found. When the Moon passes
through the Navamsa and Dwadasamsa found, the deaths
respectively of the mother and father will take place.
दुष्टस्थानगते भानौ सिंहान्त्य द्वादशांशके ।
जातचेज्जननात्पूर्व पितृमृत्युं प्रयच्छति ।। ६३ ।।
Sloka. 63. If, when the Sun occupies a दुःस्थान,
a person has his birth in the Dwadasamsa of Simha or
Meena he must have caused the death of his father prior
to coming into the world.
NOTES.
For the same effect the following is another yoga quoted in
जातकरण,
verses:
दिनेशस्थितराश्यंशप्राणितः कोणगे रखौ ।
पितृमृत्युर्मातृ मृत्युरिन्दुस्थांशक्षयोर्बलात् ॥

Examine the strength of the Rasi as
well as the amsa occupied by the Sun. Find the stronger
of these two. When the Sun occupies a Kona position
from thence, the father's death may be expected. By a
similar process ascertain whether the Rasi or the amsa
occupied by the Moon is stronger. The mother's death
may be predicted with reference thereto, i. c. when the
Sun passes through the Kona of the amsa or Rasi that
is stronger.

भानुस्थितांश पारूढनवांशद्वादशांशभम् ।
गते चन्द्रे मवेन्मृत्युर्मातापित्रोर्यथाक्रमम् ।।

Find the lord of the Navamsa occupied
by the Sun. Find next the Navansa and Dwadasamsa
occupied by the planet found. When the Moon passes
through the Navamsa and Dwadasamsa found, the deaths
respectively of the mother and father will take place.

दुष्टस्थानगते भानौ सिंहान्त्य द्वादशांशके ।
जातचेज्जननात्पूर्व पितृमृत्युं प्रयच्छति ।।

If, when the Sun occupies a दुःस्थान,
a person has his birth in the Dwadasamsa of Simha or
Meena he must have caused the death of his father prior
to coming into the world.

title: Adhyaya
content:
836
आतकपारिजाते
Adh. XIII.
क्षीणे शशाङ्के तनुभावयुक्त मूढान्विते मन्दगृहे सुरेडचे ।
त्रिकोणगे पापखगैश्च सर्वैः प्रागेव पुत्रस्य मुखाद्विनाशः ॥
मार्ताण्डे गुलिकस्फुटादपहृते राशित्रिकोणे शनौ
रोगं तज्जनकस्य देवसचिवे मृत्युस्तदंशोपगे ।
आदित्ये यमकण्टकस्फुटयुते तद्रा शिकोणे गुरौ
रोगं तद्भवनांशकेऽमरगुरौ तातस्य नाशं वदेत् ॥ ६४ ॥
Sloka. 64. Subtract the figures for the Sun from
those for Mandi. The result will indicate a certain
Rasi and amsa. When Saturn passes through the Kona
of the Rasi found, the father of the person concerned
will fall ill; death will supervene when Jupiter passes
through the amsa found already. Add the figures for
Yamakantaka to those for the Sun. The result will
give a certain Rasi and a Navamsa. When Jupiter
passes through that Rasi or its Trikona, the father of
the person concerned will fall ill; and he will die
when Jupiter passes through the amsa found.
NOTES.
This sloka appears in जातकरल. The 3rd पाद there reads thus:
आदित्ये यमकण्टकस्फुटहृते राशित्रिकोण शनौ ॥
केन्द्रे चरेऽकै चन्द्रे वा पितरौ न दहेत् सुतः ।
केन्द्रे द्विदेहगौ तौ चेत् मृत्युदाहौ द्विकालगौ ।॥ ६५ ॥
Sloka. 65. When the Sun or the Moon occupies
a Kendra in a moveable sign, the son will not burn the
father's or mother's corpse himself. If the Sun or the
Moon occupying a Kendra be in a dual sign, the death
and burning will not be in the same period of time.
cf. सर्वार्थचिन्तामणि
केन्द्रे चरेऽर्के यदि वा शशाङ्के सुतो दहेत्तत्पितरौ न तत्र ।
द्विवेहराशौ यदि तौ च केन्द्रे तयोर्मूर्ति वा दहनाद्विकालः ॥
verses:
क्षीणे शशाङ्के तनुभावयुक्त मूढान्विते मन्दगृहे सुरेडचे ।
त्रिकोणगे पापखगैश्च सर्वैः प्रागेव पुत्रस्य मुखाद्विनाशः ॥
When the Moon is debilitated, associated with the Lagna lord, afflicted by malefics, or in a malefic's house, and malefics are in trines, the father will die before the son's face.

मार्ताण्डे गुलिकस्फुटादपहृते राशित्रिकोणे शनौ
रोगं तज्जनकस्य देवसचिवे मृत्युस्तदंशोपगे ।
आदित्ये यमकण्टकस्फुटयुते तद्रा शिकोणे गुरौ
रोगं तद्भवनांशकेऽमरगुरौ तातस्य नाशं वदेत् ॥ ६४ ॥

Subtract the figures for the Sun from those for Mandi. The result will indicate a certain Rasi and amsa. When Saturn passes through the Kona of the Rasi found, the father of the person concerned will fall ill; death will supervene when Jupiter passes through the amsa found already. Add the figures for Yamakantaka to those for the Sun. The result will give a certain Rasi and a Navamsa. When Jupiter passes through that Rasi or its Trikona, the father of the person concerned will fall ill; and he will die when Jupiter passes through the amsa found.

केन्द्रे चरेऽकै चन्द्रे वा पितरौ न दहेत् सुतः ।
केन्द्रे द्विदेहगौ तौ चेत् मृत्युदाहौ द्विकालगौ ।॥ ६५ ॥

When the Sun or the Moon occupies a Kendra in a moveable sign, the son will not burn the father's or mother's corpse himself. If the Sun or the Moon occupying a Kendra be in a dual sign, the death and burning will not be in the same period of time.

केन्द्रे चरेऽर्के यदि वा शशाङ्के सुतो दहेत्तत्पितरौ न तत्र ।
द्विवेहराशौ यदि तौ च केन्द्रे तयोर्मूर्ति वा दहनाद्विकालः ॥
If the Sun or Moon is in a Kendra in a moveable sign, the son will not cremate his parents. If they are in a dual sign in a Kendra, the cremation will occur at different times.

title: त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 66-68
त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः
837
अदृश्ययातौ पितृमात्नाथौ पित्रोर्मुखादर्शनदौ भवेताम् ।
पुत्राधिपोऽदृश्यगृहोपगश्चेत् पुत्राननादर्शनदोऽन्त्यकाले ॥ ६६ ॥
Sloka. 66. If the lords of the 9th and the 4th
bhavas be in the invisible part of the zodiac, it will not
be the good fortune of the person concerned to see the
face of his parents in their last movements. If the lord
of the 5th bhava be in the invisible portion of the
hemisphere, the person concerned will not see his son's
face at the moment of his death.
दुःस्थे बुद्धिस्थानपेऽदृश्यगे वा जातो मन्दप्रायबुद्धिं समेति ।
केन्द्रे कोणे सौम्यवागीशयुक्ते वीर्योपेते बुद्धिमानिङ्गितज्ञः ॥ ६७ ॥
Sloka. 67. If the lord of the 5th bhava occupy a
दुःस्थान or be in the invisible portion of the hemisphere,
the person born will have a rather dull understanding.
But if the planet in question be associated with Mercury
or Jupiter in a Kendra or Kona position and have
strength, the person born will be intenigent and capable
of shrewdly guessing the thoughts of others (by their
gestures and other expressive signs).
त्रिकालज्ञो भवेज्जीवे खांशे मृद्वंशसंयुते ।
गोपुराद्यंशके वाऽपि शुभांशे शुभवीक्षिते ।। ६८ ।।
Stoka. 68. A person becomes cognisant of the
past, the present and the future when Jupiter is (1) in
his own Navamsa and has attained the benefic Shash.
tyamisa मृदु (Mridu); or (2) has attained Gopura and other
higher Vais'eshikamsas and (3) occupies a benefic
Navamsa and is aspected by a benefic planet.
हृद्रोगी पञ्चमे पापे सपापे च रसातले ।
क्ररषष्ठयंशसंयुक्ते शुभदृग्योगवर्जिते ।। ६९ ॥
verses:
अदृश्ययातौ पितृमात्नाथौ पित्रोर्मुखादर्शनदौ भवेताम् ।
पुत्राधिपोऽदृश्यगृहोपगश्चेत् पुत्राननादर्शनदोऽन्त्यकाले ॥

If the lords of the 9th and the 4th
bhavas be in the invisible part of the zodiac, it will not
be the good fortune of the person concerned to see the
face of his parents in their last movements. If the lord
of the 5th bhava be in the invisible portion of the
hemisphere, the person concerned will not see his son's
face at the moment of his death.
दुःस्थे बुद्धिस्थानपेऽदृश्यगे वा जातो मन्दप्रायबुद्धिं समेति ।
केन्द्रे कोणे सौम्यवागीशयुक्ते वीर्योपेते बुद्धिमानिङ्गितज्ञः ॥

If the lord of the 5th bhava occupy a
दुःस्थान or be in the invisible portion of the hemisphere,
the person born will have a rather dull understanding.
But if the planet in question be associated with Mercury
or Jupiter in a Kendra or Kona position and have
strength, the person born will be intenigent and capable
of shrewdly guessing the thoughts of others (by their
gestures and other expressive signs).
त्रिकालज्ञो भवेज्जीवे खांशे मृद्वंशसंयुते ।
गोपुराद्यंशके वाऽपि शुभांशे शुभवीक्षिते ॥

A person becomes cognisant of the
past, the present and the future when Jupiter is (1) in
his own Navamsa and has attained the benefic Shash.
tyamisa मृदु (Mridu); or (2) has attained Gopura and other
higher Vais'eshikamsas and (3) occupies a benefic
Navamsa and is aspected by a benefic planet.
हृद्रोगी पञ्चमे पापे सपापे च रसातले ।
क्ररषष्ठयंशसंयुक्ते शुभदृग्योगवर्जिते ॥

title: षष्ठभावफलम्
content:
888
बातकपारि जाते
Adh. XIII
Sloka. 69. When malefic planets occupy the 5th
and the 4th bhavas and when the former bhava is in a
malefic Shashtyamsa without being aspected by or in
conjunction with benefic planets, the person born will
suffer from heart-desease.
अन्नदानपरो नित्यं पञ्चमेशे शुभांशके ।
शुभखेचरसंयुक्ते भूमिजे केन्द्रमाश्रिते ।। ७० ॥
Sloka. 70. When the lord of the 5th bhava is in
a benefic amsa and Mars occupying a Kendra is in con-
junction with benefic planets, the person born will
ever devote himself to the duties of hospitality and the
relief of the hungry and the famished.
॥ अथ षष्ठभावफलम् ॥
रोगारिव्यसनक्षतानि वसुधापुत्रारितश्चिन्तये-
दुक्तं रोगकरं तदेव रिपुगे जीवे जितारिर्भवेत् ।
षण्ढोऽरीशबुधौ विधुन्तुदयुतौ लग्नेशसम्बन्धिनौ
लिङ्गस्यामयकद्वणेन रुधिरः षष्ठे सलग्नाधिपः ।॥ ७१ ॥
Sloka 71. An astrologer ought to divine diseases.
enemies, bad habits and hurts that a person may have,
from the 6th bhava and Mars. What relates to
diseases has been treated already (Vide Adhyayas V. &
VI). When Jupiter is in the 6th bhava, the person
concerned will overcome his enemies. If the lord of
the 6th bhava and Mercury be in conjunction with
Rahu and connected in some way with the lord of the
Lagna, the person concerned will be impotent. Mars
occupying the 6th bhava together with lord of the
Lagna will produce damage to the organ of generation
by an ulcer.
verses: When malefic planets occupy the 5th and the 4th bhavas and when the former bhava is in a malefic Shashtyamsa without being aspected by or in conjunction with benefic planets, the person born will suffer from heart-desease.
अन्नदानपरो नित्यं पञ्चमेशे शुभांशके । शुभखेचरसंयुक्ते भूमिजे केन्द्रमाश्रिते ।। ७० ॥

When the lord of the 5th bhava is in a benefic amsa and Mars occupying a Kendra is in conjunction with benefic planets, the person born will ever devote himself to the duties of hospitality and the relief of the hungry and the famished.
रोगारिव्यसनक्षतानि वसुधापुत्रारितश्चिन्तये- दुक्तं रोगकरं तदेव रिपुगे जीवे जितारिर्भवेत् । षण्ढोऽरीशबुधौ विधुन्तुदयुतौ लग्नेशसम्बन्धिनौ लिङ्गस्यामयकद्वणेन रुधिरः षष्ठे सलग्नाधिपः ।॥ ७१ ॥

An astrologer ought to divine diseases, enemies, bad habits and hurts that a person may have, from the 6th bhava and Mars. What relates to diseases has been treated already (Vide Adhyayas V. & VI). When Jupiter is in the 6th bhava, the person concerned will overcome his enemies. If the lord of the 6th bhava and Mercury be in conjunction with Rahu and connected in some way with the lord of the Lagna, the person concerned will be impotent. Mars occupying the 6th bhava together with lord of the Lagna will produce damage to the organ of generation by an ulcer.

title: त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 72-73
त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः
839
. जातकरल
NOTES.
अरिभवनादरिचोरक्षत विघ्नक्लेशनाभ्युदरदेशान् ।
मधुरादिषडुपदंशान् ग्रहराश्युदित। न्वदेत्प्राज्ञः ॥
For the 2nd पाद, cf. गर्ग quoted by बलभद्र in his होरारण.
स्वगेहे शुभगेहे वा षष्ठो गुरुर मित्रहा ।
शत्रुगेहेऽरिणा दृष्टः शत्रुपीडां ददाति सः ॥
पत्नीषण्ढत्वमेति क्षतभवनगते कामपे सासुरेज्ये
भौमे मन्देन दृष्टे रिपुभवनगते शत्रभार्यामुपैति ।
सौम्यैदृष्टे युते वा न भयमरिजनाच्छत्रमे जन्मलभात्
पापैः शत्रुक्षतादिव्रणभयविपुलं जायते लाञ्छनं वा ॥ ७२ ॥
Sloka 72. If the lord of the 7th bhava occupy the
6th in conjunction with Venus, the person born will
be impotent in regard to his wife. If Mars occupying
the 6th bhava be aspected by Saturn, he will have a
liaison with an enemy's wife. If the 6th bhava be
either aspected or occupied by benefic planets, there is
no danger to be dreaded from enemies; if aspected or
occupied by malefic ones, there will be a good deal of
hurt or other damage inflicted by an enemy, danger
from ulcers or some mark of ignominy put upon the
person concerned.
षष्ठे भास्वति लग्ननायकरिषौ नीचारिगे दुर्बले
जातस्तत्पित्वर्गशत्रुसहितो लग्रेशमित्रग्रहे ।
इष्टस्थानगते निजोच्चसुहृदां वर्गोपयाते सति
ज्ञातीनां बहुलं वदन्ति मुनयः शत्रव्रणाभावभाक् ॥ ७३ ॥
Sloka 73. If the Sun occupying the 6th bhava
identical with the planet's depression or unfriendly
verses:
अरिभवनादरिचोरक्षत विघ्नक्लेशनाभ्युदरदेशान् ।
मधुरादिषडुपदंशान् ग्रहराश्युदित। न्वदेत्प्राज्ञः ॥

स्वगेहे शुभगेहे वा षष्ठो गुरुर मित्रहा ।
शत्रुगेहेऽरिणा दृष्टः शत्रुपीडां ददाति सः ॥

पत्नीषण्ढत्वमेति क्षतभवनगते कामपे सासुरेज्ये
भौमे मन्देन दृष्टे रिपुभवनगते शत्रभार्यामुपैति ।
सौम्यैदृष्टे युते वा न भयमरिजनाच्छत्रमे जन्मलभात्
पापैः शत्रुक्षतादिव्रणभयविपुलं जायते लाञ्छनं वा ॥ ७२ ॥

If the lord of the 7th bhava occupy the
6th in conjunction with Venus, the person born will
be impotent in regard to his wife. If Mars occupying
the 6th bhava be aspected by Saturn, he will have a
liaison with an enemy's wife. If the 6th bhava be
either aspected or occupied by benefic planets, there is
no danger to be dreaded from enemies; if aspected or
occupied by malefic ones, there will be a good deal of
hurt or other damage inflicted by an enemy, danger
from ulcers or some mark of ignominy put upon the
person concerned.
षष्ठे भास्वति लग्ननायकरिषौ नीचारिगे दुर्बले
जातस्तत्पित्वर्गशत्रुसहितो लग्रेशमित्रग्रहे ।
इष्टस्थानगते निजोच्चसुहृदां वर्गोपयाते सति
ज्ञातीनां बहुलं वदन्ति मुनयः शत्रव्रणाभावभाक् ॥ ७३ ॥

If the Sun occupying the 6th bhava
identical with the planet's depression or unfriendly

content:
840
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. XIII.
sign, be inimical to the lord of the Lagna and have no
strength, the person born will have to associate with
the enemies of his father's party. But when the Sun in
the 6th bhava is friendly to the lord of the Lagna and
in a friendly sign and has attained its own, exaltation
or friendly varga, the person concerned, say the sages,
will be distinguished among his relatives for being
unhurt by enemies.
शत्रुस्थानगतोऽरिनीचगृहगो वक्रं गतो वाऽस्तगो-
ऽनेकज्ञातिजनो बहुक्षततनुः षष्ठाधिपो वा तथा ।
षष्ठस्थानगतेषु भास्करमुखव्योमाटनेषु क्रमात्
तत्तत्कारकखेटवर्गरिपुणा संपीडितः सन्ततम् ॥ ७४ ॥
Sloka 74. If the planet in the 'th bhava or the
owner thereof be in an inimical or its depression sign,
retrograde or eclipsed, the person born will have many
kinsmen by the father's side; and his body will be
covered with many sores. If any one of the planets
from the Sun onwards occupy the 6th bhava, the person
will be annoyed continually by the foe of the class of
people represented by the bhava of which the planet
occupying the 6th bhava is the Karaka.
पापव्योमचरास्त्रयोरिपतितत्प्राप्तेक्षका दुर्बला
गोवित्तक्षयमामयं रिषुभयं कुर्वन्ति जन्मादितः ।
ते सर्वे बलशालिनो यदि शुभा गोवित्तमश्वादिकं
राजान्नं सकलोपदंशसहितं रोगारिनाशं वदेत् ॥ ७५ ॥
Sloka 75. If the lord of the 6th bhava from the
Lagna, the planet occupying the same and the one
aspecting it-if these three planets be malefis and weak,
they produce the destruction of cattle, disease and
verses:
शत्रुस्थानगतोऽरिनीचगृहगो वक्रं गतो वाऽस्तगो-
ऽनेकज्ञातिजनो बहुक्षततनुः षष्ठाधिपो वा तथा ।
षष्ठस्थानगतेषु भास्करमुखव्योमाटनेषु क्रमात्
तत्तत्कारकखेटवर्गरिपुणा संपीडितः सन्ततम् ॥

If the planet in the 'th bhava or the
owner thereof be in an inimical or its depression sign,
retrograde or eclipsed, the person born will have many
kinsmen by the father's side; and his body will be
covered with many sores. If any one of the planets
from the Sun onwards occupy the 6th bhava, the person
will be annoyed continually by the foe of the class of
people represented by the bhava of which the planet
occupying the 6th bhava is the Karaka.

पापव्योमचरास्त्रयोरिपतितत्प्राप्तेक्षका दुर्बला
गोवित्तक्षयमामयं रिषुभयं कुर्वन्ति जन्मादितः ।
ते सर्वे बलशालिनो यदि शुभा गोवित्तमश्वादिकं
राजान्नं सकलोपदंशसहितं रोगारिनाशं वदेत् ॥

If the lord of the 6th bhava from the
Lagna, the planet occupying the same and the one
aspecting it-if these three planets be malefis and weak,
they produce the destruction of cattle, disease and

title: त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः
content:
841 त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः

danger from enemies. If these planets be strong and
benefic, then the effect will be wealth of cattle, horses
and other beasts of burden, royal food with condiments
of every sort and the disappearance of ailments and
enemies.

तेषामम्बरचारिणामतिशुभौ केन्द्रत्रिकोणायगौ
द्वावेतौ बलशालिनौ यदि लघुव्याध्यादिनाशं नृणाम् ।
एकोऽपि प्रबलो यदि व्रणरिपुक्लेशादिकिञ्चित्फलं
यत्तत्कारकवर्गमूलमखिलं मोदं प्रमादं तु वा ॥ ७६ ॥

Sloka 76. If two out of the three planets mention-
ed in the preceding sloka be exceedingly benefic and
occupy a Kendra, Trikona or the 11th bhava in great
strength, they will quickly cause the disappearance of
disease, etc., spoken of before. If even one among them
be very strong, the trouble from ulcers, enemies, etc.
will operate only to a small extent; and all that was
said about the evils besetting the bhavas of which the
planets under consideration are the Karakas will be
belied or replaced by happiness.

पापे लग्नगते सपलपयुते देहव्रणं देहिनां
पुत्रस्थे पितृपुत्रयोः सुखगते मातः कलत्रे स्त्रियः ।
धर्मस्थे सति मातुलस्य सहजे तस्यानुजस्य व्रणं
लाभस्थे तु तदग्रजस्य निधने जातो गुदार्तो भवेत् ॥ ७७ ॥

Sloka 77. A malefic planet in conjunction with
the lord of the 6th bhava in the Lagna afflicts with an
ulcer or wound the person concerned; in the 5th bhava,
his father or son or both; in the 4th, his mother; in
the 7th, his wives; in the 9th, his maternal uncle; in
the 3rd, his younger brother; in the 11th, his elder
verses:
तेषामम्बरचारिणामतिशुभौ केन्द्रत्रिकोणायगौ
द्वावेतौ बलशालिनौ यदि लघुव्याध्यादिनाशं नृणाम् ।
एकोऽपि प्रबलो यदि व्रणरिपुक्लेशादिकिञ्चित्फलं
यत्तत्कारकवर्गमूलमखिलं मोदं प्रमादं तु वा ॥ ७६ ॥

पुत्रस्थे पितृपुत्रयोः सुखगते मातः कलत्रे स्त्रियः ।
धर्मस्थे सति मातुलस्य सहजे तस्यानुजस्य व्रणं
लाभस्थे तु तदग्रजस्य निधने जातो गुदार्तो भवेत् ॥ ७७ ॥

confidence.reasoning: Clear transcription of Adhyaya XIII content regarding disease and planetary strength.

content:
842
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. XIII.
brother; and lastly, if the malefic planet appear in the
8th associated with the lord of the 6th, the person
concerned will suffer from pain in the anus.
NOTES.
This sloka as well as the next one are in जातकरल.
भानुर्मूर्द्धि शशी मुखेऽवनिसुतः कण्ठे तु नाभेरध-
न
श्वान्द्रिः सूरिरनामयं प्रकुरुते नेत्रामयं भार्गवः ।
मन्दो वातमहिश्च केतुरुदरव्याधि बुधक्षेत्रगो
लग्नेशः शशिजेन वीक्षितयुतो गुह्यत्रणं यच्छति ॥ ७८ ॥
Sloka 78. If the planet capable of producing the
ulcer be the Sun, it will break out in the head; if the
Moon, in the face; if Mars, in the neck; if Mercury
in the lower part of the navel; if Jupiter be in such a
position, there will be exemption from ailments. If
Venus be similarly situated, the consequence will be
sore-eyes. Saturn as well as Rahu in the position
above described produce flatulence, and Ketu, disease of
the stomach. The lord of the Lagna aspected by or
associated with Mercury and occupying a sign belong-
ing to the same planet (in the 6th bhava) generates an
ulcer in the privities.
cf. पराशर
षष्ठाधिपोऽपि पापश्येद्देहे वाऽप्यष्टमे स्थितः ।
तदा व्रणो भवेद्देहे कर्मस्थानेऽप्ययं विधिः ॥
एवं पित्रादिभावशास्तत्तत्कारकसंयुताः ।
वणाधिपयुताश्चापि षष्ठाष्टमयुता यदि ॥
तेषामपि त्रणं वाच्यमादित्येन शिरोव्रणम् ।
इन्दुना च मुखे कण्ठे भौमन ज्ञेन नाभिषु ॥
verses:
भानुर्मूर्द्धि शशी मुखेऽवनिसुतः कण्ठे तु नाभेरध-
न
श्वान्द्रिः सूरिरनामयं प्रकुरुते नेत्रामयं भार्गवः ।
मन्दो वातमहिश्च केतुरुदरव्याधि बुधक्षेत्रगो
लग्नेशः शशिजेन वीक्षितयुतो गुह्यत्रणं यच्छति ॥ ७८ ॥

If the planet capable of producing the
ulcer be the Sun, it will break out in the head; if the
Moon, in the face; if Mars, in the neck; if Mercury
in the lower part of the navel; if Jupiter be in such a
position, there will be exemption from ailments. If
Venus be similarly situated, the consequence will be
sore-eyes. Saturn as well as Rahu in the position
above described produce flatulence, and Ketu, disease of
the stomach. The lord of the Lagna aspected by or
associated with Mercury and occupying a sign belong-
ing to the same planet (in the 6th bhava) generates an
ulcer in the privities.
षष्ठाधिपोऽपि पापश्येद्देहे वाऽप्यष्टमे स्थितः ।
तदा व्रणो भवेद्देहे कर्मस्थानेऽप्ययं विधिः ॥
एवं पित्रादिभावशास्तत्तत्कारकसंयुताः ।
वणाधिपयुताश्चापि षष्ठाष्टमयुता यदि ॥
तेषामपि त्रणं वाच्यमादित्येन शिरोव्रणम् ।
इन्दुना च मुखे कण्ठे भौमन ज्ञेन नाभिषु ॥

title: त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 79-81
त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः
843
गुरुणा नासिकायां च भृगुणा नयने पदे ।
शनिना राहुणा कुक्षौ केतुना च तथा भवेत् ॥
लग्नादिपद्राशिगतः फणीशः शुकेक्षितस्तत्तनुचिन्हमेति ।
मन्दाहियुक्ते रिपुराशिनाथे तुरङ्गपश्वादिमयं वदन्ति ॥ ७९ ॥
Sloka 79. A person has a mark or mole in that
part of the body which corresponds to the order from
the Lagna of the Rasi which Rahu occupies being
aspected by Venus. (Vide Adhyaya 3, slokas 76-78).
If the lord of the 6th bhava be in conjunction with
Saturn and Rahu, astrologers say, danger is to be dread-
ed from horses, cows, etc.
पापग्रहेण संदृष्टे बलहीनेऽरिनायके ।
पापान्तरगते वाऽपि शत्रुपीडा भविष्यति ॥ ८० ॥
Sloka 80. When the lord of the 6th bhava is
without strength and aspected by a malefic planet or is
between two malefic planets, there will be trouble from
enemies.
सत्रस्थानाधिपे दुःस्थे नीचमूढारिराशिगे ।
लग्नेशे बलसंयुक्ते शत्रुनाशं वदेद्बुधः ॥ ८१ ॥
Sloka 81. When the lord of the 6th bhava is in
a दुःस्थान (Dustthana) and is depressed, eclipsed or in an
inimical sign, and the lord of the Lagna is possessed of
strength, a wise astrologer should divine the de ruction
of all enemies.
NOTES.
In this connection compare what the author of उत्तरपाराशर says
about this bhava:
verses:
गुरुणा नासिकायां च भृगुणा नयने पदे ।
शनिना राहुणा कुक्षौ केतुना च तथा भवेत् ॥

लग्नादिपद्राशिगतः फणीशः शुकेक्षितस्तत्तनुचिन्हमेति ।
मन्दाहियुक्ते रिपुराशिनाथे तुरङ्गपश्वादिमयं वदन्ति ॥ ७९ ॥

A person has a mark or mole in that
part of the body which corresponds to the order from
the Lagna of the Rasi which Rahu occupies being
aspected by Venus. (Vide Adhyaya 3, slokas 76-78).
If the lord of the 6th bhava be in conjunction with
Saturn and Rahu, astrologers say, danger is to be dread-
ed from horses, cows, etc.
पापग्रहेण संदृष्टे बलहीनेऽरिनायके ।
पापान्तरगते वाऽपि शत्रुपीडा भविष्यति ॥ ८० ॥

When the lord of the 6th bhava is
without strength and aspected by a malefic planet or is
between two malefic planets, there will be trouble from
enemies.
सत्रस्थानाधिपे दुःस्थे नीचमूढारिराशिगे ।
लग्नेशे बलसंयुक्ते शत्रुनाशं वदेद्बुधः ॥ ८१ ॥

When the lord of the 6th bhava is in
a दुःस्थान (Dustthana) and is depressed, eclipsed or in an
inimical sign, and the lord of the Lagna is possessed of
strength, a wise astrologer should divine the de ruction
of all enemies.

title: त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः
content:
844
नातकपारिजाते
Adh. XIII.
षष्ठेशारौ तु दुःस्थावशुभतरयुतौ वीक्षितौ वा शुभैश्चे-
च्छत्रुनैवास्य दृष्टौ यदि शुभमिलितौ शत्रुवृद्धिर्भुवीह ।
एवं चेदष्टमेशो न भवति हि रुजा रोगयुक्तः शुभैश्चेत्
दृष्टौ षष्ठाष्टमेशावशुभतरयुतौ कुन्तखड्डामिवातम् ॥
षष्ठाष्टमेशविधुराश्यधिपाः ममेता दृष्टा मिथो चनपमीलितपापमुक्तौ ।
तदृष्टमुक्तिषु भवन्ति हि मेहकृच्छ्रकूरत्रण ज्वरममीरणमुख्यरोगाः ।।
एवं स्थिते दिनकरेऽपि पुरा यदुक्तास्ते मंभवन्ति हि भिषग्भिग्माध्यरोगाः ।
दृष्टाश्च ते हि गुरुणा भृगुणा युताश्चेत् शान्ता भवन्ति सहमेव ममम्तरोगाः ॥
षष्ठेशे गोपुरांशादौ दिवाकर निरीक्षिते ।
लग्नेशे बलसम्पूर्णे ज्ञातीनामुपकारकृत् ॥ ८२ ॥
इति श्रीनवग्रहकृपया वैद्यनाथविरचिते जातकपारिजाते
त्रयोदशोऽध्यायः ।।
Sloka 82. When the lord of the 6th bhava has
attained a Gopura or other higher Vaiseshikamsa and is
aspected by the Sun and when the lord of the Lagna is
in full strength, the person born will be beneficent to
his kinsmen.
Thus ends &c.
verses:
षष्ठेशारौ तु दुःस्थावशुभतरयुतौ वीक्षितौ वा शुभैश्चे-
च्छत्रुनैवास्य दृष्टौ यदि शुभमिलितौ शत्रुवृद्धिर्भुवीह ।
एवं चेदष्टमेशो न भवति हि रुजा रोगयुक्तः शुभैश्चेत्
दृष्टौ षष्ठाष्टमेशावशुभतरयुतौ कुन्तखड्डामिवातम् ॥

षष्ठाष्टमेशविधुराश्यधिपाः ममेता दृष्टा मिथो चनपमीलितपापमुक्तौ ।
तदृष्टमुक्तिषु भवन्ति हि मेहकृच्छ्रकूरत्रण ज्वरममीरणमुख्यरोगाः ।।
एवं स्थिते दिनकरेऽपि पुरा यदुक्तास्ते मंभवन्ति हि भिषग्भिग्माध्यरोगाः ।
दृष्टाश्च ते हि गुरुणा भृगुणा युताश्चेत् शान्ता भवन्ति सहमेव ममम्तरोगाः ॥

षष्ठेशे गोपुरांशादौ दिवाकर निरीक्षिते ।
लग्नेशे बलसम्पूर्णे ज्ञातीनामुपकारकृत् ॥

Sloka 82. When the lord of the 6th bhava has
attained a Gopura or other higher Vaiseshikamsa and is
aspected by the Sun and when the lord of the Lagna is
in full strength, the person born will be beneficent to
his kinsmen.

title: सप्ताष्टमनवमभावाध्यायः
content:
जातकपारिजाते चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
॥ सप्ताष्टमनवमभावाध्यायः ॥
Adhyaya XIV.
THE EFFECTS OF THE 7TH, 8TH AND THE 9TH BHAVAS,
॥ अथ सप्तम भाव फलम् ।।
यात्रापुत्रकलत्र सौख्यमखिलं संचिन्तयेत् सप्तमात्
उक्तं पुत्रसुखासुखागमफलं सर्वं च यत्तद्वदेत् ।
जारः कामगते सिते मदनप्रे साहिध्वजे चा तथा
कामे जीवयुतेक्षिते शुभगृहे जातो न जारो भवेत् ॥ १ ॥
Sloka 1. It is from the 7th bhava that an astro-
loger can divine all about any journey a person may
undertake, his sons, his wives and his enjoyment.
What has been said in regard to son's worldly comfort
or misery as the effect accruing from the preceding bha.
vas may also be predicted from this bhava. When Venus
is in the 7th bhava or the lord thereof is in conjunction
with Rahu or Ketu, the person born will become an
adulterer. But this effect does not follow when the
7th bhava is a benefic sign and is also occupied or
aspected by Jupiter.
cf. जातकाभरण
रणाङ्गणं चापि वणिकृक्रियाश्च जायाविचारागमन प्रयाणम् ।
शास्त्रप्रवीणैर्हि विचारणीयं कलत्रभावे किल सर्वमेतत् ॥
845
verses:
यात्रापुत्रकलत्रसौख्यमखिलं संचिन्तयेत् सप्तमात्
उक्तं पुत्रसुखासुखागमफलं सर्वं च यत्तद्वदेत् ।
जारः कामगते सिते मदनपे साहिध्वजे चा तथा
कामे जीवयुतेक्षिते शुभगृहे जातो न जारो भवेत् ॥ १ ॥

Sloka 1. It is from the 7th bhava that an astrologer can divine all about any journey a person may undertake, his sons, his wives and his enjoyment. What has been said in regard to son's worldly comfort or misery as the effect accruing from the preceding bhavas may also be predicted from this bhava. When Venus is in the 7th bhava or the lord thereof is in conjunction with Rahu or Ketu, the person born will become an adulterer. But this effect does not follow when the 7th bhava is a benefic sign and is also occupied or aspected by Jupiter.

content:
846
आतकपारिजाते
Adh. XIV.
Also जातकरन
युवतिपदादुद्राहं भार्यापतिसुपदधिगुडक्षीरम् ।
आगमनं सरिदाप्ति मूत्राशयं च नष्टधनम् ॥
दुःस्थे कामपतौ तु पापगृहगे पापेक्षिते तद्यते
तज्जायाभवनस्य मध्यमफलं सर्व शुभं चान्यथा ।
कामस्थानपतौ सितेन सहिते पापक्षगे कामधीः
सौम्यर्थे शुभखेटवीक्षितयुते जातः सितच्छत्रवान् ॥ २ ॥
Sloka 2. If the lord of the 7th bhava occupying
a दुःस्थान (Dustthana) be in a malefic house and aspected
by or associated with a malefic planet, the effect of the
7th bhava would be but mediocre. If these conditions
be reversed, the effect of the bhava would be wholly
auspicious. If the lord of the 7th bhava be in conjunc-
tion with Venus and occupy a malefic sign, the person
born will be lustfully inclined; if it be in a benefic
sign and associated with or aspected by a benefic planet,
the person concerned will get a white umbrella which
is the emblem of royalty.
NOTES.
This and the next three slokas are in जातकरल.
उत्तरपाराशर
मित्रस्वोच्चपरस्परालयगतौ श्रीभार्गवद्यूनपौ
दृष्टौ वा मिलितौ शुभेन शुभयोर्मध्यं गतौ यस्य तु ।
एकं तस्य कलत्रमुत्तमगुण सौन्दर्यमन्यादृशं
सौख्यं चाधिकभोगजातकमिदं भाग्यं सुकीर्तिर्भवेत् ॥
दुःस्थानस्थौ तु तौ चेदशुभपरिगतौ पापदृष्टौ कलत्र-
द्वन्द्वं मौमेन दृष्टावथ यदि मिलितौ प्राकृकलत्रस्य हानिः ।
स्यादेवान्यत्कलत्रं रिपुभवनगतौ मौढ्यनीचं गतौ चेत्
बह्वीनां कामिनीनां स भत्रति दयितः कामशुक्रे तु कामी ॥
verses:
युवतिपदादुद्राहं भार्यापतिसुपदधिगुडक्षीरम् ।
आगमनं सरिदाप्ति मूत्राशयं च नष्टधनम् ॥
दुःस्थे कामपतौ तु पापगृहगे पापेक्षिते तद्यते
तज्जायाभवनस्य मध्यमफलं सर्व शुभं चान्यथा ।
कामस्थानपतौ सितेन सहिते पापक्षगे कामधीः
सौम्यर्थे शुभखेटवीक्षितयुते जातः सितच्छत्रवान् ॥ २ ॥

Sloka 2. If the lord of the 7th bhava occupying
a दुःस्थान (Dustthana) be in a malefic house and aspected
by or associated with a malefic planet, the effect of the
7th bhava would be but mediocre. If these conditions
be reversed, the effect of the bhava would be wholly
auspicious. If the lord of the 7th bhava be in conjunc-
tion with Venus and occupy a malefic sign, the person
born will be lustfully inclined; if it be in a benefic
sign and associated with or aspected by a benefic planet,
the person concerned will get a white umbrella which
is the emblem of royalty.
मित्रस्वोच्चपरस्परालयगतौ श्रीभार्गवद्यूनपौ
दृष्टौ वा मिलितौ शुभेन शुभयोर्मध्यं गतौ यस्य तु ।
एकं तस्य कलत्रमुत्तमगुण सौन्दर्यमन्यादृशं
सौख्यं चाधिकभोगजातकमिदं भाग्यं सुकीर्तिर्भवेत् ॥
दुःस्थानस्थौ तु तौ चेदशुभपरिगतौ पापदृष्टौ कलत्र-
द्वन्द्वं मौमेन दृष्टावथ यदि मिलितौ प्राकृकलत्रस्य हानिः ।

बह्वीनां कामिनीनां स भत्रति दयितः कामशुक्रे तु कामी ॥

title: चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
content:
S1.3
चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
847
चक्षुः कामपभार्गवैररिमृतिप्रान्तान्विहाय स्थितै-
रन्योन्यस्य (विदग्नतो) गृहस्थितोऽपि यदि वा स्वक्षेत्रमित्रोच्चगैः ।
रण्येतैररिगैररीक्षितयुतरनैस्तु बह्नयः स्त्रियः ॥
पश्यद्भिः स्वगृहाणि वा स्त्रियमुशन्त्येकां मिथक्षेत्र गै-
रण्येतैररिगैररीक्षितयुतरनैस्तु बह्नयः स्त्रियः ॥
वित्तास्ता रिपभार्गवास्तनुगताः पापान्विताः कामुकः
पापव्योमचरान्वितौ तनुरिपुस्थानाधिपौ चेत्तथा ।
कामस्थे रिपुवित्तलग्नपयुते पापे परस्त्रीरतः
पापारातिकलत्रपा नवमगाः कामातुरो जायते ॥ ३ ॥
Sloka 3. When the lords of the 2nd, the 6th
and the 7th bhavas and Venus occupy the Lagna and
are associated with malefic planets, the person born
will be libidinous. The same will be the effect if the
lords of the 1st and the 6th bhavas be in conjunction
with malefic planets. If a malefic planet occupying the
7th bhava be associated with the lords of the 6th, the
2nd and the 1st, the person concerned will be addicted
to women not his own. If the 9th bhava be occupied
by a malefic planet and the lords of the 6th and the 7th
bhavas, the person born will be afflicted with excessive
sexual craving.
cf. सर्वार्थचिन्तामांग
लग्नस्थिता वित्तक.लत्रशत्रुनाथाः सशुक्रा यदि पापयुक्ताः ।
जातः परस्त्रीषु रतः कुमार्गी शुभेक्षितश्चेन्न तथा भवेच्च ॥
लग्नारिपौ पापयुनौ यदि स्याज्जानः परस्त्रीषु रतः कुमार्गी ।
लग्नेश्वरे शत्रुकुटुम्बनाथे पाषैर्युते वा यदि दारराशौ ॥
जातः परस्त्रीषु रतः ॥
जारः कर्मघनास्तपा दशमगाः पुत्रादिकारग्रहाः
दुःस्था धीगुरुकामपाः सुतगृहे पापेक्षितेऽनात्मजः ।
verses:
चक्षुः कामपभार्गवैररिमृतिप्रान्तान्विहाय स्थितै-
रन्योन्यस्य (विदग्नतो) गृहस्थितोऽपि यदि वा स्वक्षेत्रमित्रोच्चगैः ।
रण्येतैररिगैररीक्षितयुतरनैस्तु बह्नयः स्त्रियः ॥
पश्यद्भिः स्वगृहाणि वा स्त्रियमुशन्त्येकां मिथक्षेत्र गै-
रण्येतैररिगैररीक्षितयुतरनैस्तु बह्नयः स्त्रियः ॥

वित्तास्ता रिपभार्गवास्तनुगताः पापान्विताः कामुकः
पापव्योमचरान्वितौ तनुरिपुस्थानाधिपौ चेत्तथा ।
कामस्थे रिपुवित्तलग्नपयुते पापे परस्त्रीरतः
पापारातिकलत्रपा नवमगाः कामातुरो जायते ॥ ३ ॥

When the lords of the 2nd, the 6th
and the 7th bhavas and Venus occupy the Lagna and
are associated with malefic planets, the person born
will be libidinous. The same will be the effect if the
lords of the 1st and the 6th bhavas be in conjunction
with malefic planets. If a malefic planet occupying the
7th bhava be associated with the lords of the 6th, the
2nd and the 1st, the person concerned will be addicted
to women not his own. If the 9th bhava be occupied
by a malefic planet and the lords of the 6th and the 7th
bhavas, the person born will be afflicted with excessive
sexual craving.
लग्नस्थिता वित्तक.लत्रशत्रुनाथाः सशुक्रा यदि पापयुक्ताः ।
जातः परस्त्रीषु रतः कुमार्गी शुभेक्षितश्चेन्न तथा भवेच्च ॥
लग्नारिपौ पापयुनौ यदि स्याज्जानः परस्त्रीषु रतः कुमार्गी ।
लग्नेश्वरे शत्रुकुटुम्बनाथे पाषैर्युते वा यदि दारराशौ ॥
जातः परस्त्रीषु रतः ॥

जारः कर्मघनास्तपा दशमगाः पुत्रादिकारग्रहाः
दुःस्था धीगुरुकामपाः सुतगृहे पापेक्षितेऽनात्मजः ।

content:
848
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. XIV.
जीवज्ञौ यदि वा निशाकरसितौ कामे बहुस्त्रीरतः
शुक्र्रे मन्मथराशिगे बलवति स्त्रीणां बहूनां पतिः ॥ ४ ॥
Sloka 4. If the lords of the 10th, the 2nd and 7th
bhavas occupy the 10th bhava, the person born will
have intrigues with women other than his wife. If the
lords of the 5th, the 9th and the 7th bhavas which are
the initiatory planets in respect to an offspring be in a
दुःस्थान (Dustthana) and if the 5th bhava be aspected by
a malefic planet, the person concerned will be childless.
If Jupiter and Mercury or the Moon and Venus be in
the 7th bhava, the person will be addicted to many
women. If Venus occupying the 7th bhava be strong,
the person concerned will have many wives.
cf. सवाचिन्तामर्माण
कर्मशवित्तेशकलत्रनाथ मानस्थिता जारमुदाहरन्ति ॥
श्रीधर्मनाथौ सकलत्रनायो दुःस्थानमौ हीनवलो शुभन ।
दृष्टे सुत दारबहुत्वयागे त्वपुत्रयोगं मुनयो वदन्ति ॥
शुक्रारौ मदगौ कलत्ररहिनो धर्मात्मजस्थौ तथा
सत्रस्थानगतौ निशाकरमितौ यद्येकपुत्रो भवेत् ।
लग्नास्तष्ययगेषु पापखचरेष्विन्दौ सुते दुर्बले
वन्ध्यास्त्रीपतिरेव जातमनुजो जायाविहीनोऽथवा ॥ ५ ॥
Sloka 5. If Venus and Mars be in the 7th bhava,
the person born will be bereft of a wife. The same
effect will follow if the planets be in the 9th and the
5th bhavas. If the Moon and Venus occupy the 6th
bhava, the person concerned will have only one son.
If malefic planets occupy the 1st, the 7th and the 12th
bhavas, and the Moon occupying the 5th be weak, the
person born will either have a barren wife or be
wifeless.
verses:
जीवज्ञौ यदि वा निशाकरसितौ कामे बहुस्त्रीरतः
शुक्र्रे मन्मथराशिगे बलवति स्त्रीणां बहूनां पतिः ॥

If the lords of the 10th, the 2nd and 7th
bhavas occupy the 10th bhava, the person born will
have intrigues with women other than his wife. If the
lords of the 5th, the 9th and the 7th bhavas which are
the initiatory planets in respect to an offspring be in a
दुःस्थान (Dustthana) and if the 5th bhava be aspected by
a malefic planet, the person concerned will be childless.
If Jupiter and Mercury or the Moon and Venus be in
the 7th bhava, the person will be addicted to many
women. If Venus occupying the 7th bhava be strong,
the person concerned will have many wives.
कर्मशवित्तेशकलत्रनाथ मानस्थिता जारमुदाहरन्ति ॥
श्रीधर्मनाथौ सकलत्रनायो दुःस्थानमौ हीनवलो शुभन ।
दृष्टे सुत दारबहुत्वयागे त्वपुत्रयोगं मुनयो वदन्ति ॥

शुक्रारौ मदगौ कलत्ररहिनो धर्मात्मजस्थौ तथा
सत्रस्थानगतौ निशाकरमितौ यद्येकपुत्रो भवेत् ।
लग्नास्तष्ययगेषु पापखचरेष्विन्दौ सुते दुर्बले
वन्ध्यास्त्रीपतिरेव जातमनुजो जायाविहीनोऽथवा ॥

If Venus and Mars be in the 7th bhava,
the person born will be bereft of a wife. The same
effect will follow if the planets be in the 9th and the
5th bhavas. If the Moon and Venus occupy the 6th
bhava, the person concerned will have only one son.
If malefic planets occupy the 1st, the 7th and the 12th
bhavas, and the Moon occupying the 5th be weak, the
person born will either have a barren wife or be
wifeless.

title: चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
content:
S1. 6
चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
849
cf. होरारल
NOTES.
लग्नान्त्यमद्गैः पापैः क्षीणे धीस्थे निशाकरे ।
पुत्रजायाविहीनस्य जायते जन्म निश्चितम् ॥
Also मारावली
द्यूने कुजभार्गवयोर्जातः पुरुषो भवेद्विकलदारः ।
वीधर्मस्थितयोर्वा परिकरूप्यं पण्डितैरेवम् ॥
नग्नव्ययमदनस्यैः पापैः क्षीणे निशाकरे बीस्थे ।
स्त्रीहीनो भवति नरः पुत्रैश्च विवर्जितो न्नम् ।।
Also फल्दीपिका
दारेशे सुतगे प्रणष्टवनितोऽपुत्रोऽथवा धीश्वरो
द्युने वा निधनेश्वरोऽपि कुरुते पत्नी विनाशं ध्रुत्रम् ।
क्षीणेन्दौ सुतंगे व्ययास्ततनुगैः पापैरदारात्मजः
स्त्रीसंगाद्धननाशनं मढ़गयोः म्वर्भानुमान्वोर्वदेत् ।।
If the lord of the 7th house be in the 5th, the native will lose
his wife or become son-less. The loss of the wife is certain if the
lord of the 5th or the 8th house happens to be in the 7th. If the
waning Moon be in the 7th and malefics should occupy the 12th,
the 7th and the Ist houses, the person will be bereft of wife and
children. If the Sun and Rahu be in the 7th house, one ought to
predict loss of wealth through the association of women.
वन्ध्यापतिः सितरवी मदनोदयस्थौ
चन्द्रोदये समगृहे ललनाकृति स्यात् ।
पुंराशिगे पुरुषभावयुतं कलत्रं
स्त्रीपुंग्रहेक्षितयुते सति मिश्ररूपम् ॥ ६ ॥
Sloku 6. If Venus and the Sun be in the 7th or
the 1st bhava, the person born will have a barren wife.
If the house occupied by the Moon be an even sign, his
wife will have the proper female form; if it be a male
Rasi, the wife will have a masculine form; if the house
107

स्त्रीपुंग्रहेक्षितयुते सति मिश्ररूपम् ॥ ६ ॥

If Venus and the Sun be in the 7th or
the 1st bhava, the person born will have a barren wife.
If the house occupied by the Moon be an even sign, his
wife will have the proper female form; if it be a male
Rasi, the wife will have a masculine form; if the house

content:
850
आतकपारिजाते
Adh. XIV.
in which the Moon is be either occupied or aspected by
both male and female planets, she will be of a mixed
aspect.
भौमांशे वा भौमराशौ विलग्रात् कामस्थाने जन्ममे वा वधूनाम् ।
जाया दासी नीचमूढग्रहांशे दुष्टा वा स्याद्यौवने भर्तृहीना ॥७॥
Sloka 7. If the 7th bhava from the Lagna in the
case of males, or the Ist bhava in the case of women,
be either in Mars' house or amsa and if the planet own-
ing the amsa of the 7th bhava be either weak or eclipsed,
the woman concerned will be a servant maid or will
become vicious in her youth, and will be abandoned by
her husband.
शुभांशराशौ यदि सद्गुणाढ्या शुभेक्षिते चारुतरं कलत्रम् !
चन्द्रांशके दुर्बलचन्द्रराशौ जाता पतिघ्नी सबले तु साध्वी ॥ ८ ॥
Sloka 8. If the 7th or the 1st bhava adverted to
in the preceding sloka be in the Rasi or amsa of a
benefic planet, the wife will be virtuous; if aspected
by benefic planets also, she will be amiable all the more.
If the bhava be in the Rasi or amsa owned by the Moon
without strength, the woman will cause the death of
her husband; but if the Moon be strong, she will be a
faithful wife.
अकाशे कुलटा निजोच्चगृहगे साध्वी शुभालोकिते
लग्ने शीतकरेऽथवा मदनमे नीचारिमूढान्विते ।
पापव्यालविहङ्गपाशनिगलद्रेकाण भागान्विते
सन्ध्यंशे विगतव्रता च विधवा जातस्य जाया भवेत् ॥ ९ ॥
Sloka 9. If the Moon occupying the Ist or the
7th bhava be (1) in a Navamsa belonging to the Sun,

the woman concerned will be a servant maid or will
become vicious in her youth, and will be abandoned by

शुभांशराशौ यदि सद्गुणाढ्या शुभेक्षिते चारुतरं कलत्रम् !
चन्द्रांशके दुर्बलचन्द्रराशौ जाता पतिघ्नी सबले तु साध्वी ॥ ८ ॥

If the 7th or the 1st bhava adverted to
in the preceding sloka be in the Rasi or amsa of a
benefic planet, the wife will be virtuous; if aspected

If the bhava be in the Rasi or amsa owned by the Moon
without strength, the woman will cause the death of
her husband; but if the Moon be strong, she will be a
faithful wife.

अकाशे कुलटा निजोच्चगृहगे साध्वी शुभालोकिते
लग्ने शीतकरेऽथवा मदनमे नीचारिमूढान्विते ।

सन्ध्यंशे विगतव्रता च विधवा जातस्य जाया भवेत् ॥ ९ ॥

If the Moon occupying the Ist or the
7th bhava be (1) in a Navamsa belonging to the Sun,

title: चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
content:
SL 10-11
चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
851
the wife of the person born will be unchaste; (2) in its
own or exaltation house and aspected by a benefic pla-
net, she will be virtuous; and (3) in its depression or
inimical house or in a state of eclipse or in a malefic
Drekkana termed सर्प Sarpa, पक्षिन्- Pakshin, पत्श-Pasa, or
निगड-Nigada, (Vide supra Adhyaya 5, sloka 55) or in a
position forming the ऋक्षसन्वि Riksha sandhi, the wife
will become either incontinent or widowed.
कामस्थे तनुपे शुभग्रहयुते सद्वंशजामृच्छति
क्ररर्थे मदगे विलग्नरमणे दुर्वेशजाताङ्गनाम् ।
वर्ण रूपगुणाकृतिं च सकलं यत्तद्गृहोक्तं वदेद्
दुर्व्यापारकरग्रहाकृतिनरप्रीर्ति प्रयात्यङ्गना ॥ १० ॥
Sloka 10. If the lord of the Lagna be in the 7th
bhava and in conjunction with a benefic planet, the
person born will get a wife born of a good family. But
if the 7th bhava occupied by the lord of the Lagna be
a malefic sign, the wife will be a base-born woman.
Her hue, form, attributes, features etc. the astrologer
should declare from those prescribed for the sign
constituting the 7th bhava. The woman finds pleasure
in the man whose features are in conformity with those
of the planet impelling her to evil courses.
पापाप्रकाशसंयुक्ते कलत्रे दुष्टचारिणी ।
रखौ वन्ध्या तु शीतांशौ श्रीणे तु व्यभिचारिणी ॥ ११ ॥
Sloka 11. When the 7th bhava is occupied by a
malefic or an invisible subsidiary planet (उपग्रह-Upa-
graha vide Adhyaya 2 sloka 6), the wife will be wicked.
If the Sun occupy it, she will prove barren; if it be the
waning Moon, she will be unfaithful.
verses:
कामस्थे तनुपे शुभग्रहयुते सद्वंशजामृच्छति
क्ररर्थे मदगे विलग्नरमणे दुर्वेशजाताङ्गनाम् ।
वर्ण रूपगुणाकृतिं च सकलं यत्तद्गृहोक्तं वदेद्
दुर्व्यापारकरग्रहाकृतिनरप्रीर्ति प्रयात्यङ्गना ॥ १० ॥

If the lord of the Lagna be in the 7th
bhava and in conjunction with a benefic planet, the
person born will get a wife born of a good family. But
if the 7th bhava occupied by the lord of the Lagna be
a malefic sign, the wife will be a base-born woman.
Her hue, form, attributes, features etc. the astrologer
should declare from those prescribed for the sign
constituting the 7th bhava. The woman finds pleasure
in the man whose features are in conformity with those
of the planet impelling her to evil courses.

पापाप्रकाशसंयुक्ते कलत्रे दुष्टचारिणी ।
रखौ वन्ध्या तु शीतांशौ श्रीणे तु व्यभिचारिणी ॥ ११ ॥

When the 7th bhava is occupied by a
malefic or an invisible subsidiary planet (उपग्रह-Upa-
graha vide Adhyaya 2 sloka 6), the wife will be wicked.
If the Sun occupy it, she will prove barren; if it be the
waning Moon, she will be unfaithful.

title: Adh. XIV.
content:
852
आतकपारिआते
Adh. XIV.
कुजे तु प्रियते मन्दे दुर्भगा राहुसंयुते ।
परदारोऽरतिस्वार्या निषेकाभावकोऽसुतः ॥ १२ ॥
Sloka 12. If the 7th bhava be occupied by Mars.
the wife will die if by Saturn, she will be disliked by
her husband; if by Rahu, the husband will take to
women not his own, and will find no delight in his
wife and will have no child by her because of the
absence of cohabitation with her.
धूमे विवाइहीनः स्यान्क्रियते कार्मुके सति ।
परिवेषे तु दुःशीला केतौ वन्ध्या सती भवेत् ॥ १३ ॥
Stoku 13. If the 7th bhava be in जून (Dhuma), the
person born will have no marriage; if it be in कार्मुक
(Karmuka), he or his wife will die; if in परिवेष (Pari-
vesha) the wife will be ill-be haved; if in Ketu, she
will be barren but virtuous.
काले विदारः पापे तु गर्भस्त्रावेण संयुता ।
सुशीला स्त्रीप्रसूता च पूर्यमाणे सुधाकरे ॥ १४ ॥
Sloka 14. If the 7th bhava be in काल (Kala), the
person born will be wifeless. If a malfic planet be in
that bhava, the wife will have miscarriage. If it be occu-
pied by the Moon getting full, she will be virtuous and
bring forth children.
बुधे सुपुत्रा वागीशे गुणयुक्ता सुपुत्रिणी ।
शुक्रे सौभाग्यसंयुक्ता श्रीमती च बलान्विते ॥ १५ ॥
Sloka 15. If Mercury be in the 7th bhava, the
wife will bear good offspring; if Jupiter, she will be
virtuous and have excellent progeny. If the 7th bhava
be occupied by Venus in strength, the wife will enjoy
a happy wedded life and will be highly prosperous.
verses:
कुजे तु प्रियते मन्दे दुर्भगा राहुसंयुते ।
परदारोऽरतिस्वार्या निषेकाभावकोऽसुतः ॥

If the 7th bhava be occupied by Mars, the wife will die; if by Saturn, she will be disliked by her husband; if by Rahu, the husband will take to women not his own, and will find no delight in his wife and will have no child by her because of the absence of cohabitation with her.

धूमे विवाइहीनः स्यान्क्रियते कार्मुके सति ।
परिवेषे तु दुःशीला केतौ वन्ध्या सती भवेत् ॥

If the 7th bhava be in जून (Dhuma), the person born will have no marriage; if it be in कार्मुक (Karmuka), he or his wife will die; if in परिवेष (Pari-vesha) the wife will be ill-be haved; if in Ketu, she will be barren but virtuous.

काले विदारः पापे तु गर्भस्त्रावेण संयुता ।
सुशीला स्त्रीप्रसूता च पूर्यमाणे सुधाकरे ॥

If the 7th bhava be in काल (Kala), the person born will be wifeless. If a malfic planet be in that bhava, the wife will have miscarriage. If it be occu-pied by the Moon getting full, she will be virtuous and bring forth children.

बुधे सुपुत्रा वागीशे गुणयुक्ता सुपुत्रिणी ।
शुक्रे सौभाग्यसंयुक्ता श्रीमती च बलान्विते ॥

If Mercury be in the 7th bhava, the wife will bear good offspring; if Jupiter, she will be virtuous and have excellent progeny. If the 7th bhava be occupied by Venus in strength, the wife will enjoy a happy wedded life and will be highly prosperous.

title: चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
content:
SL. 16-17
चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
859
स्त्रीपुत्रपे बलिनि शोभनखेटदृष्टे
षष्ठाधिपेन सहिते सति वीक्षिते वा ।
जारेण पुत्रजनिलाभमुपैति जाया
तस्या धत्रो बहुकलत्रयुतोऽप्यपुत्रः ॥ १६ ॥
Sloka 16. If the lord of the 7th or 5th bhava
possessing strength and aspected by a benefic planet be
in conjunction with or aspected by the lord of 6th,
the wife will acquire a son by a paramour. Her hus
band, though he may be possessed of many wives, will
be childless.
See X111-15 supra.
NOTES.
नीचे गुरौ मदनगे सति नष्टदारो
मीने कलत्रभवने रविजे तथैव ।
मन्दारराशिनवभागगते सुरेज्ये
जारो भवेदिनसुतारसमन्विते वा ॥ १७ ॥
Sloka 17. When Jupiter occupies the 7th bhava
in depression, the person born will lose his wife. If
Saturn occupy the 7th bhava identical with Meena, the
effect will be the same If Jupiter occupy a Rasi or
Navamsa owned by Saturn or Mars, the person con
cerned will have intrigues with other women. The
effect follows also when Jupiter is in conjunction with
Saturn or Mars.
NOTES.
First half For this and some more yogas relating to loss
of wife, of, फहदीपिका
शुक्रे वृश्चिकगे मंद मृतवधूः काम वृषस्थ बुधे
स्त्रीनाशस्त्त्वथ नीचगे सुरगुरौ धूनाधिरूढे तथा ।
verses:
स्त्रीपुत्रपे बलिनि शोभनखेटदृष्टे
षष्ठाधिपेन सहिते सति वीक्षिते वा ।
जारेण पुत्रजनिलाभमुपैति जाया
तस्या धत्रो बहुकलत्रयुतोऽप्यपुत्रः ॥ १६ ॥

If the lord of the 7th or 5th bhava
possessing strength and aspected by a benefic planet be
in conjunction with or aspected by the lord of 6th,
the wife will acquire a son by a paramour. Her hus
band, though he may be possessed of many wives, will
be childless.
नीचे गुरौ मदनगे सति नष्टदारो
मीने कलत्रभवने रविजे तथैव ।
मन्दारराशिनवभागगते सुरेज्ये
जारो भवेदिनसुतारसमन्विते वा ॥ १७ ॥

When Jupiter occupies the 7th bhava
in depression, the person born will lose his wife. If
Saturn occupy the 7th bhava identical with Meena, the
effect will be the same If Jupiter occupy a Rasi or
Navamsa owned by Saturn or Mars, the person con
cerned will have intrigues with other women. The
effect follows also when Jupiter is in conjunction with
Saturn or Mars.
शुक्रे वृश्चिकगे मंद मृतवधूः काम वृषस्थ बुधे
स्त्रीनाशस्त्त्वथ नीचगे सुरगुरौ धूनाधिरूढे तथा ।

title: Adh. XIV.
content:
854
बातकपारिवाते
Adh. XIV.
जमित्रे झषगे शनौ सति तथा भौमेऽथवा स्त्रीसृति-
श्चन्द्रक्षेत्नगयोर्मदेऽर्किकुजयोः पत्नी सती शोभना ॥
When Venus occupies Vrischika identical with the 7th house,
the wife of the person born will die soon). The same will be the
effect when Mercury is in Vrishabha identical with the 7th house
or when Jupiter occupies the 7th and is in depression, or when
Saturn or Mars is posited in Meena identical with the 7th house.
If Saturn and Mars are in the 7th house identical with Cancer,
the wife of the person concerned will be of a good disposition and
fortunate.
अस्ते वास्तपता वसइहयुते दृष्टेऽव्यसन्मध्यगे
नीचारातिगृहेऽर्ककान्त्यभिहते ब्रूयात्कलत्रच्युतिम् ।
कामे वा सुतभाग्ययोर्विकलदारोऽसौ सपापे भृगौ ॥
If the 7th house or its lord be associated with, aspected by, or
posited betwixt malefics, or be in depression or inimical sign or
be eclipsed by the Sun's rays, one ought to predict loss of wife.
Venus in conjunction with a malefic occupying the 7th, 5th or 9th
house will make the native bereft of a wife.
कलत्रनाथे रिपुनीचसंस्थे मूढेऽथवा पापनिरीक्षित वा ।
कलत्रभे पापयुतेऽथदृष्टे कलत्रहानि प्रवदन्ति सन्तः ॥
If the lord of the 7th occupies an inimical or depression sign
or be eclipsed or be aspected by malefics, and the 7th house be
associated with or aspected by malefics, there will be loss of
wife; so say the wise.
Latter half. According to Mantreswara, it is Venus (and
not Jupiter) if in a Varga of Mars or Saturn that makes the native
immoral.
शुके वा कुजमन्दवर्गसहिते दृष्टे परस्त्रीरतः ॥
When Venus is in a वर्ग (Varga) of Mars or Saturn, or has the
aspect of these planets, the person born will have a liaison wtih
other people's wives.
verses:
जमित्रे झषगे शनौ सति तथा भौमेऽथवा स्त्रीसृति-
श्चन्द्रक्षेत्नगयोर्मदेऽर्किकुजयोः पत्नी सती शोभना ॥

Saturn or Mars is posited in Meena identical with the 7th house.
If Saturn and Mars are in the 7th house identical with Cancer,
the wife of the person concerned will be of a good disposition and
fortunate.

अस्ते वास्तपता वसइहयुते दृष्टेऽव्यसन्मध्यगे
नीचारातिगृहेऽर्ककान्त्यभिहते ब्रूयात्कलत्रच्युतिम् ।
कामे वा सुतभाग्ययोर्विकलदारोऽसौ सपापे भृगौ ॥

house will make the native bereft of a wife.

कलत्रनाथे रिपुनीचसंस्थे मूढेऽथवा पापनिरीक्षित वा ।
कलत्रभे पापयुतेऽथदृष्टे कलत्रहानि प्रवदन्ति सन्तः ॥

If the lord of the 7th occupies an inimical or depression sign
or be eclipsed or be aspected by malefics, and the 7th house be
associated with or aspected by malefics, there will be loss of
wife; so say the wise.
शुके वा कुजमन्दवर्गसहिते दृष्टे परस्त्रीरतः ॥

When Venus is in a वर्ग (Varga) of Mars or Saturn, or has the
aspect of these planets, the person born will have a liaison wtih
other people's wives.

title: चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 18-19
चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
855
सप्तमे वाष्टमे पापे व्ययस्ये घरणीसुते ।
अदृश्ये यदि तमाथे कलत्रान्तरभाग्भवेत् ॥ १८ ॥
Sloka 18. If a malefic planet occupy the 7th or
the 8th bhava and Mars be in the 12th, and if the lord
thereof be invisible, the person born will have another
wife.
NOTES-
The following sloka from फलदीपिका gives some more yogas for
having two wives:
भौमार्क्सस्ते भृगुजशशिनोर्दारहीनोऽसुतो वा
क्लीबेऽस्ते वा भवति भवगौ द्वौ पहौ त्रीद्वयं स्थात ।
द्वन्द्वर्भाशे मदपतिसितौ तस्य जायाद्वयं स्यात्
ताम्यां युक्तैर्गगन निलयैर्दारसंख्यां वदन्तु ॥
If Venus and the Moon are in opposition to Mars and Saturn
in any nativity, the person concerned will be either wifeless or
issueless; when there is a hermaphrodite planet in the 7th house.
and the 11th house is occupied by two planets, the person will
have two wives. If the lord of the 7th house and Venus be each
posited in a dual Rasi or Amsa, the person will have two wives.
Generally one ought to predict the number of wives in such cases
through the number of the planets in conjunction with those two
viz.. the lord of the 7th and Venus.
सुपक्वजातं प्रथमं कलं लग्नेश्वरो दारपसंयुतश्चेत् ।
दिनेशकान्त्याभिहतस्तदानीं सुरूपहीनां सुतरां वदन्ति ॥ १९ ॥
Sloka 19. If the lord of the Lagna be in conjunc
tion with that of the 7th, the person born will get a
mature excellent wife. If the lord of the Lagna in the
above position be at the same time obscured by the Sun,
the wife will be entirely devoid of good features.
verses:
सप्तमे वाष्टमे पापे व्ययस्ये घरणीसुते ।
अदृश्ये यदि तमाथे कलत्रान्तरभाग्भवेत् ॥

If a malefic planet occupy the 7th or
the 8th bhava and Mars be in the 12th, and if the lord
thereof be invisible, the person born will have another
wife.

भौमार्क्सस्ते भृगुजशशिनोर्दारहीनोऽसुतो वा

ताम्यां युक्तैर्गगन निलयैर्दारसंख्यां वदन्तु ॥

If Venus and the Moon are in opposition to Mars and Saturn
in any nativity, the person concerned will be either wifeless or
issueless; when there is a hermaphrodite planet in the 7th house.
and the 11th house is occupied by two planets, the person will
have two wives. If the lord of the 7th house and Venus be each
posited in a dual Rasi or Amsa, the person will have two wives.
Generally one ought to predict the number of wives in such cases
through the number of the planets in conjunction with those two
viz., the lord of the 7th and Venus.

सुपक्वजातं प्रथमं कलं लग्नेश्वरो दारपसंयुतश्चेत् ।
दिनेशकान्त्याभिहतस्तदानीं सुरूपहीनां सुतरां वदन्ति ॥

If the lord of the Lagna be in conjunc
tion with that of the 7th, the person born will get a
mature excellent wife. If the lord of the Lagna in the
above position be at the same time obscured by the Sun,
the wife will be entirely devoid of good features.

title: Adh. XIV.
content:
856
आतकपारिबाटै
Adh. XIV.
विचे पापबहुत्वे च कलत्रेशे तथा स्थिते ।
पापग्रहेण संदृष्टे कलत्रत्रयमाग्भवेत् ॥ २० ॥
Sloka 20. When there are several malefic planets
in the 2nd bhava and the lord of the 7th is likewise
there aspected by a malefic planet, the person born will
have three wives.
व. सर्वार्थचिन्तामाणे
वित्ते पापचहुत्वे तु कलत्रे वा तथाविधे ।
तदीशे पापसंदृष्टे कलत्रत्रयभाग्भवेत् ।।
केन्द्रत्रिकोणे दारेशे स्वोच्चमित्रस्ववर्गगे ।
कर्माधिपेन वा दृष्टे बहुत्रीसहितो भवेत् ।। २१ ।।
Sloka 21. When the lord of the 7th bhava occu-
pying a Kendra or Kona is in its own, exaltation, or
friendly sign or is aspected by the lord of the 10th
bhava, the person born will be associated with many
wives.
कलत्राधिपतौ केन्द्रे शुभग्रहनिरीक्षिते ।
शुभांश शुभराशौ वा पत्नी व्रतपरायणा ॥ २२ ॥
Sloka 22. When the lord of the 7th bhava is in a
Kendra and is aspected by a benefic planet or is in a
benefic Navamsa or Rasi, the wife will be devoted to
the observance of vowe
दाराधिपे सोमसुते सपापे नीचारिवर्गे रिपुनाशभावे ।
पापान्तरे पापदृशा समेते जाया पतिघ्नी कुलनाशिनी स्यात् ॥
Sloka 23. If the lord of the 7th bhava be Mercury
in a depression or inimical varga and associated with a
malefic planet, and if it also occupy the 6th or the 8th
bhava, in the midst of two malefic planets and aspected
verses:
विचे पापबहुत्वे च कलत्रेशे तथा स्थिते ।
पापग्रहेण संदृष्टे कलत्रत्रयमाग्भवेत् ॥

When there are several malefic planets in the 2nd bhava and the lord of the 7th is likewise there aspected by a malefic planet, the person born will have three wives.
वित्ते पापचहुत्वे तु कलत्रे वा तथाविधे ।
तदीशे पापसंदृष्टे कलत्रत्रयभाग्भवेत् ॥

केन्द्रत्रिकोणे दारेशे स्वोच्चमित्रस्ववर्गगे ।
कर्माधिपेन वा दृष्टे बहुत्रीसहितो भवेत् ॥

When the lord of the 7th bhava occupying a Kendra or Kona is in its own, exaltation, or friendly sign or is aspected by the lord of the 10th bhava, the person born will be associated with many wives.
कलत्राधिपतौ केन्द्रे शुभग्रहनिरीक्षिते ।
शुभांश शुभराशौ वा पत्नी व्रतपरायणा ॥

When the lord of the 7th bhava is in a Kendra and is aspected by a benefic planet or is in a benefic Navamsa or Rasi, the wife will be devoted to the observance of vowe
दाराधिपे सोमसुते सपापे नीचारिवर्गे रिपुनाशभावे ।
पापान्तरे पापदृशा समेते जाया पतिघ्नी कुलनाशिनी स्यात् ॥

If the lord of the 7th bhava be Mercury in a depression or inimical varga and associated with a malefic planet, and if it also occupy the 6th or the 8th bhava, in the midst of two malefic planets and aspected

title: चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 24-25
चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
857
by a malefic planet, the wife will kill her husband and
ruin his family.
NOTES.
This as well as siokas 25, 26, 27, 28, 29, 30, 31, 32, 34, 37
38, 39, 40, 41, 45 & 4 are in जतिकरल.
The same effect is ascribed to a different yoga in होरारत्न
शनिकुजौ मदगो मदनाधिपो निधनगोऽपि स्पिव्ययगोऽथवा ।
मरणमेति तदा स्वकलत्रतस्त्वथ रविर्विषदा वनिता भवेत् ॥
शुभांशे शुभसंदृष्टे नाथे जाया सुवंशजा ।
पापारूढे पापवर्गे तस्य जाया कुवंशजा ॥ २४ ॥
Sloka 24. If the lord of the 7th bhava occupy a
benefic Navamsa and be aspected by a benefic planet,
the wife will be of a good family. But if the lord of
the bhava be in a malefic varga already occupied by a
malefic planet, the wife will be base-born.
कामस्थाने सखेटे सितयुतखचरैर्दारसंख्यां वदन्ति
खोच्चस्थव्योमवासो न भवति गणने शुक्रयुक्तग्रहैर्वा ।
जायाधीशे सितर्श्वे सति धनभवने शुक्रसंयुक्तसंख्या
शुक्रानङ्गेश युक्तद्य चरनववधूवल्लभो जायते वा ॥ २५ ॥
Sloka 25. If the 7th bhava he occupied by a planet,
the number of wives is declared by astrologers to be the
number of planets in conjunction with Venus. Out of
the above number, any planet that occupies its Swakshe.
tra or exaltation is to be omitted. If the lord of the
7th bhava occupy the 2nd, identical with a sign owned
by Venus, the number of wives will be the number of
planets associated with Venus; or it may be that the
person concerned may get as many new brides as there
are planets in conjunction with Venus and the lord of
the 7th bhava.
108
verses:
शनिकुजौ मदगो मदनाधिपो निधनगोऽपि स्पिव्ययगोऽथवा ।
मरणमेति तदा स्वकलत्रतस्त्वथ रविर्विषदा वनिता भवेत् ॥

शुभांशे शुभसंदृष्टे नाथे जाया सुवंशजा ।
पापारूढे पापवर्गे तस्य जाया कुवंशजा ॥ २४ ॥

If the lord of the 7th bhava occupy a
benefic Navamsa and be aspected by a benefic planet,
the wife will be of a good family. But if the lord of
the bhava be in a malefic varga already occupied by a
malefic planet, the wife will be base-born.
कामस्थाने सखेटे सितयुतखचरैर्दारसंख्यां वदन्ति
खोच्चस्थव्योमवासो न भवति गणने शुक्रयुक्तग्रहैर्वा ।
जायाधीशे सितर्श्वे सति धनभवने शुक्रसंयुक्तसंख्या
शुक्रानङ्गेश युक्तद्य चरनववधूवल्लभो जायते वा ॥ २५ ॥

If the 7th bhava be occupied by a planet,
the number of wives is declared by astrologers to be the
number of planets in conjunction with Venus. Out of
the above number, any planet that occupies its Swakshe.
tra or exaltation is to be omitted. If the lord of the
7th bhava occupy the 2nd, identical with a sign owned
by Venus, the number of wives will be the number of
planets associated with Venus; or it may be that the
person concerned may get as many new brides as there
are planets in conjunction with Venus and the lord of
the 7th bhava.

content:
858
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. XIV.
दारेशेन कुटुम्बपेन सहिता यावगहा दुर्बलाः
तत्संख्याककलत्रनाशनकरा दुःस्थाननाथा यदि ।
यावन्तो बलशालिनः शुभकरास्तत्तल्यजायासुखं
कुर्वन्त्येकवियच्चरो बलयुतो यद्येकदारो भवेत् ॥ २६ ॥
Sloka 26. How many weak planets there may be
that are in conjunction with the lord of the 7th or of
the 2nd bhava and are at the same time the lords of the
6th, the 8th or the 12th bhava (दुःस्थान - Dustthana), so
many will be the wives to be destroyed by them. The
more there are benefic strong planets associated with
the lords of the two bhavas above named, the more will
be the wives with whom the person born will live
happily. If a single planet possessing great strength be
associated with the lord of the 7th or of the 2nd bhava,
the person concerned will have but one wife.
cf. फलदीपिका
NOTES.
स्त्रीसंख्यां मद्गैग्रहैर्मृतिमसत्खेटैश्च सद्भिः स्थितिं
यूनेशे सत्रले शुभे सति वधूः साध्वी सुपुत्रान्विता ।
पापोऽपि स्वगृहं गतः शुभकरः पत्न्याश्च कामस्थितो
हित्वा षद्व्ययरन्ध्रपान्मदनगाः सौम्यास्तु सौख्यावहाः ।॥
It is through the (number of) planets in the 7th house that
one ought to divine the number of women that a person may
associate with. Of these, the number that will die (at an early
age) will correspond to the number (of planets in the 7th house)
that are malefic, while the number of benefics will denote the
number that will survive. If the lord of the 7th be benefic and
possessed of strength, the native will have a good-natured woman
as his partner and be endowed with good children. Even a malefic
will do good to the wife if he shall be in the 7th owning that
house. Benefics in the 7th will be productive of good unless they
happen to be the lords of the 6th, 8th and 12th houses.
verses:
दारेशेन कुटुम्बपेन सहिता यावगहा दुर्बलाः
तत्संख्याककलत्रनाशनकरा दुःस्थाननाथा यदि ।
यावन्तो बलशालिनः शुभकरास्तत्तल्यजायासुखं
कुर्वन्त्येकवियच्चरो बलयुतो यद्येकदारो भवेत् ॥ २६ ॥

How many weak planets there may be
that are in conjunction with the lord of the 7th or of
the 2nd bhava and are at the same time the lords of the
6th, the 8th or the 12th bhava (दुःस्थान - Dustthana), so

more there are benefic strong planets associated with
the lords of the two bhavas above named, the more will

the person concerned will have but one wife.

स्त्रीसंख्यां मद्गैग्रहैर्मृतिमसत्खेटैश्च सद्भिः स्थितिं
यूनेशे सत्रले शुभे सति वधूः साध्वी सुपुत्रान्विता ।
पापोऽपि स्वगृहं गतः शुभकरः पत्न्याश्च कामस्थितो
हित्वा षद्व्ययरन्ध्रपान्मदनगाः सौम्यास्तु सौख्यावहाः ।॥

It is through the (number of) planets in the 7th house that
one ought to divine the number of women that a person may

happen to be the lords of the 6th, 8th and 12th houses.

title: चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
content:
SL. 27
चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
859
Also cf. जात करत्न
स्वलें कलत्राधिपतौ कुटुम्बनाथे यदा त्वेककलत्रभाकु स्यात् ।
ताभ्यां समेतैगृहनायकैर्चा कलत्रसंख्यां प्रवदन्ति सन्तः ॥
लग्नानङ्गपतिस्फुटैक्यगृहगे जीवे विवाहं वदेत्
चन्द्राधिष्ठिततारकावधपयोरैक्यांशके वा तथा ।
जीवे मित्रनवांशके बलयुते यद्येकदारान्त्रितः
स्वांशे द्वित्रिकलत्रवान् बहुवधूनाथः स्वतुङ्गांशके ॥ २७ ॥
Sloka 27. Add together the figures for the lords
of the Lagna and the 7th bhava. Find the Rasi, etc.,
indicated by the result. When Jupiter traverses the
Rasi, etc., above found, the astrologer may predict a
person's marriage. The time of marriage may also be
determined in the same way in respect to the total of
the figures for the ruler of the stars occupied by the
Moon and the lord of the 7th bhava. If the Navamsa
occupied by Jupiter belong to a friend, the person con-
cerned will have but one wife. If the amsa in question
be Jupiter's own, the number of wives will be 2 or 3.
If the amsa be that of Jupiter's exaltation, the persor
concerned will be the lord of many wives.
NOTES.
According to फलदीपिका the probable time for marriage is thus
ascertained:
शुक्रोऽस्तो वा तनुनाथभांशकत्रिकोणमायाति तदा विवाहः ॥
The marriage may be expected to come off when Venus or the
lord of the 7th house in its orbit transits through a sign which is
triangular to the Rasi or Navamsa owned by the lord of the Lagna
कलत्र संस्थस्य कलत्रदृष्टेर्दशागमे वाऽथ कलत्रपस्य ।
यदा विलग्नाधिपतिः प्रयाति कलत्रमं तत्र कलत्रलाभः ॥
The acquisition of a wife may happen during the dasa period
verses:
स्वलें कलत्राधिपतौ कुटुम्बनाथे यदा त्वेककलत्रभाकु स्यात् ।
ताभ्यां समेतैगृहनायकैर्चा कलत्रसंख्यां प्रवदन्ति सन्तः ॥

लग्नानङ्गपतिस्फुटैक्यगृहगे जीवे विवाहं वदेत्
चन्द्राधिष्ठिततारकावधपयोरैक्यांशके वा तथा ।
जीवे मित्रनवांशके बलयुते यद्येकदारान्त्रितः
स्वांशे द्वित्रिकलत्रवान् बहुवधूनाथः स्वतुङ्गांशके ॥ २७ ॥

Sloka 27. Add together the figures for the lords
of the Lagna and the 7th bhava. Find the Rasi, etc.,
indicated by the result. When Jupiter traverses the
Rasi, etc., above found, the astrologer may predict a
person's marriage. The time of marriage may also be
determined in the same way in respect to the total of
the figures for the ruler of the stars occupied by the
Moon and the lord of the 7th bhava. If the Navamsa
occupied by Jupiter belong to a friend, the person con-
cerned will have but one wife. If the amsa in question
be Jupiter's own, the number of wives will be 2 or 3.
If the amsa be that of Jupiter's exaltation, the person
concerned will be the lord of many wives.
शुक्रोऽस्तो वा तनुनाथभांशकत्रिकोणमायाति तदा विवाहः ॥

The marriage may be expected to come off when Venus or the
lord of the 7th house in its orbit transits through a sign which is
triangular to the Rasi or Navamsa owned by the lord of the Lagna
कलत्र संस्थस्य कलत्रदृष्टेर्दशागमे वाऽथ कलत्रपस्य ।
यदा विलग्नाधिपतिः प्रयाति कलत्रमं तत्र कलत्रलाभः ॥

The acquisition of a wife may happen during the dasa period

content:
860
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. XIV.
of the planet (1) posited in the 7th house, or (2) aspecting the 7th
house. The same may also happen when the lord of the Lagna in
his orbit comes to the Rasi signifying the 7th house.
कलत्रनाथस्थितभांशकेशयोः सितक्षपानायकयोर्बलीयसः ।
दशागमे द्यनपयुक्तभांशकत्रिकोणगे देवगुरौ करग्रहः ॥ २८ ॥
Sloka 28. Of the two planets that are the lords
respectively of the Rasi and Navamsa occupied by the
lord of the 7th bhava, find which is stronger. During
the dasa period of that planet, the marriage of the person
may take place, when Jupiter traverses the Trikona of
the Rasi and amsa occupied by the lord of the 7th bhava.
Again, find the stronger of the two planets Venus and
the Moon. During the dasa period of the stronger
planet, the period favourable to marriage may be found
in the same manner as in the above case.
शुक्रोपेतकलत्रराशिपदशा भुक्तिर्विवाहप्रदा
लग्नाद्वित्तपतिस्थराशिपदशामुक्तौ च पाणिग्रहः ।
कर्मायुर्भवनाधिनायकदशामुक्तौ विवाहः क्रमात्
कामेशेन युतः कलत्रगृहगस्तत्पाकभुक्तौ तु वा ॥ २९ ॥
Sloka 29. If the lord of the 7th bhava be associa-
ted with Venus, its Dasa and Bhukti may lead to
marriage. Failing that, the Dasa and Bhukti of the lord
of the Rasi occupied by the planet owning the 2nd
bhava may have marriage-producing efficacy. The Dasa
and Bhukti of the lords of the 10th and the 9th bhavas
come next in order. Lastly, note the planet associated
with the lord of the 7th bhava or the one occupying it.
During the Dasa and Bhukti of one of these, marriage
may take place.
verses:
कलत्रनाथस्थितभांशकेशयोः सितक्षपानायकयोर्बलीयसः ।
दशागमे द्यनपयुक्तभांशकत्रिकोणगे देवगुरौ करग्रहः ॥

Of the two planets that are the lords
respectively of the Rasi and Navamsa occupied by the
lord of the 7th bhava, find which is stronger. During
the dasa period of that planet, the marriage of the person
may take place, when Jupiter traverses the Trikona of
the Rasi and amsa occupied by the lord of the 7th bhava.
Again, find the stronger of the two planets Venus and
the Moon. During the dasa period of the stronger
planet, the period favourable to marriage may be found
in the same manner as in the above case.

शुक्रोपेतकलत्रराशिपदशा भुक्तिर्विवाहप्रदा
लग्नाद्वित्तपतिस्थराशिपदशामुक्तौ च पाणिग्रहः ।
कर्मायुर्भवनाधिनायकदशामुक्तौ विवाहः क्रमात्
कामेशेन युतः कलत्रगृहगस्तत्पाकभुक्तौ तु वा ॥

If the lord of the 7th bhava be associa-
ted with Venus, its Dasa and Bhukti may lead to
marriage. Failing that, the Dasa and Bhukti of the lord
of the Rasi occupied by the planet owning the 2nd
bhava may have marriage-producing efficacy. The Dasa
and Bhukti of the lords of the 10th and the 9th bhavas
come next in order. Lastly, note the planet associated
with the lord of the 7th bhava or the one occupying it.
During the Dasa and Bhukti of one of these, marriage
may take place.

title: चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 30-31
चतुर्दशोऽध्यायः
NOTES.
861
It is, perhaps, implied here that each succeeding alternative
is to be resorted to when the preceding one is found to be not pro-
mising because of the weakness, etc., of the planet concerned.
सौम्यव्योमचरः स्थितः शुभगृहे चादौ ददाति श्रियं
पापर्धे शुभखेचरो यदि दशामध्ये विवाहादिकम् ।
करः पापगृहोपगो यदि फलं पाकावसाने तथा
सौम्यर्थे यदि सर्वकालफलदः सौम्यान्वितः शोभनः ॥३०॥
Sloka 30. If the planet powerful for producing
marriage be benefic and in a benefic house, it will bring
on the happy event at the commencement of its Dasa.
If the planet, being itself benefic, should occupy a male-
fic house, the marriage and other such happy events
will take place in the middle of its Dasa. If the planet
and the house it occupies be both malefic, the event in
question will happen at the end of its Dasa. But if the
planet in question occupy a benefic house and be in
conjunction with a benefic planet at the same time, its
influence for good will prevail during the whole of its
Dasa period.
लग्नेश्वरस्थितनवांशपतिस्वराशौ
चन्द्रे पुरन्दरगुरौ च कलत्रलाभम् ।
कामेश शुक्रगृहगेऽमरमन्त्रिणीन्दौ
केन्द्रेऽथवा गुरुयुते सति गोचरेण ॥ ३१ ॥
Sloka 31. Astrologers say that the acquisition of
a wife may take place when the Moon and Jupiter in
their progress arrive at the 2nd place from the lord of
the Navamsa occupied by the lord of the Lagna at the
birth of the person concerned. The same event may
also happen when Jupiter reaches a sign occupied by
verses:
सौम्यव्योमचरः स्थितः शुभगृहे चादौ ददाति श्रियं
पापर्धे शुभखेचरो यदि दशामध्ये विवाहादिकम् ।

सौम्यर्थे यदि सर्वकालफलदः सौम्यान्वितः शोभनः ॥३०॥

If the planet, being itself benefic, should occupy a male-
fic house, the marriage and other such happy events
