रन्ध्रस्थतन्नाथतदंशपानां दशापहारे मृतिमाहुरार्याः ॥

content:
960
कातकपारिजाते
Adh. XVI.
Sloka 45. When auspicious planets occupy the
2nd bhava, say the revered seniors, the female concerned
will have her death at the time of the ripening of their
Dasas and during the Antardasa and Apahara of the
planet occupying the 8th bhava, its lord or the lord of
the Navamsa wherein is the lord of the 8th bhava
(whichever of them may have predominant strength).
सहजभवननाथे पुंग्रहे पुंग्रहर्थे
पुरुषखचरयुक्ते पुंग्रहालोकिते वा ।
नयनभवनकेन्द्रे कोणगे वा बलिष्ठे
बहुधनसुखवन्तं सोदरं याति जाता ॥ ४६ ॥
Sloka 46. When the lord of the 3rd bhava hap-
pens to be a male planet of predominant strength
occupying a male sign identical witn 'the 2nd, a Kendra
or a Kona bhava and is aspected by or in conjunction
with a male planet, the girl born will have a brother
destined to enjoy much wealth and happiness.
सहोदरस्थानपलाभनाथौ विलग्नतः पञ्चमराशियातौ ।
नृपालतेजोगुणरूपवन्तं सहोदरं जातवधूः समेति ॥ ४७ ॥
Sloka 17. The girl at whose birth the lords of the
3rd and the 11th bhavas from the Lagna occupy the 5th
bhava will have a brother endowed with the spirit, the
virtues and the majestic mien of a ruler of men.
॥ अथ पतिलक्षणम् ॥
यस्या मन्मथमन्दिरे गतबले शून्ये खलालोकिते
सौम्यव्योमनिवासदृष्टिरहिते भर्ता नरः को भवेत् ।
क्लीबः स्यात्पतिरस्तगे शशिसुते सार्कात्मजे दुर्भगा
वन्ध्या वा तरुणी चरे मदगृहे नित्यं प्रवासान्वितः ॥ ४८ ॥
verses:
सहजभवननाथे पुंग्रहे पुंग्रहर्थे
पुरुषखचरयुक्ते पुंग्रहालोकिते वा ।
नयनभवनकेन्द्रे कोणगे वा बलिष्ठे
बहुधनसुखवन्तं सोदरं याति जाता ॥

When the lord of the 3rd bhava hap-
pens to be a male planet of predominant strength
occupying a male sign identical witn 'the 2nd, a Kendra
or a Kona bhava and is aspected by or in conjunction
with a male planet, the girl born will have a brother
destined to enjoy much wealth and happiness.

सहोदरस्थानपलाभनाथौ विलग्नतः पञ्चमराशियातौ ।
नृपालतेजोगुणरूपवन्तं सहोदरं जातवधूः समेति ॥

The girl at whose birth the lords of the
3rd and the 11th bhavas from the Lagna occupy the 5th
bhava will have a brother endowed with the spirit, the
virtues and the majestic mien of a ruler of men.

यस्या मन्मथमन्दिरे गतबले शून्ये खलालोकिते
सौम्यव्योमनिवासदृष्टिरहिते भर्ता नरः को भवेत् ।
क्लीबः स्यात्पतिरस्तगे शशिसुते सार्कात्मजे दुर्भगा
वन्ध्या वा तरुणी चरे मदगृहे नित्यं प्रवासान्वितः ॥

If the lord of the 7th house is weak, in an empty sign, aspected by malefics, and without the aspect of benefics, who will be the husband? If the husband is impotent, or if the wife is unfortunate, barren, or a young woman who is always travelling, then the husband will be born in the sign of Saturn.

title: चौवोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 48-49
चौवोऽध्यायः
961
Sloka 48. When the 7th bhava is without strength,
unoccupied and aspected not by a benefic but by a
malefic planet, the female born will have a contemptible
wretch for her husband; when Mercury is in the 7th
bhava, the husband will be impotent; if Saturn be asso-
ciated with Mercury in the same bhava, the woman
will be barren or loathed by her husband; when a
moveable sign represents the 7th bhava, he will always
be away from home.
NOTES.
Perhaps the reading must be भर्ता भवेत् कानरः (कानर = कापुरुष).
Cf. गर्गजातक quoted in होरारल.
शुद्धेऽस्ते दुर्बले यस्याः पापग्रहनिरीक्षिते ।
सौम्यग्रहदृशा हीने भर्ता कापुरुषो भवेत् ।।
बुधमन्दयुतेऽस्ते च पतिः क्लीबसमो भवेत् ।
वन्ध्या वा दुर्भगा वाऽपि सा च नित्यं प्रवासिनी ॥
सप्तमे चरराशौ च तदीशे चरभांशके ।
भर्ता प्रवासशीलः स्यात् स्थिरमे स्वगृहे वसेत् ॥
Also जातकाभरण
शुन्ये मन्मथमन्दिरे शुभखगैर्नालोकिने निर्बले
बालायाः किल नायको मुनिवरैः कापूरुषः कीर्तितः ।
जामित्रं बुधमन्दयोर्यदि गृहं षण्ढो भवेन्निश्चितं
राशौ तत्र चरें विदेशनिरनो द्वचने न मिश्रस्थितिः ॥
Also बृहज्जातक
शून्ये कापुरुषोऽत्रलेऽस्तभवने सौम्यग्रहावीक्षित
क्लीबोऽस्ते बुधमन्दयोश्चरगृहे नित्यं प्रवासान्त्रितः ॥
स्वांशे भास्वति कामगे मृदुरतिक्रीडाविनोदी पतिः
चन्द्रे सौख्यम्मुपैति भूमितनयो जारो वधूतत्परः ।
विद्वान् चन्द्रसुते जितेन्द्रियवरो जीवे मदस्थानगे
शुक्रे कान्तवपुः सुखी च रविजे वृद्धोऽतिमूर्खी भवेत् ४९
121
verses:
Sloka 48. When the 7th bhava is without strength,
unoccupied and aspected not by a benefic but by a
malefic planet, the female born will have a contemptible
wretch for her husband; when Mercury is in the 7th
bhava, the husband will be impotent; if Saturn be asso-
ciated with Mercury in the same bhava, the woman
will be barren or loathed by her husband; when a
moveable sign represents the 7th bhava, he will always
be away from home.

शुद्धेऽस्ते दुर्बले यस्याः पापग्रहनिरीक्षिते ।

राशौ तत्र चरें विदेशनिरनो द्वचने न मिश्रस्थितिः ॥

शून्ये कापुरुषोऽत्रलेऽस्तभवने सौम्यग्रहावीक्षित
क्लीबोऽस्ते बुधमन्दयोश्चरगृहे नित्यं प्रवासान्त्रितः ॥

स्वांशे भास्वति कामगे मृदुरतिक्रीडाविनोदी पतिः

विद्वान् चन्द्रसुते जितेन्द्रियवरो जीवे मदस्थानगे
शुक्रे कान्तवपुः सुखी च रविजे वृद्धोऽतिमूर्खी भवेत् ४९

content:
962
जातकपारिजाते
Adb. XVI.
Sloka 49. When the Sun occupies its own Na-
vamsa in the 7th bhava, the female born will have a
husband gentle and diverting by his excessive playful-
ness. When the Moon occupies such a position, she
will be happy; when Mars is in the same position, the
husband will be devoted to his wife though playing the
gallant towards other women; if the planet occupying
its own Navamsa in the 7th bhava be Mercury, the
husband will be learned; if Jupiter be in that bhava, the
female concerned will get a spouse who will have all his
senses under control; if it be Venus, the husband will
be handsome and voluptuous; lastly, if it be Saturn, he
will be an old dolt.
NOTES.
cf. गर्गजातक quoted in होरारल.
अस्तेऽके स्वांशगे स्वलें भर्ता रतिपरो मृदुः ।
चन्द्रेऽस्ते स्वर्क्षगे स्वांशे मृदुस्मरवशः पतिः ॥
भौमेऽस्ते स्वांशके क्षेत्रे स्त्रीलोलो निर्धनः पतिः ।
सौम्येऽस्ते स्वांशके क्षेत्रे भर्ता विद्वान्भवेत् सुखी ॥
जीवेऽस्ते स्वांशके स्वक्ष गुणवान् विजितेन्द्रियः ।
शुक्रेऽस्ते स्वांशके क्षेत्रे कन्यासौभाग्यवान् सुखी ॥
मन्देऽस्ते स्वांशके क्षेत्रे वृद्धो मूर्खा भवेत् पतिः ।
एवं सप्तमराशिस्थैर्महेर्नृणां वदेत् फलम् ॥
स्यान्मार्दवाङ्गो गुणवान् प्रगल्भो जामित्रराश्यंशकजा तु याऽस्याः ।
सौरेऽस्तगे स्वांशगृहोपयाते वृद्धोऽतिमूर्खः पतिरेव तस्याः ॥ ५० ॥
Sloka 50. When a female is born in a Navamsa
belonging to the Rasi of the 7th bhava, her husband
will be softbodied, possessed of excellent qualities, and
full of assurance. When Saturn in the 7th bhava occu-
pies his own Amsa or Rasi, the female concerned will
be wedded to an old and exceedingly dull husband.
verses:
Sloka 49. When the Sun occupies its own Na-
vamsa in the 7th bhava, the female born will have a
husband gentle and diverting by his excessive playful-
ness. When the Moon occupies such a position, she
will be happy; when Mars is in the same position, the
husband will be devoted to his wife though playing the
gallant towards other women; if the planet occupying
its own Navamsa in the 7th bhava be Mercury, the
husband will be learned; if Jupiter be in that bhava, the
female concerned will get a spouse who will have all his
senses under control; if it be Venus, the husband will
be handsome and voluptuous; lastly, if it be Saturn, he
will be an old dolt.

स्यान्मार्दवाङ्गो गुणवान् प्रगल्भो जामित्रराश्यंशकजा तु याऽस्याः ।
सौरेऽस्तगे स्वांशगृहोपयाते वृद्धोऽतिमूर्खः पतिरेव तस्याः ॥ ५० ॥

When a female is born in a Navamsa
belonging to the Rasi of the 7th bhava, her husband
will be softbodied, possessed of excellent qualities, and
full of assurance. When Saturn in the 7th bhava occu-
pies his own Amsa or Rasi, the female concerned will
be wedded to an old and exceedingly dull husband.

title: घोडचोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 51-52
घोडचोऽध्यायः
963
दुःस्थौ धर्मगृहेशदेवसचिवौ भर्ता गतायुर्भवेत्
दीर्घायुर्धनवान् त्रिकोणगृहगौ केन्द्रस्थितौ वा यदि ।
विद्वान् बोधनवाइनेशसहितौ सारार्कजौ कर्षकः
स्वर्भानुध्वजसंयुतौ यदि खलः सारीश्वरश्चोरराद् ॥ ५१ ॥
Sloka 51. A female will have a decrepit husband
when the lord of the 9th bhava and Jupiter happen to
occupy a दुःस्थान (Dustthana) at her birth; he will be
long-lived and wealthy if the two planets occupy a Tri-
kona or a Kendra bhava. If they be associated with the
lord of the 4th bhava or Mercury, the husband will be
a person of learning; if they be associated with Mars
or Saturn, he will be an agriculturist; if with Rahu or
Ketu, a villain; if with the lord of the 6th bhava, he
will become a robberchieftain.
गौराङ्गः पतिरस्तगे दिनकरे कामी सरोषेक्षणः
चन्द्रे रूपगुणान्वितः कृशतनुर्भोगी रुगार्तो भवेत् ।
नम्रः कररसोलसः पटुवचः संरक्तकान्तिः कुजे
विद्यावित्तगुणप्रपञ्चरसिकः सौम्ये मदस्थानगे ॥ ५२ ॥
Sloka 52. The husband will be fair-limbed, lustful
and have fiery eyes when the Sun occupies the 7th
bhava in a female's horoscope; if the Moon be in that
bhava the husband of the female concerned will be
handsome, worthy, spare, voluptuous and troubled with
ailments; if Mars be in the 7th bhava, she will have for
her spouse, a man humble in appearance, delighting in
cruelty, indolent, with a ready tongue and of a ruddy
hue; if Mercury occupy the bhava in question, the
husband will be a man of taste, amply endowed with
learning, wealth and excellent qualities.
verses:
दुःस्थौ धर्मगृहेशदेवसचिवौ भर्ता गतायुर्भवेत्
दीर्घायुर्धनवान् त्रिकोणगृहगौ केन्द्रस्थितौ वा यदि ।
विद्वान् बोधनवाइनेशसहितौ सारार्कजौ कर्षकः
स्वर्भानुध्वजसंयुतौ यदि खलः सारीश्वरश्चोरराद् ॥ ५१ ॥

A female will have a decrepit husband when the lord of the 9th bhava and Jupiter happen to occupy a दुःस्थान (Dustthana) at her birth; he will be long-lived and wealthy if the two planets occupy a Tri-kona or a Kendra bhava. If they be associated with the lord of the 4th bhava or Mercury, the husband will be a person of learning; if they be associated with Mars or Saturn, he will be an agriculturist; if with Rahu or Ketu, a villain; if with the lord of the 6th bhava, he will become a robberchieftain.

गौराङ्गः पतिरस्तगे दिनकरे कामी सरोषेक्षणः
चन्द्रे रूपगुणान्वितः कृशतनुर्भोगी रुगार्तो भवेत् ।
नम्रः कररसोलसः पटुवचः संरक्तकान्तिः कुजे
विद्यावित्तगुणप्रपञ्चरसिकः सौम्ये मदस्थानगे ॥ ५२ ॥

The husband will be fair-limbed, lustful and have fiery eyes when the Sun occupies the 7th bhava in a female's horoscope; if the Moon be in that bhava the husband of the female concerned will be handsome, worthy, spare, voluptuous and troubled with ailments; if Mars be in the 7th bhava, she will have for her spouse, a man humble in appearance, delighting in cruelty, indolent, with a ready tongue and of a ruddy hue; if Mercury occupy the bhava in question, the husband will be a man of taste, amply endowed with learning, wealth and excellent qualities.

title: स्त्रीजातकाध्यायः
content:
964
बातकपारिजातै
Adh. XVI.
दीर्घायुर्नृपतुल्यवित्तविभवः कामी च बाल्ये गुरौ
कान्तो नित्यविनोदकेलिचतुरः काव्ये कविः क्ष्मापतिः ।
मन्दे वृद्धकलेवरोऽस्थिरतनुः पापी पतिः कामगे
राहौ वा शिखिनि स्थिते मलिनधीर्नीचोऽथवा तत्समः ५३
Sloka 53. If the planet occupying the 7th bhava
be Jupiter, the husband of the female concerned will be
a person blessed with long life, with wealth and power
equal to a king's, and lustful in his youth; if Venus, he
will be lovely, ever playful and diverting and gifted
with the highest poetical faculty; if Saturn, he will be
old, infirm and wicked; and lastly if Rahu or Ketu be
in the 7th bhava, the husband of the female concerned
will be a low, evil-minded wretch or some such person.
दिग्देशस्थितिवर्मकर्मजगुणाः पुंजातके योषितां
ये नारीजनजातके निजषतौ संयोजितास्तत्वतः ।
द्यनांशोपगतग्रहेषु बलवत्रखेटांशतुख्याः सुताः
केन्द्रे कामपतिः करोति विपुलं कल्याणकालोत्सवम् ॥५४॥
इति श्रीनवग्रहकृपया वैद्यनाथविरचिते जातकपारिजाते
स्त्रीजातकाध्यायः षोटशः ॥
Stoka 54. In this chapter on Female Horoscopy,
we have given accurately with reference to husbands
the same information which we gave while treating of
men's horoscope regarding wives such as the regions
from which they may come, their status, the protection
of their virtue and the qualities evinced in their acts.
The number of children will correspond to the number
of Navamsas attained by the powerful among the planets
occupying the 7th bhava or its Amsa. The lord of that
bhava when occupying a Kendra will produce much
jubilation on marriage and other festal occasions.
Thus ends &c.
verses:
दीर्घायुर्नृपतुल्यवित्तविभवः कामी च बाल्ये गुरौ
कान्तो नित्यविनोदकेलिचतुरः काव्ये कविः क्ष्मापतिः ।
मन्दे वृद्धकलेवरोऽस्थिरतनुः पापी पतिः कामगे
राहौ वा शिखिनि स्थिते मलिनधीर्नीचोऽथवा तत्समः ५३

If the planet occupying the 7th bhava be Jupiter, the husband of the female concerned will be a person blessed with long life, with wealth and power equal to a king's, and lustful in his youth; if Venus, he will be lovely, ever playful and diverting and gifted with the highest poetical faculty; if Saturn, he will be old, infirm and wicked; and lastly if Rahu or Ketu be in the 7th bhava, the husband of the female concerned will be a low, evil-minded wretch or some such person.

दिग्देशस्थितिवर्मकर्मजगुणाः पुंजातके योषितां
ये नारीजनजातके निजषतौ संयोजितास्तत्वतः ।
द्यनांशोपगतग्रहेषु बलवत्रखेटांशतुख्याः सुताः
केन्द्रे कामपतिः करोति विपुलं कल्याणकालोत्सवम् ॥५४॥

The number of children will correspond to the number of Navamsas attained by the powerful among the planets occupying the 7th bhava or its Amsa. The lord of that bhava when occupying a Kendra will produce much jubilation on marriage and other festal occasions.

In this chapter on Female Horoscopy, we have given accurately with reference to husbands the same information which we gave while treating of men's horoscope regarding wives such as the regions from which they may come, their status, the protection of their virtue and the qualities evinced in their acts.

title: कालचक्रदशाध्यायः
content:
जातकपारिजाते सप्तदशोऽध्यायः
॥ कालचक्रदशाध्यायः ॥
Adhyaya XVII.
KALACHAKRADASA.
The (कालचक्त) kalachakra-system of ayurdaya referred to al-
ready in Adhyaya 5, sloka 33, is based on the Moon's position in a
नक्षत्रपाद or quarter of an asterism. For the purposes of this ayur-
daya, the 27 stars from Aswini to Revati are classified into nine
groups of three each, the five odd groups or triads being styled
सब्य (Savya) or दक्षिण (Dakshina) and the four even ones as अपसष्य,
(Apasavya) वाम (Vama) or उत्तर (Uttara). The peculiarity of a सब्य
(Savya) triad Is that its 12 padas (पाद) are assigned to the 12 Rasis
from Mesha onwards. In an अपसव्य (Apasavya) triad, the 12
padas belong to the 12 Rasis reckoned in a reverse order from
वृश्चिक to धनुम्र
The 12 Nakshatra-padas (नक्षत्रपाद) whether of a सव्य (Savya)
or of an अपनुन्य (Apasavya) triad can be brought under the four
triangular signs according to the Rasis to which they are severally
assigned. In accordance with this classification, four kinds of
परमायुस् (Paramayus) or maximum life will be shown to result.
(Vide sloka 12).
Each कालचक्रनक्षत्रपादापुम (Kalachakra nakshatrapadayus) in its
entire length comprises nine mahadasas (महादशा ) presided over
by nine Rasis and their lords. The order in which the several
Nakshatra padas get each its nine mahidasas is indicated in the
mnemonic formulas for the मुख्य (Savya) and अपसव्य (Apasavya)
chakras respectively. These formulas are expressed by conven-
tional letters कटपयदि (Katapayadi) referred to already in page 696.
Two additional letters क्ष and a used in the formulas denote the
numbers 11 and 12 respectively
965

title: Adh. XVII.
content:
966
मातकपारिजाते
Adh. XVII.
The following hints may give a clue to the law governing the
assignment of the mahadasas to the several Nakshatra padas.
In a सव्यचक्र (Savya chakra) the mahadasas begin from Mesha
onwards to Meena and thence they pass on to Vrischika and go in
a reverse order up to Dhanus and thence revert to Mesha and end
in Meena.
Thus we have had 3 cycles representing 36 mahadasas for the
first four Rasyamsas (राश्यंश ) or the first nakshatra of a triad.
The 4th cycle begins with Vrischika and passing on in a reverse
order ends in Dhanus. The 5th cycle runs from Mesha to Meena;
the 6th from Vrischika backward to Dhanus, These three cycles*
give the kalachakra dasas to the four nakshatra padas comprising
the second star of a सव्य (Savya) triad. The 7th, 8th, and 9th
cycles are identical with the 1st, 2nd and 3rd cycles respectively
Thus it will be seen that the four padas of the 3rd star of a सम्य
(Savya) triad have the same mahadasas as those of the first.
There are nine cycles also corresponding to the twelve padas
of an अपसव्य (Apasavya) triad, but with this difference. The cycles
in this chakra run in an order exactly the opposite of what obtains
in the सव्यचक्र (Savya chakra. The first cycle begins with Dha-
nus and ends with Vrischika. The second runs from Meena to
Mesha in the reverse order. The third passes from Dhanus to
Vrischika identically with the Ist. These three cycles assign the
mabadasa to the first four padas comprising the first nakshatra of
an अपसव्य (Apasavya) triad. The 4th and the 6th cycles are
identical with the 2nd, i. e., from Meena in a reverse order to
Mesha while the 5th is with the 1st or the 3rd, i. s., from Dhanus
to Vrischika. These three enable us to find the mahadasas of the
middle four padas forming the second star of an अपसव्य (Apasavya)
triad.
It is a peculiarity of the अपसव्यचक्र (Apasavya chakra) that the
last four padas have the same mahadasas as the middle ones; that
is the 7th, 8th and 9th cycles correspond to the 4th, 5th and 6th
respectively in an अपसव्यचक्र (Apasavya chakra).
For the lengths of the mahadasa periods of the several Rasis
and their lords, the reader is referred to sloka 6.

SI. 1-3
सहदचोऽध्यायः
967
It appears to be an accepted canon in the kalachakra system
that the maximum length of the life of any person whether born
in the beginning, middle or end of a नक्षत्रपाद (nakshatra pada)
should not exceed the length of the nine mahadasas (for that pada)
reckoned from that at birth.
For a knowledge of the terms. देह (Deha), जीव (Jeeva), मण्डूकगति
(Mandukagati), मर्केटगति (Markatagati), सिंहावलोकन (Simhavalokana),
the reader should refer to slokas 89-92. In connection with the
terms मण्डूकगति (Manduka gati) and मर्कटगति (Markata gati), it will
be interesting to note that in a सव्यचक (Savya chakra), the two
movements take place from Kanya to Kataka and Simha to Mi.
thuna respectively, while in an अपसव्यचक्र (Apasavya chakra) they
are invariably from Kataka to Kanya and Mithuna to Simha and
these occur only in the cycles which run from Vrischika to Dha-
nus and vice versa.
A reason for this will appear when we remember that it is
only by such an arrangement the order of planets in both the
cycles can be made identical.
प्रणम्य परमात्मानं शिवं परमकारणम् ।
खेचारिचक्रमध्यस्थं चतुःषष्ठिकलात्मकम् ।। १ ।।
पप्रच्छ देवदेवेशमीश्वरं सर्वमङ्गला ।
कालचक्रगर्ति सर्वां विस्तराद्वद मे प्रभो ॥ २ ॥
Slokas 1-2. Bowing to Siva, the supreme soul, the
prime cause of all things, standing in the centre of the
planetary systems and comprehending in his omni-
science the 64 branches of knowledge, the all benign
goddess Parvati asked that supreme Ruler of all Gods as
follows: "Tell me, oh lord, in detail the entire course
of the wheel of time कालचक्र (Kalachakra)."
ईश्वर उवाच ।
अहमादित्यरूपोऽस्मि चन्द्रं त्वां संप्रचक्षते ।
संयोगेन वियोगेन जगत्स्थावरजङ्गमम् ।। ३ ॥
verses:
प्रणम्य परमात्मानं शिवं परमकारणम् ।
खेचारिचक्रमध्यस्थं चतुःषष्ठिकलात्मकम् ।। १ ।।
पप्रच्छ देवदेवेशमीश्वरं सर्वमङ्गला ।
कालचक्रगर्ति सर्वां विस्तराद्वद मे प्रभो ॥ २ ॥

Slokas 1-2. Bowing to Siva, the supreme soul, the prime cause of all things, standing in the centre of the planetary systems and comprehending in his omni-science the 64 branches of knowledge, the all-benign goddess Parvati asked that supreme Ruler of all Gods as follows: "Tell me, oh lord, in detail the entire course of the wheel of time कालचक्र (Kalachakra)."
अहमादित्यरूपोऽस्मि चन्द्रं त्वां संप्रचक्षते ।
संयोगेन वियोगेन जगत्स्थावरजङ्गमम् ।। ३ ॥

title: जातकपारिथाते
content:
972
जातकपारिथाते
Easwara said-
Adh. XVII.
Sloka 3. 'I am of the nature of the Sun and
thou art declared to be the Moon. The whole universe
consisting of mobile and immobile things is brought
about by the conjunction and opposition (separation) of
the Sun and the Moon.
पञ्चप्राचीरालिखेद्वाणसंख्या तिर्यग्रेवावर्जितान्तश्चतुष्काः ।
प्रागादीशा द्वादश व्योमवासा ज्योतिश्चक्रस्वामिनस्तूवराद्याः ।।
Sloka 4. Draw five straight lines from west to
east and five cross-wise in such a manner that the inte-
rior four squares are left vacant (are not represented in
the chakra). The resulting twelve squares are the twelve
celestial signs Mesha and others, the lords of the east
and other points of the compass.
धराजशुक्रज्ञशशीनसौम्यसितारजीवार्कजमन्दजीवाः ।
क्रमेण मेषादिषु राशिनाथास्तदंशपाश्चेति वदन्ति सन्तः ॥ ५ ॥
Sloka 5. Wise men say that Mars, Venus, Mer-
cury, the Moon, the Sun, Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter,
Saturn, Saturn and Jupiter are respectively the lords of
the signs from Mesha onwards and also of their
amsas.
भूतैकविंशङ्गिरयो नवदिक्षोडशाब्धयः ।
सूर्यादीनां क्रमादब्दा राशीनां स्वामिनो वश्चात् ॥ ६ ॥
Sloka 6. 5, 21, 7, 9, 10, 16 and 4 are the years
respectively of the 7 planets reckoned from the Sun.
The years of the signs correspond to the years of their
lords.
अश्वी पुनर्वसूह स्तमूलप्रोष्ठपदादिषु ।
अंशकान् गणयेन्मेषात्प्रादक्षिण्यक्रमं वदेत् ॥ ७ ॥
verses:
'I am of the nature of the Sun and
thou art declared to be the Moon. The whole universe
consisting of mobile and immobile things is brought
about by the conjunction and opposition (separation) of
the Sun and the Moon.

पञ्चप्राचीरालिखेद्वाणसंख्या तिर्यग्रेवावर्जितान्तश्चतुष्काः ।
प्रागादीशा द्वादश व्योमवासा ज्योतिश्चक्रस्वामिनस्तूवराद्याः ।।

'I am of the nature of the Sun and
thou art declared to be the Moon. The whole universe
consisting of mobile and immobile things is brought
about by the conjunction and opposition (separation) of
the Sun and the Moon.

धराजशुक्रज्ञशशीनसौम्यसितारजीवार्कजमन्दजीवाः ।
क्रमेण मेषादिषु राशिनाथास्तदंशपाश्चेति वदन्ति सन्तः ॥ ५ ॥

Draw five straight lines from west to
east and five cross-wise in such a manner that the inte-
rior four squares are left vacant (are not represented in
the chakra). The resulting twelve squares are the twelve
celestial signs Mesha and others, the lords of the east
and other points of the compass.

क्रमेण मेषादिषु राशिनाथास्तदंशपाश्चेति वदन्ति सन्तः ॥ ५ ॥

Wise men say that Mars, Venus, Mer-
cury, the Moon, the Sun, Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter,
Saturn, Saturn and Jupiter are respectively the lords of
the signs from Mesha onwards and also of their
amsas.

भूतैकविंशङ्गिरयो नवदिक्षोडशाब्धयः ।
सूर्यादीनां क्रमादब्दा राशीनां स्वामिनो वश्चात् ॥ ६ ॥

5, 21, 7, 9, 10, 16 and 4 are the years
respectively of the 7 planets reckoned from the Sun.
The years of the signs correspond to the years of their
lords.

सूर्यादीनां क्रमादब्दा राशीनां स्वामिनो वश्चात् ॥ ६ ॥

5, 21, 7, 9, 10, 16 and 4 are the years
respectively of the 7 planets reckoned from the Sun.
The years of the signs correspond to the years of their
lords.

अश्वी पुनर्वसूह स्तमूलप्रोष्ठपदादिषु ।
अंशकान् गणयेन्मेषात्प्रादक्षिण्यक्रमं वदेत् ॥ ७ ॥

अंशकान् गणयेन्मेषात्प्रादक्षिण्यक्रमं वदेत् ॥ ७ ॥

Calculate the amsas from Mesha onwards in a clockwise direction.

title: सप्तदशोऽध्यायः
content:
81. 7-11
सप्तदशोऽध्यायः
973
रोहिणीमष वैशाख वैष्णवादिषु भेषु च ।
अंशकान् वृश्चिकादीनां गणयेदपसव्यतः ।॥ ८ ॥
Slokas 7-8. In the 5 triads of stars beginning
respectively with Aswini, Punarvasu, Hasta, Mula and
Purvaproshtapada, reckon the quarters from Mesha in
the प्रदक्षिण (Pradakshina) order. In the four triads com-
mencing with Rohini, Makha, Visakha, and S'ravana,
reckon the quarters from Vrischika in the अप्रदक्षिण (Ap-
pradakshina) order.
दक्षिणात्रिकनक्षत्रं द्वादशांशकराशिषु ।
चक्रं प्रदक्षिणीकृत्य मीनान्तं विन्यसेत्पुनः ॥ ९ ॥
उत्तरात्रयनक्षत्रं वृश्चिकाद्यप्रदक्षिणम् ।
कृत्वा चापान्तकेऽन्यस्मिन् ज्ञातव्ये दक्षिणोत्तरे ॥ १० ॥
Slokas 9-10. The चक्र (chakra) consisting of a दक्षिण
(Dakshina) triad of stars should be cast in the प्रदक्षिण
(Pradakshina) order from Mesha to Meena among the 12
Rasis to which the Navamsas composing the triad be-
long. Again, the 12 quarters of the triad called उत्तर
(Uttara) (in contrast with दक्षिण (Dakshina) of the pre.
vious sloka) are to be assigned to the 12 Rasis in the
अप्रदक्षिण (Appradakshina) order from Vrischika to
Dhanus. Thus, दक्षिण (Dakshina) and उत्तर (Uttara) have
to be apprehended as distinct each from the other.
सव्यापसव्यमार्गेण चाश्विन्यादि त्रिकं त्रिकम् ।
देहादि गणयेत्सव्ये वामे जीवादि गण्यते ॥ ११ ॥
Sloka 11. Thus, the triads of stars reckoned from
Aswini are to be distinguished as दक्षिण (Dakshina) and
उत्तर (Uttara) just as their padas are reckoned in the
प्रदक्षिण (Pradakshina) or अप्रदक्षिण (Appradakshina) order
verses:
दक्षिणात्रिकनक्षत्रं द्वादशांशकराशिषु ।
चक्रं प्रदक्षिणीकृत्य मीनान्तं विन्यसेत्पुनः ॥

उत्तरात्रयनक्षत्रं वृश्चिकाद्यप्रदक्षिणम् ।
कृत्वा चापान्तकेऽन्यस्मिन् ज्ञातव्ये दक्षिणोत्तरे ॥

Slokas 9-10. The चक्र (chakra) consisting of a दक्षिण
(Dakshina) triad of stars should be cast in the प्रदक्षिण
(Pradakshina) order from Mesha to Meena among the 12
Rasis to which the Navamsas composing the triad be-
long. Again, the 12 quarters of the triad called उत्तर
(Uttara) (in contrast with दक्षिण (Dakshina) of the pre-
vious sloka) are to be assigned to the 12 Rasis in the
अप्रदक्षिण (Appradakshina) order from Vrischika to
Dhanus. Thus, दक्षिण (Dakshina) and उत्तर (Uttara) have
to be apprehended as distinct each from the other.

सव्यापसव्यमार्गेण चाश्विन्यादि त्रिकं त्रिकम् ।
देहादि गणयेत्सव्ये वामे जीवादि गण्यते ॥

Sloka 11. Thus, the triads of stars reckoned from
Aswini are to be distinguished as दक्षिण (Dakshina) and
उत्तर (Uttara) just as their padas are reckoned in the
प्रदक्षिण (Pradakshina) or अप्रदक्षिण (Appradakshina) order

content:
974
जातकपारिजातै
Adh. XVII.
of Rasis. In the सष्य (Savya) triad the reckoning begins
with देह (Deha). In the अपसव्य (Apasavya) triad it be-
gins with जीव (Jeeva).
मेषगोयमक्कुलीरमन्दिरेष्वंशकेषु परमायुरुच्यते ।
ज्ञानकं मदगजस्तदा क्रमात् तत्र कोणभवनेषु तद्वदेत् ॥ १२ ॥
Sloka 12. In the अंश (Amsas) i. e. quarters of the
nakshatras representing the houses Mesha, Vrishabha,
Mithuna and Kataka, the greatest life is declared to
result, being measured respectively by the numbers 100,
85, 83 and 86. The same holds good in respect to the
Trikona Rasis of the four foregoing.
एवमायुःपरिज्ञानं देहजीवौ प्रकल्प्य च ।
सव्ये तु प्रथमांशस्तु देह इत्यभिधीयते ॥ १३ ॥
जीवः सर्वेष्वन्त्यपादो विलोममपसव्यके ।
Slokas 13 and 13t. There can thus be a thorough
knowledge of the age of a person when what are called
रेह (Deha) and जीव (Jeeva) are previously settled. In
the सव्यचक्र (Savya chakra) the first division of every
Rasi is called देह (Deha) and the last is termed जीव
(Jeeva). In the अपसव्यचक्र (Apasavya chakra) this is
reversed.
देहजीवे यदा राहुः केतुभौंमो रविः स्थितः ॥ १४ ॥
तदा तस्मिन् भवेन्मृत्युर्देहे रोगः प्रवर्तते ।
Slokas 13-144. When Rahu, Ketu, Mars, or the
Sun happen to be in the conjunction of देह (Deha) and
जीव (Jeeva), there will be death in consequence thereof.
If they happen to be in देह (Deha) alone, disease sets in.
Cf. पराशर
देहजीवसमायोगे भौमार्करविजादिभिः ।
verses:
मेषगोयमक्कुलीरमन्दिरेष्वंशकेषु परमायुरुच्यते ।
ज्ञानकं मदगजस्तदा क्रमात् तत्र कोणभवनेषु तद्वदेत् ॥ १२ ॥

Sloka 12. In the अंश (Amsas) i. e. quarters of the
nakshatras representing the houses Mesha, Vrishabha,
Mithuna and Kataka, the greatest life is declared to
result, being measured respectively by the numbers 100,
85, 83 and 86. The same holds good in respect to the
Trikona Rasis of the four foregoing.
एवमायुःपरिज्ञानं देहजीवौ प्रकल्प्य च ।
सव्ये तु प्रथमांशस्तु देह इत्यभिधीयते ॥ १३ ॥
जीवः सर्वेष्वन्त्यपादो विलोममपसव्यके ।

Slokas 13 and 13½. There can thus be a thorough
knowledge of the age of a person when what are called
देह (Deha) and जीव (Jeeva) are previously settled. In
the सव्यचक्र (Savya chakra) the first division of every
Rasi is called देह (Deha) and the last is termed जीव
(Jeeva). In the अपसव्यचक्र (Apasavya chakra) this is
reversed.
देहजीवे यदा राहुः केतुभौंमो रविः स्थितः ॥ १४ ॥
तदा तस्मिन् भवेन्मृत्युर्देहे रोगः प्रवर्तते ।

Slokas 13½-14½. When Rahu, Ketu, Mars, or the
Sun happen to be in the conjunction of देह (Deha) and
जीव (Jeeva), there will be death in consequence thereof.
If they happen to be in देह (Deha) alone, disease sets in.
देहजीवसमायोगे भौमार्करविजादिभिः ।

title: संसदशोऽध्याया
content:
Sl. 15-17
संसदशोऽध्याया
975
एकैक्योगे मरणं बहुयोगे तु का कथा ॥
यत्र स्थानेषु सञ्जीवो देहयोगसमन्वितः ।
तत्र पापग्रहैर्योगे तद्दशामरणं वदेत् ॥
देहयोगे महाबाधा जीवयोगे तु मृत्युदः ।
द्वाभ्यां संयोगमात्रेण हन्यते नात्र संशयः ॥
जीवे जीवो यदा राहुः सौरिर्वक्रो रविः स्थितः ।
मृत्युकालगतिं ज्ञात्वा शान्ति कुर्याद्यथाविधि ॥
देहजीवगृहं यातः सौम्यो जीवश्च भार्गवः ॥ १५ ॥
सुखसंपत्करं सर्वं शोकरोगविनाशनम् ।
मिश्रखेचरसंयुक्ते मिश्र फलमवाभयात् ॥ १६ ॥
Slokas 14-16. When Mercury, Jupiter and Ve-
nus go to a house which represents देह (Deha) or जीव
(Jeeva), then everything tends to happiness and pros-
perity and there is an end of sorrow and sickness.
When the देह (Deha) or the जीव (Jeeva) house is
occupied by a mixture of good and bad planets, the
effect would be of a mixed nature.
Parasara adds:
NOTES.
जीवे जीवो यदा सोमः सौम्यो जीवः सितः स्थितः ।
तदा सौख्यं प्रकुर्वन्ति रोगमृत्युविनाशनम् ॥
पापक्षेत्रदशायोगे देहजीवौ तु दुःखदौ ।
शुभक्षेत्रदशायोगे शुभयोगे शुभं भवेत् ॥
देहे शुभग्रहैर्युक्ते भूषणादि ध्रुवं भवेत् ।
जीवे शुभग्रहैर्युक्ते पुत्रदारादिकाँलभेत् ॥
सिंहावलोकसमये मण्डूकगतिसंभवे ।
अपमृत्युभयं तस्मिन् प्रायश्चित्ताद्विमुच्यते ।। १७ ॥
verses:
एकैक्योगे मरणं बहुयोगे तु का कथा ॥
यत्र स्थानेषु सञ्जीवो देहयोगसमन्वितः ।
तत्र पापग्रहैर्योगे तद्दशामरणं वदेत् ॥
देहयोगे महाबाधा जीवयोगे तु मृत्युदः ।
द्वाभ्यां संयोगमात्रेण हन्यते नात्र संशयः ॥
जीवे जीवो यदा राहुः सौरिर्वक्रो रविः स्थितः ।
मृत्युकालगतिं ज्ञात्वा शान्ति कुर्याद्यथाविधि ॥
देहजीवगृहं यातः सौम्यो जीवश्च भार्गवः ॥ १५ ॥
सुखसंपत्करं सर्वं शोकरोगविनाशनम् ।
मिश्रखेचरसंयुक्ते मिश्र फलमवाभयात् ॥ १६ ॥

Slokas 14-16. When Mercury, Jupiter and Venus go to a house which represents देह (Deha) or जीव (Jeeva), then everything tends to happiness and prosperity and there is an end of sorrow and sickness. When the देह (Deha) or the जीव (Jeeva) house is occupied by a mixture of good and bad planets, the effect would be of a mixed nature.
जीवे जीवो यदा सोमः सौम्यो जीवः सितः स्थितः ।
तदा सौख्यं प्रकुर्वन्ति रोगमृत्युविनाशनम् ॥
पापक्षेत्रदशायोगे देहजीवौ तु दुःखदौ ।
शुभक्षेत्रदशायोगे शुभयोगे शुभं भवेत् ॥
देहे शुभग्रहैर्युक्ते भूषणादि ध्रुवं भवेत् ।
जीवे शुभग्रहैर्युक्ते पुत्रदारादिकाँलभेत् ॥
सिंहावलोकसमये मण्डूकगतिसंभवे ।
अपमृत्युभयं तस्मिन् प्रायश्चित्ताद्विमुच्यते ।। १७ ॥

content:
976
आतकपारिजाते
Adb. XVIL
Sloka 17. At the time there is a सिहावोंकन (Sim-
havalokana, backward glance of a lion, vide infra sloka
89-91) or a मण्डूकगति (Mandukagati, a frogleap) happens,
there is danger of untimely death from which one is
released by an expiation.
Cf. पराशर
मण्डूके तु महाव्याधिर्मर्कटे तु महन्द्रयम् ।
सिंहावलोके मरणं गर्गस्य वचनं यथा ॥
कन्यायां कर्कटे वाऽपि सिंहमे मिथुनेऽपि च ।
मण्डूकगतिसंज्ञा वै तादृशं रोगकारणम् ॥
मीने तु वृश्चिके वाऽपि चापे मेषे तथैव च ।
सिंहावलोकने चैव तादृशं च फलं लभेत् ॥
सिंहावगतिमार्गे च माण्डूकीगतिसंभवः ।
अपमृत्युका स्तस्मिन् प्रायश्चित्तान्न शोचति ॥
मीनात्तु वृश्चिके याते ज्वरो भवति निश्चितम् ।
कन्यायाः कर्कटे याते मातृबन्धुविनाशनम् ।।
सिंहात्तु मिथुने याते स्त्रियां व्याधिर्भवेद्भवम् ।
कटकात्तु हरौ याते वधो भवति देहिनाम् ॥
पितृबन्धुमूर्ति विद्याच्चापान्मेषं गते पुनः ॥
मीनाप्त वृश्चिके याते ज्वरो भवति देहिनाम् ।
पाथोनात् कर्कटे याते मातृवन्धुवधूमृतिः ॥ १८ ॥
Sloka 18. When there is a transit from Meena to
Vrischika, fever attacks the persons concerned. When
there is a passage from Kanya to Kataka, the death takes
place of one's mother, relation or wife.
कटकात हरौ याते व्रणरोगं बदेऊधः ।
सिंहातु मिथुनं याते खलीव्याधिर्मृतिर्भवेत् ॥ १९ ॥
verses:
मण्डूके तु महाव्याधिर्मर्कटे तु महन्द्रयम् ।
सिंहावलोके मरणं गर्गस्य वचनं यथा ॥
कन्यायां कर्कटे वाऽपि सिंहमे मिथुनेऽपि च ।
मण्डूकगतिसंज्ञा वै तादृशं रोगकारणम् ॥
मीने तु वृश्चिके वाऽपि चापे मेषे तथैव च ।
सिंहावलोकने चैव तादृशं च फलं लभेत् ॥
सिंहावगतिमार्गे च माण्डूकीगतिसंभवः ।
अपमृत्युका स्तस्मिन् प्रायश्चित्तान्न शोचति ॥

मीनात्तु वृश्चिके याते ज्वरो भवति निश्चितम् ।
कन्यायाः कर्कटे याते मातृबन्धुविनाशनम् ।।
सिंहात्तु मिथुने याते स्त्रियां व्याधिर्भवेद्भवम् ।
कटकात्तु हरौ याते वधो भवति देहिनाम् ॥
पितृबन्धुमूर्ति विद्याच्चापान्मेषं गते पुनः ॥

मीनाप्त वृश्चिके याते ज्वरो भवति देहिनाम् ।
पाथोनात् कर्कटे याते मातृवन्धुवधूमृतिः ॥ १८ ॥

When there is a transit from Meena to Vrischika, fever attacks the persons concerned. When there is a passage from Kanya to Kataka, the death takes place of one's mother, relation or wife.
कटकात हरौ याते व्रणरोगं बदेऊधः ।

सिंहातु मिथुनं याते खलीव्याधिर्मृतिर्भवेत् ॥ १९ ॥

title: Chapter Seven
content:
SL 19-23
ससदयोऽध्यायः
977
Sloka 19. When there is a passage from Kataka
to Simha (after a मण्डूकष्ठति - Mandukapluti), a wise astro-
loger should predict a disease due to an ulcer or wound.
When there is a passage from Simha to Mithuna, there
will be disease or death of one's own wife.
पुत्रबन्धुमृर्ति विद्याच्चापान्मेषं गते पुनः ।
शुभग्रहेऽस्मिनभयं पापग्रहयुते भयम् ।। २० ।।
Sloka 20. When the transit is from Dhanus
to Mesha, the death of a son or other such relative is to
be apprehended. When an auspicious planet occupies
the house of transit, there is no risk; but when it has
a malefic planet, there is danger.
कन्यायाः कर्कटे याते पूर्वभागे महान् भवेत् ।
उत्तरां दिशमाश्रित्य शुभयात्रां गमिष्यति ॥ २१ ॥
Sloka 21. When there is a transit from Kanya to
Kataka the person concerned becomes great during the
former portion of it, and goes upon a happy trip towards
the north.
सिंहानु मिथुने याते पूर्वभागं विसर्जयेत् ।
कार्यारंभे तु नैर्ऋत्यां सुखयात्रां गमिष्यति ॥ २२ ॥
Sloka 22. When there is a transit from Simha to
Mithuna, the former portion thereof should be shunned
as inauspicious at the commencement of an undertaking;
but a trip then in the southwest will be auspicious.
कर्कटाद्दक्षिणे सिंहे कार्यहानिश्च रोगकृत् ।
दक्षिणां दिशमाश्रित्य पश्चादागमनं भवेत् ॥ २३ ॥
Sloka. 23 When there is a transit from Kataka
to Simha in a सव्य (Savya) movement, there is failure of
one's business and sickness comes in its wake; and
123
verses:
Sloka 19. When there is a passage from Kataka
to Simha (after a मण्डूकष्ठति - Mandukapluti), a wise astro-
loger should predict a disease due to an ulcer or wound.
When there is a passage from Simha to Mithuna, there
will be disease or death of one's own wife.

पुत्रबन्धुमृर्ति विद्याच्चापान्मेषं गते पुनः ।
शुभग्रहेऽस्मिनभयं पापग्रहयुते भयम् ।। २० ।।

When the transit is from Dhanus
to Mesha, the death of a son or other such relative is to
be apprehended. When an auspicious planet occupies
the house of transit, there is no risk; but when it has
a malefic planet, there is danger.
कन्यायाः कर्कटे याते पूर्वभागे महान् भवेत् ।
उत्तरां दिशमाश्रित्य शुभयात्रां गमिष्यति ॥ २१ ॥

When there is a transit from Kanya to
Kataka the person concerned becomes great during the
former portion of it, and goes upon a happy trip towards
the north.
सिंहानु मिथुने याते पूर्वभागं विसर्जयेत् ।
कार्यारंभे तु नैर्ऋत्यां सुखयात्रां गमिष्यति ॥ २२ ॥

When there is a transit from Simha to
Mithuna, the former portion thereof should be shunned
as inauspicious at the commencement of an undertaking;
but a trip then in the southwest will be auspicious.
कर्कटाद्दक्षिणे सिंहे कार्यहानिश्च रोगकृत् ।
दक्षिणां दिशमाश्रित्य पश्चादागमनं भवेत् ॥ २३ ॥

When there is a transit from Kataka
to Simha in a सव्य (Savya) movement, there is failure of
one's business and sickness comes in its wake; and

content:
978

बालकपारिजाते
Adh. XVII.
there is a return via southwest towards the south -i. e.
in plain English, there is a passage from Simha towards
Vrishaba through Mithuna.

मीनाप्त वृश्चिके क्रान्ते उदग्गच्छति सङ्कटम् ।
चापान्मेषे मयं यात्रा व्याधिर्बन्धुमृतिर्भवेत् ।। २४ ।।
Sloka 24. When there is a passage from Meena to
Vrischika, i. e. in the northern direction, trouble dis-
appears. When the transit is from Dhanus to Mesha,
the passage is risky; disease and death of a relation
may occur.

तत्र संपद्विवाहादि शुभं भवति पश्चिमे ।
शुभारूढे नृपप्रीतिः सर्वसंपत्करी नृणाम् ।। २५ ।।
Sloka 25. When this passage is reversed, i. e.
from Mesha to Dhanus there is prosperity, marriage
and other such auspicious event When the house of
transit is occupied by a benefic planet, there will be
royal favor leading to every kind of prosperity.

देहो मेषश्चापसिंहाजभानां जीवश्चापी गोवधूनक्रभानाम् ।
आकोकरो देहसंज्ञं नृयुग्मं जीवं सव्ये चापसव्ये विलोमात् ।।
Sloka 26. In the case of the चक्र (Chakra) belong
ing to Mesha, Dhanus and Simha, the lord of the देह
(Deha) is Mars and the lord of जीव (Jeeva) is Jupiter.
In the case of the चक (Chakra) belonging to Vrishabha,
Kanya and Makara, the lord of the देह (Deha) is Saturn
and that of जीव (Jeeva) is Mercury. This holds good
for सम्यचक्र (Savya chakra). This is to be taken in
reverse order for the अपसव्यचक्र (Apasavya chakra).

NOTES.
Compare the following from an astrological work (pame
unknown).

title: सप्तदशोऽध्यायः
content:
SI. 26
सप्तदशोऽध्यायः
979
॥ सम्यवझे ॥
मेषस्य तु स्वयं देहो धनुर्जीवः प्रकीर्तितः ।
भौमशुक्रेन्दुजेन्द्र के सौम्य भृग्वारमन्त्रिणः ॥
वृषस्य मकरो देहो मिथुनं जीव उच्यते ।
मन्दौ गुरुकुजौ शुक्रसौम्येन्द्रर्कबुत्रास्तथा ॥
मिथुनस्य वृषो देहः स्वयं जीवः प्रकीर्तितः ।
शुक्रत्रकौ गुरुर्मन्दौ गुरुभौमौ मृगुर्बुधः ॥
कुलीरस्य स्वयं देहो मीनो जीत्रः प्रकीर्तितः ।
इन्द्रर्कज्ञा भृगुभौमो गुरुर्मन्दौ गुरुस्तथा ॥
सिंहस्य वृश्चिकं देहं मीनो जीव इहोच्यते ।
भौमशुक्रेन्दुजेन्द्रर्क सौम्यशुक्रा रमन्त्रिणः ॥
कन्यायाः कलश देहः स्वयं जीव इति स्मृतः ।
मन्त्रौ गुरुकुौ शुक्रबुधचन्द्रार्कसौम्यकाः ॥
तौलिकायाः स्वयं देहः कन्या जीव इहोच्यते ।
शुक्रवक्रौ गुरुर्मन्दौ गुरुवक्रौ सितो बुधः ॥
वृश्चिकस्य कुलीरं तु देहो जीत्रो धनुः स्मृतः ।
इन्द्रर्कज्ञाः सितो भौमो गुरुर्मन्दौ गुरुः स्मृतः ॥
चापस्य मेषो देहः स्यात् स्वयं जीव इति स्मृतः ।
भौम शुक्रबुधेन्द्वर्क सौम्यभृग्वार मन्त्रिणः ॥
मकरस्य स्वयं देहो मिथुनो जीव उच्यते ।
मन्दौ गुरुः कुजः शुक्रो बुधेन्द्वर्कबुधास्तथा ।।
कुंभस्य वृषभो देहो मिथुनो जीव उच्यते ।
शुक्रवक्रौ गुरुर्मन्दौ गुरुभौमौ भृगुर्बुधः ॥
मीनस्य तु स्वयं जीवो देहः कर्कटकः स्मृतः
इन्द्रर्कज्ञा भृगुर्मोमो गुरुर्मन्दौ गुरुस्तथा ।।

कुंभस्य वृषभो देहो मिथुनो जीव उच्यते ।
शुक्रवक्रौ गुरुर्मन्दौ गुरुभौमौ भृगुर्बुधः ॥

मीनस्य तु स्वयं जीवो देहः कर्कटकः स्मृतः
इन्द्रर्कज्ञा भृगुर्मोमो गुरुर्मन्दौ गुरुस्तथा ।।

content:
980
बातकपारिआते
Adh. XVII.
॥ अपसम्यचळे ॥
वृश्चिकस्य धनुर्जीवो देहः कर्कटकः स्मृतः ।
गुरुर्मन्दौ गुरुर्मोमो भृगुः सौर्याकचन्द्रमाः ॥
तौलिकायाः स्वयं देहः कन्या जीव इति स्मृतः ।
सौम्यभुग्वारदेवेज्या मन्दौ चापालितौलिकाः ॥
कन्यायाः कन्यका जीवः कुंभो देह इति स्मतः ।
सौम्यार्कन्दुबुधाः शुक्रवक्रौ गुरुशनी तथा ॥
सिंहस्य वृश्चिको देहो मीनो जीव इति स्मृतः ।
गुरुवक्रौ भृगुः सौम्यः सूर्येन्दुज्ञा भृगुः कुजः ॥
कुलीरस्य स्वयं देहो मीनो जीव इति स्मृतः ।
गुरुर्मन्दौ गुरुौमः शुक्रसौम्यौ रविः शशी ॥
मिथुनस्य स्वयं जीत्रो वृषभो देह उच्यते ।
सौम्यभृग्वारगुर्वार्किमन्देज्यारा भृगुस्तथा ॥
वृषस्य मकरो देहो मिथुनं जीव उच्यते ।
सौम्यार्केन्दुज्ञशुक्रा र गुरुमन्दशनैश्वराः ।।
मेषस्य तु स्वयं देहो धनुर्जीवः प्रकीर्तितः ।
गुर्वारसितसौम्यार्का इन्दुसौम्यसिताः कुमः ॥
मीनस्य तु स्वयं जीवो देहः कर्कटकः स्मृतः ।
गुरुर्मन्दौ गुरुर्भीमभृगुसौम्या रविः शशी ॥
कुंभस्य तु वृषो देहो मिथुनो जीत्र उच्यते ।
सोम्यभृग्वारगुरवो मन्दौ जीवः कुजः कविः ॥
मकरस्य स्वयं देहो मिथुनं नीव उच्यते ।
सौम्यार्केन्दुज्ञशुक्रा र गुरुमन्दशनैश्वराः ॥
चापस्य तु स्वयं जीवो मेषो देह इति स्मृतः ।
गुर्वारशुक्रसौम्यार्कचन्द्रसौम्या भृगुः कुजः ॥

title: सप्तदशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 27-30
सप्तदशोऽध्यायः
981
उक्षा देहो युग्मकोणं गतानां जीवं युग्मागारमा हुर्मुनीन्द्राः ।
मीनो जीवः कर्कटो देहराशिः सव्ये चक्रे कर्किकीटान्त्यमानाम् ।।
Sloka 27. In the सव्यचक्र (Savya chakra), the lord of
देह (Deha) is Venus and the lord of जीव Jeeva is Mer-
cury in the case of the चक्र (Chakra) belonging to
Mithuna, Thula and Kumbha. With respect to the पक्र
(Chakra) owned by Kataka, Vrischika and Meena, the
lords of जीव (Jeeva) and देह (Deha) are respectively
Jupiter and the Moon.
देहजीवसमायुक्तै भौंमार्किरविभोगिभिः ।
एकैकयोगे मरणं बहुयोगे न संशयः ॥ २८ ॥
Sloka 28. When Mars, Saturn, the Sun and Rahu
occupy देह (Deha) and जीव (Jeeva) separately, death is
to be feared. Of this there can be no doubt when
several of them occupy these places.
देहयुक्तो महारोगं जीवयुक्तो महद्भयम् ।
द्वाभ्यां संयोगमात्रेण हन्यते नात्र संशयः ॥ २९ ॥
Sloka 29. The planet occupying the देह (Deha)
produces a dangerous malady while the one occupying
the जाव (Jeeva) brings on great risk. If both the देह
(Deha) and जीव (Jeeva) be occupied by the malefic pla.
nets named (in the previous sloka), then, undoubtedly,
the person concerned becomes a victim.
अधिरोगो भवेद्वाभ्यामपमृत्युस्त्रिभिर्भवेत् ।
चतुर्भिर्मृतिरापन्ना देहजीवे भवेद्यदि ॥ ३० ॥
Sloka 30. With two malefic planets in the देह
(Deha) or जीष (Jeeva) there will be growing disease;
with three of them, there ought to be sudden or untime,
ly death. When all the four are present, death sets in.
verses:
उक्षा देहो युग्मकोणं गतानां जीवं युग्मागारमा हुर्मुनीन्द्राः ।
मीनो जीवः कर्कटो देहराशिः सव्ये चक्रे कर्किकीटान्त्यमानाम् ।।

In the सव्यचक्र (Savya chakra), the lord of
देह (Deha) is Venus and the lord of जीव Jeeva is Mer-
cury in the case of the चक्र (Chakra) belonging to
Mithuna, Thula and Kumbha. With respect to the पक्र
(Chakra) owned by Kataka, Vrischika and Meena, the
lords of जीव (Jeeva) and देह (Deha) are respectively
Jupiter and the Moon.

देहजीवसमायुक्तै भौंमार्किरविभोगिभिः ।
एकैकयोगे मरणं बहुयोगे न संशयः ॥

When Mars, Saturn, the Sun and Rahu
occupy देह (Deha) and जीव (Jeeva) separately, death is
to be feared. Of this there can be no doubt when
several of them occupy these places.

देहयुक्तो महारोगं जीवयुक्तो महद्भयम् ।
द्वाभ्यां संयोगमात्रेण हन्यते नात्र संशयः ॥

The planet occupying the देह (Deha)
produces a dangerous malady while the one occupying
the जाव (Jeeva) brings on great risk. If both the देह
(Deha) and जीव (Jeeva) be occupied by the malefic pla.
nets named (in the previous sloka), then, undoubtedly,
the person concerned becomes a victim.

अधिरोगो भवेद्वाभ्यामपमृत्युस्त्रिभिर्भवेत् ।
चतुर्भिर्मृतिरापन्ना देहजीवे भवेद्यदि ॥

With two malefic planets in the देह
(Deha) or जीष (Jeeva) there will be growing disease;
with three of them, there ought to be sudden or untime,
ly death. When all the four are present, death sets in.

content:
982
बातकपारिजाते
Adh. XVII.
युगपदेहजीवौ तु पापग्रहयुतौ तथा ।
राजचोरादिभीतिश्च द्वाभ्यां मृत्युर्न संशयः ॥ ३१ ॥
Sloka 31. If देह (Deha) and जीव (Jeeva) be simul-
taneously occupied by a malefic planet, there is danger
to be feared from the king, robbers or other such agency,
but if they be simultaneously occupied by two malefic
planets, death will undoubtedly happen.
अग्निबाधा रवौ विद्याच्चन्द्रे ज्वलनबाधकम् ।
भौमे शस्त्रकृता पीडा वायुबाधकरं बुधे ॥ ३२ ॥
गुरौ चोदरबाधा स्यात् शुक्रेऽग्निभयमाझयात् ।
शनौ गुल्मेन बाधा स्याद् राहौ विषकृतां रुजम् ।। ३३ ।।
Slokas 32-33. Damage by fire will result when
the Sun is in such a malefic position. The Moon in
the same position will cause injury by conflagration.
Mars will bring on hurt inflicted by a deadly weapon
Mercury will produce trouble due to flatulence, Jupiter
in such an inauspicious position will cause trouble in
the stomach. Venus will bring on risk by fire; Saturn
produces colic; Rahu gives birth to ailments due to
venomous bites.
आतृस्थानगतो जीवो दारस्थानगतः कुजः ।
तथा जन्मगतो मन्दो राहुर्नवमराशिगः ॥ ३४ ॥
चन्द्रोऽष्टमगृहं यातः सूर्यो रिःफगृहं गतः ।
बुधः सप्तमभावस्थो भार्गवः शत्रुराशिगः ॥ ३५ ॥
इत्येवं मरणस्थानं तस्मिन् पापयुतेऽथवा ।
पापदृष्टेऽरिनीचस्थे दुर्बले दुःखमामुयात् ॥ ३६ ॥
Sloka 34-36. Jupiter in the 3rd house, Mars in

Jupiter in the 3rd house, Mars in

title: देहजीवफलम्
content:
SI. 37-38
सप्तदशोऽध्यायः
983
the 7th, Saturn in the natal star, Rahu in the 9th house,
the Moon in the ath, the Sun in the 12th, Mercury in
the 7th and Venus in an inimical house are each of
them मरणस्थान (Maranastthana) or death occasioners.
When the planet which is thus termed मरणस्थान (Marana
stthana) is in conjunction with a malefic planet or aspect
ed by one such or occupies ar inimical or depression
house or is destitute of strength, the person concerned
comes to grief.
॥ देहजीवफलम् ॥
भानुः करोति विविधापदमथेनाशं
आर्तिज्वरारिजन भीतिपदच्युतिं च ।
पित्तात्र्त्तिगुल्मग्रहणीक्षयकर्णरोगं
पश्वादिबन्धुमरणं सहजादिनाशम् ॥ ३७ ॥
Sloka 37. The Sun, when in देह (Deha) or जीव
(Jeeva) causes adversities of various sorts, loss of
wealth, disease, fever, risk from enemies, loss of one's
place, bilious affections, spleen, diarrhoca, consumption,
disease of the ear, death of cattle and kindred and the
loss of brother or other dear relation.
चन्द्रः खबन्धुजनसङ्गमकन्यकाप्ति-
मारोग्यभूपणसुखांबरराज्यपूज्यम् ।
दानक्रियादिसुरभूसुरपुण्यतीर्थ-
स्नानार्चनं मृदुसुखान्नसुखं करोति ॥ ३८ ॥
Mok 38. The Moon leads to association with
one's own kith and kin culminating in the acquisition
of a virgin girl as a helpmate; to health, ornaments,
luxurious apparel and respect in the land; to acts of
verses:
भानुः करोति विविधापदमथेनाशं
आर्तिज्वरारिजन भीतिपदच्युतिं च ।

पश्वादिबन्धुमरणं सहजादिनाशम् ॥ ३७ ॥

content:
984
आतकपारिजाते
Adh. XVII.
gift and to the propitiation of Gods and Brahmins at
baths in holy waters; to soft repose and pleasant meals.
भौमः करोति तनुतापरुगग्निचोर-
भीति स्वबन्धुकलहं सहजादिनाशम् ।
क्षेत्रार्थनाशपदविच्युतियुद्धनीतिं
गुल्मार्शकुष्ठविषशत्रुभयं कुवृत्तिः ॥ ३९ ॥
d
Sloka 39. Mars in a bad position, produces
inflammation of the body, disease and dread of fire and
robbers, quarrel with kindred, death of a brother or
other dear relation, loss of land and treasure, falling off
in rank, policy leading to war, colic, piles, leprosy,
danger from venomous reptiles and foemen.
ज्वरमासुरिका पैत्यं ग्रंथिस्फोटं कुजस्य च ।
विषाग्निशस्त्रचोरारिनृपर्भातिं वदेद्वधः ॥ ४० ॥
Sloka 40. Fever, small-pox, biliousness, knotty
tumour, danger from venomous reptiles, fire, weapons,
robbers, foes and the king should a wise astrologer
predict in addition, with respect to Mars.
सौम्यः करोति सुहृदाप्तमहत्प्रसाद-
विज्ञानशीलनिगमागमशास्त्रबोधम् ।
स्त्रीपुत्रदारनृपभूषणगोगजाश्व-
लाभं विवेकधनबुद्धियशोभिवृद्धिम् ॥ ४१ ॥
Sloka 41. Mercury secures the favor of benevolent,
trusty great men, a knowledge of worldly affairs, good
manners, an insight into Vedas, philosophy and science;
the acquisition of women, progeny, wives, royal orna-
ments, kine, elephants and horses; the increase of
discernment, wealth, intellect and fame.
verses:

title: सझदशोऽध्यायः
content:
SL 43-44
सझदशोऽध्यायः
985
जीवः करोति विविधार्थसुखं महत्वं
राज्याभिषेकमवनिप्रश्रुपूजनाद्यम् ।
स्त्रीपुत्र लाभसुख भूषण भोजनार्थ-
मारोग्यकीर्तिविजयं च परोपकारम् ॥ ४२ ॥
Sloka 12. Jupiter leads to the many joys of afflu-
ence, eminent rank, coronation in the kingdom, the
esteem of kings and similar honors; blessings of a
family life, ornaments, abundant food, wealth, health,
fame, victory and beneficence.
शुक्रः करोति रतिलाभसुखाङ्गनादि-
चित्रांबरार्थपशुवाहनरत्न जालम् ।
गानक्रियानटनगोष्ठिमहत्प्रतापं
सत्कीर्तिदानविभवं सुजनैः समाजम् ॥ ४३ ॥
Sloka 43. Venus secures sexual delight and the
society of fine women; the pleasures of pictorial art,
fine apparel, wealth, cattle, vehicles, gems and precious
stones; musical concerts, dancing parties, lordly magni-
ficence, good fame, great liberality and association with
the virtuous.
मन्दः करोति कलहं तनुकृच्छ्रमृत्यु-
बन्ध्वार्तिमग्निरिषुभूतभयं विषार्तिम् ।
मानार्थहानिमभिमानकलत्रपुत्र-
नाशं गृहार्थकृषिवाणिजगोविनाशम् ॥ ४४ ॥
Sloka 44. Saturn brings about quarrels, physical
pain, death, affliction of relatives; dread of firc, enemies
and ghosts, trouble from venomous reptiles, loss οι
honor, of wealth, of self respect; of wife, of children,
of home-comforts, of agriculture, of trade and of cattle.
124

society of fine women; the pleasures of pictorial art,

ficence, good fame, great liberality and association with

pain, death, affliction of relatives; dread of firc, enemies

title: चक्रदशाफलम्
content:
986
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. XVII
राहौ देहेऽरिपीडात्मा बन्धुकष्टपरिश्रमम् ।
पक्षघातादिपीडां च राजभीतिं वदेन्नणाम् ।। ४५ ।।
Sloka 45. An astrologer may predict that when
Rahu occupies देह (Deha), the people concerned suffer
annoyance from enemies, see their relations in trouble,
have to take to a wandering life, are afflicted with palsy
and have to fear danger from their king.
केतौ चोराग्निपीडादिरक्तस्त्रावादिपीडनम् ।
दारित्र्यं बन्धुनाशं च स्थाननाशं धनक्षयम् ॥ ४६ ॥
Sloka 46. When Ketu occupies देह (Deha), trou-
ble crops up from thieves, fire and bleeding; poverty,
loss of relations, loss of place and loss of wealth also
result.
॥ इति देहजीवफलम् ॥
॥ अथ चक्रदशाफलम् ॥
लग्नचक्रदशाकाले देहारोग्यं महत्सुखम् ।
कीर्तिभूषणराज्यार्थसुतदारांबरायतिम् ।। ४७ ॥
शुभक्षेत्रे शुभं सर्व पापर्थे फलमन्यथा ।
तद्वत्पापसमायुक्ते शुभयुक्ते शुभाधिकम् ॥ ४८ ॥
स्वक्षत्रतुङ्गमित्रस्थखेचरेण समन्विते ।
विलग्नचक्रपाके तु राज्यार्थ नृपपूजनम् ॥ ४९ ॥
नीचमूढारिराशिस्थखेचरेण समन्विते ।
पुत्रदारादिनाशं च मिश्र मिश्रफलं वदेत् ॥ ५० ॥
Slokas 47-50. At the time the चक्रदशा (Chakra-
dasa) of the Lagna is in progress, health of body, much
happiness, acquisition of fame, ornaments, dominion,
verses:
राहौ देहेऽरिपीडात्मा बन्धुकष्टपरिश्रमम् ।
पक्षघातादिपीडां च राजभीतिं वदेन्नणाम् ।।

An astrologer may predict that when Rahu occupies देह (Deha), the people concerned suffer annoyance from enemies, see their relations in trouble, have to take to a wandering life, are afflicted with palsy and have to fear danger from their king.
केतौ चोराग्निपीडादिरक्तस्त्रावादिपीडनम् ।
दारित्र्यं बन्धुनाशं च स्थाननाशं धनक्षयम् ॥

When Ketu occupies देह (Deha), trouble crops up from thieves, fire and bleeding; poverty, loss of relations, loss of place and loss of wealth also result.
लग्नचक्रदशाकाले देहारोग्यं महत्सुखम् ।
कीर्तिभूषणराज्यार्थसुतदारांबरायतिम् ।।

शुभक्षेत्रे शुभं सर्व पापर्थे फलमन्यथा ।
तद्वत्पापसमायुक्ते शुभयुक्ते शुभाधिकम् ॥

स्वक्षत्रतुङ्गमित्रस्थखेचरेण समन्विते ।
विलग्नचक्रपाके तु राज्यार्थ नृपपूजनम् ॥

नीचमूढारिराशिस्थखेचरेण समन्विते ।
पुत्रदारादिनाशं च मिश्र मिश्रफलं वदेत् ॥

At the time the चक्रदशा (Chakra-dasa) of the Lagna is in progress, health of body, much happiness, acquisition of fame, ornaments, dominion,

title: सप्तदशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 51-53
सप्तदशोऽध्यायः
987
wealth, children, wives and apparel may be announced.
If the Lagna be in an auspicious sign, everything will
come off auspiciously; it will be otherwise when the
Lagna is in a malefic sign and also when occupied by a
malefic planet. When the Lagna being in a benefic
sign is also occupied by a benefic planet, the result will
be exceedingly happy. If the planet in the Lagna be in
its swakshetra, in its exaltation or in a friendly house
and the चक्रदशा (Chakradasa) of the Lagna be in pro-
gress, dominion, wealth and honor from the sovereign
will accrue. If, on the other hand, the planet in the
Lagna be depressed, eclipsed, or in an inimical house,
there will be loss of children, wife and such other dear
objects; if the Lagna and its occupants be of a mixed
character, the astrologer should declare the effect to be
of a mixed nature.
द्वितीयराशिचक्रे तु धनधान्यविवर्धनम् ।
भोजनं सुतदाराप्ति क्षेत्रगोनृपपूजनम् ॥ ५१ ॥
विद्याप्तिं वाक्पटुत्वं च सगोष्ठया कालयापनम् ।
शुभक्षं फलमेवं स्यात्पापक्ष फलमन्यथा ॥ ५२ ॥
Sloka 51-52. During the चकदशा (Chakradasa) of
the 2nd Rasi may be expected increase of wealth and
corn, good food, acquisition of children and wives,
lands, cattle, honor by the sovereign, attainment of
knowledge, eloquence and amusement in good company
When the Rasi in question is auspicious, such gooa
effect as has been said above will follow; it will be
otherwise when the Rasi is malefic.
तृतीयराशिचक्रस्य परिपाके महत्सुखम् ।
भक्ष्यभोज्यफलाप्तिं च शौर्य धैर्यं मनोजयम् ।। ५३ ॥
verses:
द्वितीयराशिचक्रे तु धनधान्यविवर्धनम् ।
भोजनं सुतदाराप्ति क्षेत्रगोनृपपूजनम् ॥

विद्याप्तिं वाक्पटुत्वं च सगोष्ठया कालयापनम् ।
शुभक्षं फलमेवं स्यात्पापक्ष फलमन्यथा ॥

Sloka 51-52. During the चकदशा (Chakradasa) of
the 2nd Rasi may be expected increase of wealth and
corn, good food, acquisition of children and wives,
lands, cattle, honor by the sovereign, attainment of
knowledge, eloquence and amusement in good company
When the Rasi in question is auspicious, such gooa
effect as has been said above will follow; it will be
otherwise when the Rasi is malefic.
तृतीयराशिचक्रस्य परिपाके महत्सुखम् ।
भक्ष्यभोज्यफलाप्तिं च शौर्य धैर्यं मनोजयम् ॥

title: Adh. XVII.
content:
988
आसकपारिजाते
Adh. XVII.
कर्णाभरणवस्त्राप्ति कण्ठभूषणमायतिम् ।
अन्नपानादिसंपत्ति शुभरात्रौ शुभं वदेत् ।। ५४ ।।
Slokas 53-54. When the चक्रदशा (Chakradasa) of
the 3rd Rasi ripens, it will be the good fortune of the
person concerned to enjoy much happiness, to get in
abundance fruits edible and palatable, to display heroism,
firmness and self-control, to be presented with earrings,
apparel and neck-ornaments, to attain to dignity and to
possess food, drink and other good things of life in
abundance. The astrologer is to announce good effects
when the Rasi is good.
चतुर्थराशिचक्रस्य पाके वाहन भूषणम् ।
सीमाप्तिं तीर्थयात्रादिमहज्जननिषेवणम् ॥ ५५ ॥
चित्तशुद्धिं महोत्साहं स्त्रीसुताप्ति कृषिक्रियाम् ।
बन्धुक्षेत्राभिवृद्धिं च गृहलाभं महत्सुखम् ॥ ५६ ॥
आरोग्यमर्थलाभं च सुगन्धाम्बर भूषणम् ।
शुभक्षं शोभनं विद्यात्पापर्थे सर्वनाशनम् ॥ ५७ ॥
Slokas 55-57. When the चक्रदशा (Chakradasa) of
the 4th Rasi begins to ripen, the person concerned will
get vehicles, ornaments, new lands in the frontier; make
pilgrimages to sacred shrines and the like; obtain cons-
picuous honor from his own community; enjoy purity
of the heart; engage in some great enterprise; be bless-
ed with wife and children; engage in agriculture;
acquire new friends and new landed property, new
houses; derive much happiness; command good health,
resources and articles of the toilette such as perfumes,
wearing apparel and ornaments. The good things the
astrologer is to divine when the Rasi is good; but all
this will be absent when the Rasi is bad.
verses:
कर्णाभरणवस्त्राप्ति कण्ठभूषणमायतिम् ।
अन्नपानादिसंपत्ति शुभरात्रौ शुभं वदेत् ।। ५४ ।।

When the चक्रदशा (Chakradasa) of the 3rd Rasi ripens, it will be the good fortune of the person concerned to enjoy much happiness, to get in abundance fruits edible and palatable, to display heroism, firmness and self-control, to be presented with earrings, apparel and neck-ornaments, to attain to dignity and to possess food, drink and other good things of life in abundance. The astrologer is to announce good effects when the Rasi is good.

चतुर्थराशिचक्रस्य पाके वाहन भूषणम् ।
सीमाप्तिं तीर्थयात्रादिमहज्जननिषेवणम् ॥ ५५ ॥
चित्तशुद्धिं महोत्साहं स्त्रीसुताप्ति कृषिक्रियाम् ।
बन्धुक्षेत्राभिवृद्धिं च गृहलाभं महत्सुखम् ॥ ५६ ॥
आरोग्यमर्थलाभं च सुगन्धाम्बर भूषणम् ।
शुभक्षं शोभनं विद्यात्पापर्थे सर्वनाशनम् ॥ ५७ ॥

When the चक्रदशा (Chakradasa) of the 4th Rasi begins to ripen, the person concerned will get vehicles, ornaments, new lands in the frontier; make pilgrimages to sacred shrines and the like; obtain conspicuous honor from his own community; enjoy purity of the heart; engage in some great enterprise; be blessed with wife and children; engage in agriculture; acquire new friends and new landed property, new houses; derive much happiness; command good health, resources and articles of the toilette such as perfumes, wearing apparel and ornaments. The good things the astrologer is to divine when the Rasi is good; but all this will be absent when the Rasi is bad.

title: सप्तदशोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 58-63
सप्तदशोऽध्यायः
989
सुतराश्यात्मके चक्रे राज्याप्तिं राजपूजनम् ।
स्त्रीसुताप्ति महाधैर्यमारोग्यं बन्धुपोषणम् ॥ ५८ ॥
अन्नदानं यशोलाभं आनन्दाब्धिमहोदयम् ।
उपकर्तृत्वमर्थाप्तिं वाहनाम्बरभूषणम् ।। ५९ ।।
शुभपापक्षजं सर्वं ग्रहयोगादिसंभवम् ।
पूर्ववद्योजयेत्तत्र चरराशौ पदच्युतिम् ॥ ६० ॥
Slokas 58-60. During the चक्रदशा (Chakradasa) of
the 5th Rasi may be had kingship, honor by the sove-
reign, acquisition of wives and children, exceeding
stability, sound health, the cherishing of relatives, dis-
pensing of food, acquirement of fame, jubilee and great
prosperity, beneficence, attainment of wealth, vehicles
wearing apparel and ornaments. The astrologer should
as before apportion the effects properly according as
they are due to malefic or benefic Rasis and the presence
in them or aspect of them by malefic or benefic planets.
He is to add loss of place or position when the Rasi is
a moveable one.
चक्रस्य षष्ठराशेस्तु परिपाकेऽग्निजं भयम् ।
चोरारिविषभूपार्ति स्थाननाशं महद्भयम् ।। ३१ ।।
प्रमेह गुल्मपाण्ड्डा दिग्रहणीक्षयमंभवम् ।
अपकीर्ति कलत्रार्थसुतबन्धुविनाशनम् ॥ ६२ ॥
बन्धनं निगलप्राप्ति ऋणदारिद्यपीडनम् ।
फापर्थे फलमेत्रं स्यान्मिश्र शुभगृहे सति ॥ ६३ ॥
Slokas 61-63. During the ripening of the चक्रदशा
(Chakradasa) of the 6th Rasi, the person concerned has
to apprehend danger from fire, trouble from thieves,
from enemies, from poison, from the sovereign, loss of
verses:
सुतराश्यात्मके चक्रे राज्याप्तिं राजपूजनम् ।
स्त्रीसुताप्ति महाधैर्यमारोग्यं बन्धुपोषणम् ॥

अन्नदानं यशोलाभं आनन्दाब्धिमहोदयम् ।
उपकर्तृत्वमर्थाप्तिं वाहनाम्बरभूषणम् ।।

शुभपापक्षजं सर्वं ग्रहयोगादिसंभवम् ।
पूर्ववद्योजयेत्तत्र चरराशौ पदच्युतिम् ॥

During the चक्रदशा (Chakradasa) of the 5th Rasi may be had kingship, honor by the sove-
reign, acquisition of wives and children, exceeding
stability, sound health, the cherishing of relatives, dis-
pensing of food, acquirement of fame, jubilee and great
prosperity, beneficence, attainment of wealth, vehicles
wearing apparel and ornaments. The astrologer should
as before apportion the effects properly according as
they are due to malefic or benefic Rasis and the presence
in them or aspect of them by malefic or benefic planets.
He is to add loss of place or position when the Rasi is
a moveable one.
चक्रस्य षष्ठराशेस्तु परिपाकेऽग्निजं भयम् ।
चोरारिविषभूपार्ति स्थाननाशं महद्भयम् ।।

प्रमेह गुल्मपाण्ड्डा दिग्रहणीक्षयमंभवम् ।
अपकीर्ति कलत्रार्थसुतबन्धुविनाशनम् ॥

बन्धनं निगलप्राप्ति ऋणदारिद्यपीडनम् ।
फापर्थे फलमेत्रं स्यान्मिश्र शुभगृहे सति ॥

During the ripening of the चक्रदशा
(Chakradasa) of the 6th Rasi, the person concerned has
to apprehend danger from fire, trouble from thieves,
from enemies, from poison, from the sovereign, loss of

content:
990
श्रातकपारिजाते
Adh. XVII.
place, great risk due to gonorrhoea, colic, jaundice and
kindred ailments, diarrhoea and consumption, ill-fame,
loss of wives, wealth, children and relatives, captivity,
being put in irons, harassment on account of debts and
poverty. These will be the effects when the Rasi is
malefic. The effect will be mixed when the 6th Rasi
is benefic.
कलत्रराशिचक्रस्य परिपाके करग्रहः ।
स्त्रीसुखं पुत्रलाभं च घृतसूपगुडादिकम् ॥ ६४ ॥
कृषिगोगजभूषाप्तिं राजपूज्यं महद्यशः ।
शुभराशौ फलं सत्यं शुभखेचरसंयुते ।। ६५ ।।
Slokas 61-65. During the ripening of the चक्रदशा
(Chakradasa) of the 7th Rasi may be expected marriage;
the joy with a wedded consort; the birth of a son, the
pleasures of the table-such as ghee, dhal and sugar;
success in agriculture, acquisition of cattle, elephants
and ornaments, honor by the sovereign and great
renown. When the 7th Rasi is benefic and is occupied
by a benefic planet, the good effects spoken of will
surely follow.
मृत्युचक्रदशाकाले महद्दुःखं धनञ्जयम् ।
स्थाननाशं बन्धुनाशं गुह्योदरनिपीडनम् ।। ६६ ॥
दारिज्यमन्नविद्वेषमन्नाभावमरेर्भयम् ।
पापक्षे पापमंयोगे फलमेवं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ६७ ॥
Slokas 66-67. During the चक्रदशा (Chakradasa) of
the 8th Rasi there will be much misery, waste of wealth,
loss of place, loss of relations, griping pain in the privi-
ties and the stomach, poverty, famine and danger from
an enemy. These effects the astrologer may announce
verses:
कलत्रराशिचक्रस्य परिपाके करग्रहः ।
स्त्रीसुखं पुत्रलाभं च घृतसूपगुडादिकम् ॥ ६४ ॥
कृषिगोगजभूषाप्तिं राजपूज्यं महद्यशः ।
शुभराशौ फलं सत्यं शुभखेचरसंयुते ।। ६५ ।।

During the ripening of the चक्रदशा
(Chakradasa) of the 7th Rasi may be expected marriage;
the joy with a wedded consort; the birth of a son, the
pleasures of the table-such as ghee, dhal and sugar;
success in agriculture, acquisition of cattle, elephants
and ornaments, honor by the sovereign and great
renown. When the 7th Rasi is benefic and is occupied
by a benefic planet, the good effects spoken of will
surely follow.

मृत्युचक्रदशाकाले महद्दुःखं धनञ्जयम् ।
स्थाननाशं बन्धुनाशं गुह्योदरनिपीडनम् ।। ६६ ॥
दारिज्यमन्नविद्वेषमन्नाभावमरेर्भयम् ।
पापक्षे पापमंयोगे फलमेवं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ६७ ॥

During the चक्रदशा (Chakradasa) of
the 8th Rasi there will be much misery, waste of wealth,
loss of place, loss of relations, griping pain in the privi-
ties and the stomach, poverty, famine and danger from
an enemy. These effects the astrologer may announce

title: सप्तदशोऽध्यायः
content:
SI. 68-72
सप्तदशोऽध्यायः
991
when the Rasi is malefic and occupied by a malefic
planet.
शुभचक्रद‌शाकाले शोभनं भवति ध्रुवम् ।
पुत्रमित्रकलत्रार्थकृषिगोग्रहभूषणम् ।। ६८ ।।
सत्कर्मधर्मसंसिद्धि महज्जनपरिग्रहम् ।
शुभराशौ शुभं सर्व पापराशौ विपर्ययः ॥ ६९ ॥
Slokas 68 69. When the चक्रदशा (Chakradasa) of
the 8th Rasi sets in, good will certainly result-viz.
children, friends, wives, wealth, agriculture, cattle,
houses, ornaments, accomplishment of good works and
charity; the securing of adherents among inen connect-
ed with the great men in power. All this will accrue
when the Rasi is propitious. It will be otherwise
when the Rasi is malefic.
कर्मचक्रदशाकाले राज्याप्तिं नृपपूजनम् ।
सत्कीर्तिदारपुत्रात्मबन्धुसङ्गं महोत्सवम् ॥ ७० ॥
आज्ञाधरत्वमारोग्यं सगोष्ठया कालयापनम ।
सत्कर्मफलमैश्वर्य शुभराशौ वदेङ्गधः ॥ ७१ ॥
Slokas 70-71 When the चक्रदशा (Chakradasa) of
the Rasi of the 10th bhava is in progress and when that
Rasi is propitious, the following good things may be
predicted by a competent astrologer- acquisition of a
kingdom, honor by a king, good fame, great rejoicing in
the society of one's wives, children and relatives, pos-
session of authority, sound health, pleasant recreations
in company with good people, the fruit of good works
and supremacy.
लाभचक्रदशाकाले धनाप्त्यारोग्यभूषणम् ।
विचित्रवस्त्वागमनं गृहोपकरणं लभेत् ॥ ७२ ॥
verses:
शुभचक्रद‌शाकाले शोभनं भवति ध्रुवम् ।
पुत्रमित्रकलत्रार्थकृषिगोग्रहभूषणम् ।।

शुभराशौ शुभं सर्व पापराशौ विपर्ययः ॥

the 8th Rasi sets in, good will certainly result-viz.

houses, ornaments, accomplishment of good works and
charity; the securing of adherents among inen connect-
ed with the great men in power. All this will accrue
when the Rasi is propitious. It will be otherwise
when the Rasi is malefic.

सत्कीर्तिदारपुत्रात्मबन्धुसङ्गं महोत्सवम् ॥

आज्ञाधरत्वमारोग्यं सगोष्ठया कालयापनम ।
सत्कर्मफलमैश्वर्य शुभराशौ वदेङ्गधः ॥

Slokas 70-71 When the चक्रदशा (Chakradasa) of
the Rasi of the 10th bhava is in progress and when that
Rasi is propitious, the following good things may be
predicted by a competent astrologer- acquisition of a
kingdom, honor by a king, good fame, great rejoicing in
the society of one's wives, children and relatives, pos-
session of authority, sound health, pleasant recreations
in company with good people, the fruit of good works
and supremacy.
